body.preformat: --S 77-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 77 69...... We...always...try...to...reduce...stress...during...transportation...and... keep...temperature... at...15-20... ....We...have...experienced... under...15......for...over...one...hour...after...received...on...April...15... 2021....Driver...loaded...6dogs...with...door...opening,...then...run... highway...soon....Air...always...ventilated...from...front...side,...and... take...time...by...wormed....We...aim...for...more...stability...using... truck...instead...of...van...and...measure...temperature...using... RC-5...produced...by...Elitech. The...first...trial...was...posted...at...the...side...door....Temperature... difference...in...May...27-28...was...recorded...2.3...:16.6-18.9....... Our...target...range...was...2.0...,...thus...we...change...position...to... close...by...air...conditioner....Total...7times...delivery...during... June...4...to...November...6...was...very...stable,...mean...1.3...:... min.16.9......max.20.0.......Delivery...time...and...density...of...dogs... was...not...related....In...result,...this...is...the...best...position...to...get... narrow...temperature...range. On...December...9-10,...truck...have...punctured...tire...3times.... Although...air...conditioner...still...working,...driver...often...open... the...door...and...check...animal...health....It's...easy...to...flow...from... outside...and...temperature...in...cargo...was...up...and...down...,and... temperature...range,...3.4.... On...October...29,...Van...delivered...with...1.9......range....It...was... less...stable...than...truck,...but...it's...sufficient...to...deliver...small.../... few...animals. The...temperature...variation...was...picked...up...below...point:... outside...temperature,...truck...size,...and...door...opening....Animal... species...and...density...in...cargo...should...be...influence...on...the... temperature. Our...mission...is...delivery...safety...with...healthy...of...animals.... We...recommend...driver...to...open...the...door...if...they...have...any... concerns....Animal...itself...was...heat...source,...therefore...we... should...have...driven...to...be...flexible...setting...if...any...trouble... happened.... Consideration of data logger position during transportaion and factor of temperature variation Hiroaki Abe1 , Gen Ishikawa1 , Haruto Hamahata2 , Hiroshi Hamahata2 1 Marshall...BioResources...Japan...Inc.,...2 Hamahata...Inc. P-2 P-1 The... size... and... shape... of... the... bio... bubble... clean... room... (biobubble)...can...be...freely...designed,...and...high...cleanliness... can...be...maintained...by...blowing...a...large...amount...of...air... filtered...by...a...HEPA...filter,...making...it...possible...to...keep... immunocompromised...animals....However,...the...temperature... and...humidity...depended...on...the...air...conditioning...of...the... room...in...which...the...biobubble...was...installed....In...this...study,... we...constructed...a...temperature...and...humidity...controlled... biobubble...system...by...connecting...a...small...air-conditioning... system,...AquaClean...L/S,...with...a...biobubble....we...investigated... the... inability... of... long-term... care... and... experimental... treatment...of...severely...immunodeficient...NOD/Shi-scid,... IL-2R KO...mice...(NOG...mice)....A...biobubble...was...installed... ... in... the... conventional... area... where... the... package... air... conditioner...was...installed,...and...an...AquaClean...L/S...was... installed...in...the...next...room,...and...air...was...taken...from...the... AquaClean...L/S...to...the...bio...bubble...through...a...duct....The... temperature...and...humidity...inside...the...bio-bubble...were... measured...and...monitored....An...individual...ventilation...cage... and...an...X-ray...irradiation...device...were...installed...in...the...bio... bubble....About...two...years...have...passed...since...the...start...of... the... study,... and... we... have... been... able... to... maintain... the... temperature...and...humidity...at...the...default...levels...of...20-26... and...40-70%,...respectively,...while...X-ray...irradiation...and... blood... sampling... have... been... performed... in... the... same... biobubble,...and...we...have...been...able...to...keep...NOG...mice... without...microbial...contamination....It...was...shown...that...even... in...a...compact...space,...the...use...of...AquaClean...L/S,...biobubble... and...IVC...can...be...used...not...only...for...breeding...severely... immunocompromised...animals...but...also...for...experimental... procedures...in...a...temperature...and...humidity...controled... space. A case study on breeding and experimental procedure in the NOG mice using bio bubble clean room. Megumi Nishiwaki1 , Kiyotaka Mitani2 , Shigeyasu Koido3 , Masaki Aramaki4 1 CLEA...Japan,...Inc.,...Fujiyama...Breeding...Facility...2 NITTO...AIR...TECH.CO.,...LTD,...3 NOMURA...JIMUSHO,...INC.... 4 CLEA...Japan,...Inc.,...Cage...&...Equipment...Dept. --S 78-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 78 69...... Preclinical... experiments... and... medical... training... using... miniature...pigs...have...been...attracting...increasing...attention.... For...example,...the...first...successful...cardiac...xenotransplant... from...a...genetically...modified...pig...was...reported...in...the... United...States...recently. There...are...two...major...advantages...of...pigs...as...laboratory... animals.... First,... pigs... are... physiologically... adapted... to... coexistence...with...humans...through...their...nearly...10,000... years...of...coevolution...and...domestication....Accordingly,...they... experience...minimal...stress...from...the...presence...of...human... experimenters....Second,...pigs...have...a...large...body...size...is... comparable...to...that...of...humans,...and...therefore,...clinical... devices... and... methods... can... be... directly... applied... in... the... process...of...preclinical...development...and...are...also...suitable... for...translational...use...such...as...in...xenotransplantation. However,...this...advantage...of...biological...size...also...poses...a... major...barrier...to...entry...in...preclinical...experiments...and... translational...application....For...example,...facility...design,... construction,...and...operation...require...expertise...in...both... medicine...and...animal...husbandry,...and...location...and...logistics... pose...unique...challenges....In...addition,...it...is...difficult...for... clinicians...and...researchers...located...far...from...large...pig... facilities...to...conduct...cutting-edge...pilot...experiments. In...this...report,...we...will...first...summarize...the...trends...in...the... preclinical...and...translational...use...of...minipigs,...drawing...on... PubMed...literature...trends....Next,...we...will...introduce...a... preclinical...study...using...the...newly...developed...mobile...pig... laboratory...(MPL)...and...discuss...key...points...for...conducting... quality-controlled...preclinical...studies...in...a...mobile...facility.... In...particular,...we...discuss...husbandry...conditions,... drug... administration,...and...clinical...management...by...telemetry....In... addition,... we... will... introduce... preclinical... information... management...systems...and...medical...record...systems...that... incorporates...elements...of...clinical...medical...records...and... livestock... animal... management.... This... system... was... developed...to...overcome...the...unique...difficulties...in...managing... porcine...preclinical...clinical...information...under...pathogen- controlled... conditions.... Finally,... we... will... discuss... the... challenges...for...future...preclinical...use...of...miniature...pigs...and... anticipated...developments. Health... monitoring... using... the... dirty... bedding... sentinel... system...does...not...detect...microorganisms...that...rarely...infect... animals... from... the... bedding.... However,... PCR... for... environmental... dust... (containing... microorganisms)... is... reported...to...detect...such...hidden...microorganisms....In...order... to... examine... effective... health... monitoring,... this... study... conducted...an...environmental...PCR...in...a...conventional...(CV)... facility,...focusing...on...the...sample...collection...procedure. [Methods]...Female...BALB/c...nu/+...mice...(Charles...River)... were...housed...in...the...CV...facility....They...were...exposed...to... dirty...bedding...for...3...months....During...the...test...periods,...(1)... adhesive...swabs...of...the...cage...inside,...(2)...dirty...beddings,...and... (3)...blotting...filters...laid...in...the...bedding...were...collected.... Health... monitoring... of... the... mice... and... PCR... test... of... the... samples...was...performed...at...Charles...River...Japan...(now...The... Jackson...Laboratory...Japan)....The...PCR...test...items...included... 2...viruses,...6...bacteria,...and...11...parasites...commonly...found...in... CV...facilities. [Results...and...Discussion]...Mouse...norovirus,...Helicobacter... spp.,...Chilomastix muris...from...3...cages,...Myobia musculi, Entamoeba...spp.,...Hexamastix muris, Aspiculuris tetraptera, Syphacia obvelata...from...2...cages,...and...Rodentibacter heylii, Myocoptes musculinus, Tritrichomonas...spp....from...1...cage... were...detected....The...collection...procedure...affected...PCR... results;...A. tetraptera...and...C. muris...were...detected...only... from...the...blotting...filters....The...positive...results...for...the...three... cages...were...19...for...the...swabs,...15...for...the...dirty...bedding,... and...20...for...the...blotting...filters....No...items...were...recognized... in...the...sentinel...mice,...suggesting...that...the...environmental... PCR...effectively...monitors...microorganisms...having...low... bedding-to-animal...transmissibility....Combined...with...the... preliminary...PCR...tests...of...the...cage-top...filter...was...negative... for...all...items,...we...concluded...that...PCR...samples...should...be... collected... from... inside... the... cage... for... the... non-forced... ventilation...cage. Minipig Preclinical Trials in a Mobile Facility: Husbandry, Treatment, and Information Management Kentaroh Takagaki1 , Masayuki Takeshima1 , Takamichi Oura2 , Takanori Miyake3 , Masahiro Bando3 , Hikari Hirata3 , Maki Hirata1,2 , Fumiki Morimatsu1,2 , Naoki Muguruma3,5 , Tetsuji Takayama3,4 1 Bio-Innovation...Research...Center,...Tokushima...University,...2 Faculty...of...Biosciences...and...Bioindustry,...Tokushima... University,...3 Department...of...Gastroenterology...and...Oncology,...Tokushima...University...Hospital,...4 Takamatsu...Municipal... Hospital,...5 Faculty...of...Medicine,...Tokushima...University Environmental PCR trial in RIKEN BRC Ayako Kajita1 , Naoki Hirano1 , Akemi Yasui1 , Shinya Ayabe1 , Hideki Sasaki2 , Norihisa Sako2 , Shigeri Maruyama2 , Fumio Ike1 1 RIKEN...BRC,...2 JAX...Japan P-3 P-4 --S 79-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 79 69...... In...the...breeding...management...of...germ-free...(GF)...mice... using...a...vinyl...isolator...(VI),...the...water...supply...protocol...is...to... add...sterile...water...to...a...water...bottle...to...reduce...the...risk...of... contamination....However,...we...have...not...seen...any...reports... on...the...changes...in...water...quality...and...the...effects...on...mice... due...to...additional...pouring....In...this...experiment,...a...weekly... water... bottle... replacement... method... (fresh... group)... that... imitates...SPF...control,...and...a...method...that...continues...to...add... water... using... the... added... water... (addition... group)... are... provided.... Experiments...were...performed...using...large...VI-producing... GF...NOG...mice....The...body...weight,...and...chemical...oxygen... demand...(COD)...of...drinking...water...by...pack...test...indicator,... were...measured...during...the...observation...period...of...3...to...28... weeks...of...age....GF...status...was...confirmed...by...a...conventional... culture...inspection...(fresh...stool,...bedding,...and...wiping)....In... addition,...the...weight...of...major...organs...was...measured...at...30... weeks...of...age. No...significant...difference...was...found...between...the...two... groups....The...average...COD...(ppm)...of...drinking...water...(fresh... group/addition...group)was...male...(5.82.2.../...16.33.0)...and... female...(9.92.4,...18.62.5)....It...was...always...high...in...the... addition...group,...but...the...COD...tended...to...decrease...with... each...measurement...period....We...considered...that...this...was... because...the...water...intake...increased...with...the...growth....In... addition,...there...was...no...significant...difference...in...organ... weight...between...the...two...groups,...male...and...female. From...this...test,...the...difference...in...water...supply...protocol... did...not...affect...body...weight...and...organ...weight....But...we...will... proceed...with... a...detailed...analysis... of...water...and...blood... property...in...the...future. During...the...COVID-19...outbreak,...universities...and...research... institutions...had...to...avoid...the...Three...Cs...and...take...thorough... countermeasures...against...infectious...diseases...to...maintain... their... research... functions.... The... Center... for... Animal... Resources... and... Development... (CARD)... at... Kumamoto... University...implemented...infection...control...measures...at...an... early...stage...and...strived...to...maintain...its...breeding...and... management...functions....A...summary...of...measures...taken... can...be...found...below: 1....The...COVID-19...advisory...level...in...laboratory...animal... facilities...was...set...at...levels...1...to...3...according...to...changes...in... the...domestic...and...international...situation. 2....Breeding...operations...were...carried...out...in...preparation... for...an...emergency....The...breeding...staff...were...divided...into... two...groups,...and...the...time...for...changing...clothes...and...eating... was...staggered...to...avoid...the...Three...Cs. 3....Staff...carrying...out...experiments...were...allowed...to...enter... the...animal...room...only...if...they...displayed...no...symptoms...of... COVID-19...as...defined...in...the...regulations,...such...as...fever,... malaise,...or...an...abnormal...sense...of...smell. 4....Communication...with...animal...suppliers,...etc.,...that...was... normally...done...in...the...control...area,...was...now...done...at...the... entrance...on...the...first...floor....Restrictions...on...people...entering... the...facility...were...tightened,...such...as...requiring...a...two-week... temperature...record...if...visitors...from...off-campus...or...outside... of...Kumamoto...prefecture...needed...to...visit...the...university. 5....During...the...state...of...emergency...in...April...and...May...2020,... remote... work... from... home... was... implemented... for... administrative...work...only...at...the...request...of...Kumamoto... University.... 6....To...accommodate...remote...work,...application...forms...were... put...online. This...presentation...will...describe...details...of...the...COVID-19... measures...implemented...at...CARD. Comparison of water supply protocols in germfree NOG mouse rearing Keisuke KOJIMA, Ryoko NOZU, Kayo TOMIYAMA, Yuyo KA, Tomoyuki OGURA, Riichi TAKAHASHI Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals Response to COVID-19 at the Center for Animal Resources and Development in the New Building of Kumamoto University Kaori Sakaguchi1 , Mayumi Kosaki1 , Wataru Sakamoto1 , Kenji Ichimura1,2 , Naomi Nakagata3 , Toru Takeo1 1 Div....of...Reprod....Eng.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ.,...2 Kyudo...Co.,...Ltd. 3 Div....of...Reprod....Biotech....Innov.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ. P-5 P-6 --S 80-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 80 69...... Wet... shower... (WS)... is... considered... to... be... effective... for... maintaining...the...microbiological...cleanliness...of...barrier... rooms...in...laboratory...animal...facilities....However,...there...are... some...negative...aspects...of...WS;...for...example,...frequent...body... wash...by...WS...may...be...harmful...to...human...skin...health,...and... high... humidity... because... of... shower... room... might... cause... unexpected...development...of...microorganisms,...etc....This... study...was...conducted...to...confirm...the...effectiveness...of...WS... for...microbiological...control...at...barrier...rooms. This...experiment...was...performed...in...our...own...breeding... room...which...was...not...operated...and...without...animals....Two... groups...were...set...up,...one...with...and...one...without...WS,...all... other...conditions...were...consolidated...except...for...the...use...of... WS.... Following... sterilized... PPE... items... were... donned:... underwear,...socks,...caps,...jumpsuits,...shoe...covers,...masks,... and...cotton...gloves....After...put...on...these...PPEs,...ventilation... hood...was...worn....The...number...of...bacteria...detected...outside... the...PPE...was...counted...after...3...hours...of...certain...amount...of... exercise.... Samples... were... collected... from... six... locations,... including...the...floor...and...soles...of...the...shoe...covers....Standard... agar... medium... was... used... for... bacteria... detection.... The... detected...bacterial...counts...were...statistically...processed. ...In...both...groups,...the...number...of...bacteria...detected...was... between...0...and...8,...regardless...of...the...sampling...location.... There...was...no...significant...difference...in...the...number...of... bacteria...leaking...or...transmitting...from...PPE...between...the... two... groups.... The... results... suggest... that... there... is... no... difference... in... the... risk... of... introducing... human-derived... microorganisms...into...the...barrier...rooms...regardless...of...the... use...of...WS...when...we...follow...our...current...procedure...of...room... entry...for...barrier...rooms...with...using...current...PPE,...such...as... sterile...clothing...and...ventilation...hoods....We...concluded...that... the...continuation...of...WS...is...not...necessarily...the...best...way...to... maintain...the...microbiological...cleanliness...of...our...barrier... rooms...and...ceasing...of...WS...could...be...an...option...with...devisal... of...PPE. Animal... facilities... are... equipped... with... large... pieces... of... equipment...to...maintain...a...suitable...environment...for...the... care...of...laboratory...animals....A...steel-framed,...reinforced... concrete...building...was...built...in...2000...for...the...Center...for... Animal... Resources... and... Development... at... Kumamoto... University,...which...can...accommodate...over...30,000...mice.... Recently...large-scale...renovation...was...carried...out...on...the... Center's...dilapidated...air-conditioning...system...as...a...project... due... for... deliberation... as... part... of... the... 2019... National... University...Corporation...Facility...Improvement...Plan....The... renovation...plan...was...split...between...several...air...conditioner... systems,... and... the... mice... in... the... facility... were... moved... according...to...the...progress...of...each...process,...leaving...one... breeding...area...open...at...all...times....This...method...also...entailed... the...consolidation...of...the...rearing...space,...the...allocation...of... cages... to... all... users,... cage... arrangement... to... minimize... movement,...rearing...management,...and...thorough...cleaning... and...disinfection...at...every...stage....A...high-pressure...steam... sterilizer...was...also...purchased...after...a...budget...request,...and... two...internal...repair...projects...were...also...conducted....This... work...was...carried...out...after...we...coordinated...the...schedule... with...relevant...staff,...conducted...simulations...of...breeding... management,... and... discussed... possible... problems... and... solutions....During...briefing...sessions...prior...to...construction,... we...responded...to... users'...requests...and... readjusted...the... timing...and...number...of...cages...to...be...reduced....Each...week,... personnel...involved...in...construction...met...to...review...the... process...and...progress...and...to...share...information....In...the... end,...approximately...60%...of...the...pre-construction...cages... were...preserved,...and...the...work...was...completed...within...the... originally...planned...construction...period....We...will...present... information...on...our...findings...and...actions...taken...for...this... project...in...order...to...aid...those...planning...to...renovate...animal... facilities...in...the...future. Evaluating effectiveness of wet shower for microbiological control in barrier rooms Shigeri Maruyama, Hideaki Yamamoto, Yohei Goto The...Jackson...Laboratory...Japan,...Inc. Renovation of the animal facility at the Center for Animal Resources and Development, Kumamoto University Wataru Sakamoto1 , Shizuo Fukuda2 , Hiroyuki Nawata2 , Kenji Ichimura3 , Daisuke Torigoe4 , Naomi Nakagata5 , Toru Takeo1 1 Institute...of...Resource...Development...and...Analysis...Division...of...Reproductive...Engineering...Kumamoto...University,... 2 FABILS...Co.,...Ltd,...3 KYUDO...Co.,...Ltd,...4 Institute...of...Resource...Development...and...Analysis...Division...of...Laboratory... Animal...Science...Kumamoto...University,...5 Institute...of...Resource...Development...and...Analysis...Division...of...Reproductive... Biotechnology...and...Innovation...Kumamoto...University P-7 P-8 --S 81-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 81 69...... We...studied...deterioration...of...quality...of...water...in...bottles... supplied...to...mice.... We...used...two...types...of...holding...cage...(small...and...large).... Three...(3)...animals...were...kept...in...each...cage...with...wood...chip... bedding...and...pellet-form...diet....Water...(250mL)...containing... 10...ppm...total...available...chloride...was...supplied...in...water... bottles....The...cage...was...changed...at...commencement...of...this... study...for...7...days....The...water...quality...was...evaluated...as... total...available...chlorine...(examine...paper)...and...ATP...test... using...a...luminometer...(Kikkoman...Biochemifa...Company).... As...a...result,...some...bottles...showed...large...decreasing...in...total... available...chlorine...only...one...or...2...days...after...beginning,... followed...by...ATP...increasing....There...were...no...differences... noted...between...the...two...types...of...cages....Water...for...male... animals...often...got...worse...in...quality,...compared...to...females.... The... authors... have... confirmed... the... development... and... efficacy...of...the...device...with...the...aqueous...solution...of...sodium... chlorite...contained...in...a...sealed...polyethylene...tube...and...the... activator... encapsulated... in... a... glass... ampule,... in... which... chlorine...dioxide...gas...can...be...easily...generated....In...the...fast- acting...device,...the...6-log...bactericidal...effect...(biological... indicator.../...Bacillus atrophaeus)...was...obtained...with...a... minimum...of...3...hours...of...gas...exposure....In...the...sustainable... device,...the...growth...inhibitory...effect...of...the...chloride...dioxide... gas...on...the...colonies...has...been...confirmed...in...the...agar...media... placed...into...the...boots. In...the...present...study,...we...validate...the...effect...of...the...high... level...disinfectants...used...in...the...new...fast-acting...device...on... the...device...operation...due...to...the...bactericidal...treatment...in... the...electronic...device...of...interest...and...the...bactericidal... concentrations...and...duration...in...the...sustainable...device...and... report...the...results. Quality of water provided in water bottles to mice Mayumi Takechi, Koji Hanai Department...of...Experimental...Animals,...Interdisciplinary...Center...for...Science...Research,...Organization...for...Research... and...Academic...Information,...Shimane...University Validation and Application of Bactericidal Effect Using Chlorine Dioxide Gas Generation Devices (Second Report) Yoshihiro Ito1 , Shiro Harada2 , Takeshi Hihara2 , Tetsuro Yamate2 , Shigetaro Tanaka1 , Jyunichi Yamanaka1 , Masato Fujishiro1 , Fumiaki Kanno1 , Yuya Sato1 , Azusa Seki1 1 HAMRI...Co.,Ltd,...2 LUMICA...CORPORATION P-9 P-10 --S 82-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 82 69...... The... Research... Institute... for... Radiation... Biology... and... Medicine...at...Hiroshima...University...is...one...of...the...largest... university...research...institutes...in...the...field...of...radiation... biomedical...science...in...Japan....Following...the...establishment... of...the...Facilities...for...Animal...Experiments...in...Radiation... Research... Center... for... Frontier... Science... in... 1984,... for... performing...radiation...effect-related...animal...experiments,... many...valuable...scientific...discoveries...have...been...produced.... However,... there... have... recently... been... problems... in... the... facilities,...such...as...the...decentralized...arrangement...and... aging...of...experimental...facilities,...and...the...insufficiency...of... breeding... space... due... to... increased... number... of... animal... experiments....To...solve...these...concerns,...we...re-established... the...animal...experiment...facility...on...the...2nd...and...3rd...floors... in...newly-build...Experiment...Building...for...Frontier...Radiation... Science....In...the...facility...we...started...to...use...at...June...2021,... there...are...11...general...breeding...rooms...for...mice,...1...breeding... room...for...embryo...manipulation,...1...quarantine...room,...1... conventional...room...and...1...general...breeding...room...for...rats.... We...installed...individually...ventilated...caging...system...and... hypochlorous...acid...water...production...equipment...to...all... general...breeding...rooms,...and...large...passing...rooms...with... hydrogen... peroxide... gas... sterilization... equipment.... In... addition,...by...employing...a...PCR...Rodent...Infectious...Agent... (PRIA)...microbial...monitoring...method...and...organized...user... flow...lines,...we...challenged...to...build...a...new...hygiene...control... system....A...radiation...control...area...was...set...up...with...three... breeding...rooms,...and...the...Cs-137...radiation...source...installed... in...two...of...them...enabled...irradiation...experiments...under... various...conditions....In...this...presentation,...we...report...the... outline...of...this...facility,...including...emphasized...points...during... its... planning... and... problems... found... after... the... start... of... operation. The...Ministry...of...Health,...Labor...and...Welfare...(MHLW)... established... the... "Basic... Guidelines... for... the... Conduct... of... Animal... Experiments... at... Institutions... under... the... Management... of... the... Ministry... of... Health,... Labor... and... Welfare"... (hereinafter... referred... to... as... the... "MHLW... Guidelines")...in...2006....In...FY...2008,...we...conducted...a...survey... of...corporations...that...are...subject...to...the...MHLW...guidelines,... as...well...as...institutes...belonging...to...the...local...government. In... this... study,... we... aimed... to... determine... the... status... of... compliance...with...the...MHLW...guidelines...four...years...after... the...previous...survey,...by...asking...the...same...questions...as...in... the...previous...survey...and...clarifying...the...changes. The...number...of...institutions...that...reported...conducting... animal...experiments...decreased...compared...to...the...previous... survey,... while... the... number... of... outsourced... animal... experiments... increased,... especially... among... institutions... belonging...to...the...company....In...addition,...there...was...an... improvement...in...all...survey...questions...compared...to...the... previous...survey,...indicating...that...institutions...are...becoming... more... aware... of... the... MHLW... guidelines... on... animal... experiments...and...are...implementing...them...accordingly.... However,...some...institutions...have...been...delayed...in...taking... action,...and...approaching...these...institutions...is...an...important... issue...for...the...future....To...solve...this...problem,...it...is...necessary... to...further...encourage...the...use...of...the...self-assessment...sheets... developed...by...this...research...project. This... study... was... conducted... as... a... part... of... the... FY2020... Special...Research...of...Health...Labour...Sciences...Research... Grant,...The...Ministry...of...Health...Labour...and...Welfare. Renewal of animal experiment facility in the Research Institute for Radiation Biology and Medicine at Hiroshima University Maiko Inagaki, Akiko Nagamachi, Norimasa Yamasaki, Shinji Suga, Shingo Sasatani, Osamu Kaminuma, Shinya Matsuura Research...Institute...for...Radiation...Biology...and...Medicine,...Hiroshima...University Survey on the animal experiments under the management of the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare Akira Ushiyama1 , Tadashi Okamura2 , Hideki Tsumura3 , Atsuya Takagi4 , Kyoko Shioya5 , Noboru Ogiso6 , Tadashi Sankai7 1 National...Institute...of...Public...Health,...2 National...Center...for...Global...Health...and...Medicine,...3 National...Center...for...Child... Health...and...Development,...4 National...Institute...of...Health...Sciences,...5 National...Cerebral...and...Cardiovascular...Center,... 6 National...Center...for...Geriatrics...and...Gerontology,...7 Institutes...of...Biomedical...Innovation,...Health...and...Nutrition P-11 P-12 --S 83-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 83 69...... Background Duchenne... muscular... dystrophy... (DMD)... treatment... guidelines... recommend... the... use... of... ACE... inhibitors... or... -blockers...when...reduced...LV...function...is...detected...by... echocardiography,...to...treat...tachycardia...which...contributes... to... disease... progression.... However,... pathological... abnormalities...observed...before...the...start...of...LV...function... reduction...suggest...the...need...of...therapeutic...intervention... from...an...earlier...stage....Moreover,...as...DMD...patients...tend...to... have...hypotension,...new...medications...that...do...not...affect... blood...pressure...are...needed. Methods 1)...Heart...rate...variability...analyses,...echocardiography,...and... myocardial...pathological...examinations...were...performed...on... 5-week-old... DMD... model... rats... (W-Dmdem1Kykn,... DMDRs)... generated...by...CRISPR/Cas9...and...wild-type...rats. 2)...Ivabradine...(sinus...node...If...inhibitor...that...decreases...heart... rate...without...lowering...blood...pressure)...or...carvedilol...(-... blocker)...was...administered...to...DMDRs...and...blood...pressure... was...measured...using...the...tail-cuff...method....Heart...rate...and... SpO2...were...analyzed...using...our...novel...wearable...devices. 3)...Ivabradine...administration...to...DMDRs...was...repeated...for... 12...weeks...from...5-weeks-old...and...cardiac...function...was... evaluated. Results 1)...DMDRs...showed...increased...heart...rate,...increased...LF/ HF...ratio...and...cardiomyocyte...degeneration/necrosis...but... no...reduction...in...LV...function. 2)...Ivabradine...decreased...heart...rate...but...did...not...affect... blood...pressure...or...SpO2....Carvedilol...decreased...heart...rate,... blood...pressure...and...SpO2. 3)...Ivabradine...suppressed...the...deterioration...of...cardiac... function. Conclusion Sympathetic...dominance...causes...tachycardia...in...DMD...via...a... different...mechanism...from...the...compensatory...response... that... follows... cardiac... function... reduction.... Ivabradine... administration...from...an...early...age...has...the...potential...to... suppress...cardiomyopathy...progression...while...maintaining... peripheral...circulation...and...blood...pressure. Propolis... is... a... nature... resinous... mixture... produced... by... honeybees... that... exhibit... a... wide... range... of... biological... functions....Our...research...group...conducted...a...study...about... propolis...derived...from...Philippine...endemic...stingless...bee,... Tetragonula biroi Friese,...as...an...international...collaborative... work...between...Univ....Tokyo...and...UPLB,...and...presented... hair... growth... stimulating... activities... of... propolis... in... the... previous...annual...meeting....In...this...study,...we...evaluated...the... effect...of...99.5%...ethanol-elucidated...crude...propolis...(EEP)...on... damaged...hair...follicles...(HFs)...using...chemotherapy-induced... alopecia...model. To...develop...chemotherapy-induced...alopecia...in...C57BL/6N... mice,...cyclophosphamide...(150mg/kg...body...weight)...was... intraperitoneally...administrated...9...days...post...depilation...(pd)... using...hair...removal...cream....EEP...or...ethanol...were...everyday... applied...respectively...onto...the...dorsal...skin...surface...of...the... mice...starting...at...day...2...pd....Hair...loss...was...not...protected...by... EEP... treatment,... and... length... of... revival... hair... was... comparable...between...EEP...and...control...mice....However,...we... found...number...of...HFs...was...significantly...increased...in...EEP... treated...skin,...indicating...that...propolis...has...a...mild...effect...on... the...restoration...process...of...damaged...HFs...as...a...side...effect... of... chemotherapy.... Now,... we... try... identifying... active... components...in...the...propolis. Desamero1,3,4 , Eerdunfu1 , Mun Keong Kok5 , James Kenn Chambers5 , Kazuyuki Uchida5 , Hiroyuki Nakayama5 , Yuri Kominami6 , Hideki Ushio6 , Cleofas R. Cervancia4,7 , Maria Amelita C. Estacio3,4 , Shigeru Kyuwa1,8 , Shigeru Kakuta1 1 Lab...Biomed...Sci,...Grad...Sch...Agri...Life...Sci...(GSALS),...Univ...Tokyo,...2 Dept...Anim...Res...Sci,...GSALS,...Univ...Tokyo,...... 3 Dept...Basic...Vet...Sci,...Col...Vet...Med,...Univ...Philippines...Los...Banos...(UPLB),...4 UPLB...Bee...Program,... 5 Lab...Vet...Pathol,...GSALS,...Univ...Tokyo,...6 Lab...Marine...Biochem,...GSALS,...Univ...Tokyo,... 7 Inst...Biol...Sci,...Col...Arts...Sci,...UPLB,...8 Res...Cntr...Food...Safety,...GSALS,...Univ...Tokyo P-14 P-13 --S 84-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 84 69...... In...Japan,...the...avian...reproductive...toxicity...test...(OECD...Test... Guideline...206)...is...conducted...when...evaluating...the...safety...of... persistent... and...accumulative... chemical...substances... for... higher...predators...under...Chemical...Substances...Control... Law....However,...this...test...method...has...been...pointed...out...to... have... issues... such... as... high... cost,... reproducibility,... the... refinement...of...endpoints,...and...the...recent...global...trend...of... reducing...animal...testing...to...avoid...unreasonable...animal... testing.... We... are... developing... a... test... method... for... administering...chemical...substances...into...eggs...(in ovo...test... method),...taking...advantage...of...the...characteristic...of...birds... to...lay...eggs,...which...is...not...the...case...with...mammals....In...this... study,... the... morphogenesis... and... sexual-differentiation- related...gene...expression...of...reproductive...organs...and...blood... sex... steroid... hormone... levels... in... quail... embryos... were... analyzed...to...obtain...the...background...data...for...assessing... avian...reproductive...toxicity....The...morphology...of...gonads... (ovaries...and...testes)...and...internal...genital...organs...(Mullerian... and...Wolffian...ducts)...of...quail...embryos...at...9,...12...and...15...days... of...incubation...were...observed....Estradiol...and...androgen... levels...in...blood...were...measured...by...ELISA....The...expression... levels...of...sexual-differentiation-related...genes...(estrogen... receptors,...androgen...receptor,...steroidogenic...enzymes,... anti-Mullerian...hormone,... and... anti-Mullerian...hormone... receptor)... in... the... gonads... and... internal... genitalia... were... measured...by...real-time...qPCR....As...a...result,...blood...estradiol... level...was...higher...in...female...quail...embryos...than...in...male... quail...embryos,...but...no...sex...difference...in...androgens...was... found....Morphology...of...the...gonads...and...internal...genitalia... differed...between...sexes,...which...may...be...due...to...the...sex... difference...in...blood...estradiol....Furthermore,...sex...differences... and...left-right...differences...in...estrogen...receptor...expression... of...the...gonads...and...internal...genitalia...and...in...aromatase... expression...of...the...gonads...were...found....The...morphology... and...gene...expression...of...the...internal...reproductive...organs... and...blood...sex...steroids...may...be...endpoints...for...evaluating... avian... reproductive... and... developmental... toxicity... of... chemicals. In...our...previous...study,...we...identified...neuronal...leucine-rich... repeat...1...(NLRR1)...as...a...positive...regulator...of...EGF...and...IGF- 1...signals...in...MYCN-amplified...neuroblastoma...cells....Our... study...has...also...demonstrated...that...NLRR1...is...upregulated... in...various...adult...cancers...and...acts...as...a...key...regulator...of... tumor...cell...proliferation....To...examine...its...physiological... function... in... cell... proliferation,... we... generated... NLRR1- deficient...mice...and...found...that...the...deletion...of...Nlrr1...gene... resulted... in... approximately... 18%... less... body... weight... at... weaning...than...control...littermates,...suggesting...its...role...in... regulating...cell...proliferation....In...the...extracellular...domains... of... NLRR1,... fibronectin... type... III... (FNIII)... domain... was... responsible...for...its...function...to...promote...cell...proliferation.... We... generated... monoclonal... antibodies... against... the... extracellular...domains...of...NLRR1...(N1mAb)...and...screened... the...positive...N1mAbs...for...growth...inhibitory...effect....The... treatment...of...N1mAbs...reduced...tumor...cell...proliferation...in... vitro...and...in...vivo....These...data...suggest...that...NLRR1...is...a... candidate...therapeutic...target...to...develop...new...anticancer... drugs...in...NLRR1...expressing...cancers. C1q/TNF-related...protein...(CTRP)...including...CTRP3...have... a...complement...C1q-like...domain,...and...play...multiple...roles...in... lipid...metabolism,...bone...metabolism...and...immune...response.... Previously,...we...showed...that...the...mRNA...expression...of... CTRP3...is...highly...augmented...in...joints...of...autoimmune... arthritis... models... and... CTRP3-deficiency... exacerbates... collagen-induced... arthritis... in... mice.... However,... the... mechanisms...how...CTRP3...regulates...immune...response...still... remain...to...be...elucidated....In...this...study,...we...showed...that... CTRP3...was...highly...expressed...in...IL-17-producing...helper...T... (Th17)... cell,... a... key... player... for... the... development... of... autoimmune...diseases,...and...Th17...cell...differentiation...was... augmented... in... CTRP3... deficient... mice.... Th17... cell... differentiation... was... suppressed... by... CTRP3... and... this... suppression... was... abolished... by... the... treatment... with... a... receptor...antagonist...against...AdipoR2,...but...not...AdipoR1.... The... development... of... multiple... sclerosis-model,... experimental... autoimmune... encephalomyelitis... was... enhanced... in... CTRP3... deficient... mice... associated... with... increase...of...Th17...cell...population....CTRP3...inhibited...antigen- induced...IL-17...production...from...T...cells...by...affecting...both...T... cells...and...dendritic...cells....These...results...show...that...CTRP3... is... an... endogenous... regulator... of... Th17... differentiation,... suggesting...that...the...CTRP3-AdipoR2...axis...is...a...good...target... for...the...treatment...of...Th17...cell-mediated...diseases. Human...immune...system...reconstituted...humanized...mice... are...useful...animal...models...to...study...human...immunology...in... vivo....Human...hematopoietic...stem...cell-transferred...NOG... mice...are...well...recognized...as...a...humanized...immune...system... model...with...reconstitution...of...mature...lymphoid...lineage... cells...such...as...T...and...B...cells....However,...human...myeloid... lineage...cells...including...dendritic...cells...(DCs)...do...not...fully... differentiated...in...the...conventional...NOG...mice....DCs...play...a... crucial... role... in... adoptive... immunity... by... conducting... an... antigen...presentation...to...T...cells...to...acquire...an...antigen... specificity....In...this...study,...we...established...novel...humanized... mouse...with...human...DC...differentiation....To...induce...DCs,...we... generated... human... Fms-like... tyrosine... kinase... 3... ligand... (hFLT3L)... transgenic... NOG... (hFLT3L-Tg)... mice... and... transferred...human...CD34+...hematopoietic...progenitor...cells... (HPC)...into...them....Unexpectedly,...low...frequency...of...human... cell...engraftment...was...observed...in...the...hFLT3L-Tg...mice... after... HPC... reconstitution.... In... the... Tg... mice,... mouse... CD11b+Gr1-...myeloid...cells...were...markedly...expanded...in... the...bone...marrow...due...to...the...cross-reaction...between... hFLT3L...and...mouse...FLT3...receptor,...and...these...myeloid... leukemia-like... cells... probably... inhibited... human... hematopoiesis...in...hFLT3L-Tg...mice....To...avoid...this...cross- reaction,...we...generated...the...NOG-FLT3...receptor...KO...(FLT3... KO)...mice...by...CRISPR/Cas9...and...combined...the...KO...mice... with...hFLT3...Tg...mice...to...create...FLT3...KO/hFLT3L...Tg... mice.... Mouse... CD11b+Gr1-... leukemia-like... cells... were... completely...suppressed...in...FLT3...KO/hFLT3...Tg...mice...due... to...blockade...of...the...FLT3...signals...in...mouse...leukocytes.... After...human...HPC...transplantation,...human...CD45+...cells... were...successfully...engrafted...in...FLT3...KO/hFLT3...Tg... mice.... Furthermore,... major... subsets... of... human... DC... populations,...cDC1,...cDC2,...and...pDC...were...significantly... differentiated...in...Tg...mice....Therefore,...humanized...NOG- FLT3...KO/hFLT3...Tg...mice...are...potentially...valuable...to... investigate... DC-mediated... human... adaptive... immune... responses...in...vivo.... The CTRP3-AdipoR2 axis regulates multiple sclerosis model by suppressing Th17 cell differentiation Masanori A. Murayama1,2 , Hsi-Hua Chi2 , Yoichiro Iwakura2 1 Department...of...Animal...Models...for...Human...Diseases,...Institute...of...Biomedical...Science,...Kansai...Medical...University,... 2 Center...for...Animal...Disease...Models,...Research...Institute...for...Biomedical...Sciences,...Tokyo...University...of...Science Novel humanized immune system mouse model with dendritic cell differentiation Ryoji Ito1,2 , Yunmei Mu1,2 , Yusuke Ohno1 , Motohito Goto1 , Riichi Takahashi1 , Mamoru Ito1 1 Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals,...2 Mayo...Clinic P-17 P-18 --S 86-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 86 69...... Pasteurella pneumotropica...(Pp)...is...known...as...complex...of... multiple... species-level... bacterial... groups.... In... 2017,... the... reclassification...of...Pp...was...announced,...of...which...biotype... Jawetz...was...reclassified...as...Rodentibacter pneumotropicus (Rp)...and...biotype...Heyl...was...reclassified...as...Rodentibacter heylii...(Rh)....For...the...purpose...of...this...study...is...to...investigate... the...diversity...of...isolates...of...Pp...derived...from...mice...and...rats.... For...that...a...retest...was...performed...using...Rp...and...Rh...specific... qPCR....... Two...hundred...sixty...isolates...derived...from...mice...and...96... isolates... derived... from... rats... identified... as... Pp... by... the... conventional... method... were... used.... The... retest... was... performed...in...following...steps;...1....Specific...qPCR...for...Rp...and... Rh,...2....Specific...PCR...for...Rodentibacter ratti...(Rr)...for...the... isolates...that...showed...negative...in...step...1,...3....Sequencing...of... 16S... rRNA... gene... and... developed...specific... PCR... for... the... isolates...that...showed...negative...in...step...1...and...2....The...strains... positive...for...this...PCR...were...classified...as...Unclassified... Pasteurella...(UP)...in...this...study....... The...results...as...follows;...isolates...derived...from...mice,...Rp:... 119,...Rh:...114,...and...UP:...27....Isolates...derived...from...rats,...Rp:...3,... Rh:...7,...Rr:...21,...UP:...27,...and...all...the...retests...were...negative:...38. It...was...clarified...that...the...isolates...identified...as...Pp...derived... from...mice...and...rats...contained...strains...other...than...Rp...and... Rh. In...addition,...it...became...clear...that...most...of...the...rat-derived... Pp... was... other... than... Rp... and... Rh.... Among... the... isolates... derived...from...mice,...all...the...isolates...identified...as...Rp...were... grayish...white,...most...of...the...isolates...identified...as...Rh...were... pale...yellow...colonies,...and...all...of...UP...were...pale...yellow....It... was...also...suggested...that...UP...was...a...uniform...bacterial... group...on...16S...rRNA.... From...these...results,...to...perform...the...test...for...Pp...with...same... accuracy...as...before,...isolates...that...are...not...identified...as...Rp/ Rh...must...also...be...tested. In...the...past,...we...conducted...a...large-scale...sero-survey...of... Filobacterium rodentium... on... the... test... animals... of... our... center....(May-December...2017).... Although...the...sero...positive...rate...was...low,...gross...lesions...(red... spots...in...the...lung...etc.)...were...confirmed...in...61%...(18...out...of... 11)...of...mice...that...were...positive...for...F. rodentium.... Based... on... these... results,... F. rodentium... was... set... as... a... monitoring...enhancement...item.... Since...about...4...years...have...passed...since...the...survey,...we... conducted...a...sero-survey...of...F. rodentium...to...clarify...the... relationship...between...the...epidemic...situation...and...lesions.... The...Survey...were...conducted...on...20,529...mice...sera,...2,892... rats...sera,...230...rabbits...sera,...135...guinea...pigs...sera,...and...26... hamsters...sera...that...were...sampled...from...December...2020...to... November...2021.... The...test...was...performed...by...ELISA...and/or...IFA.... As...a...result,...the...following...serum...samples...were...positive;... mice...4.../...20,529...(0.02%),...rats...4.../...2,892...(0.14%),...rabbits... 0/243...(0%),...guinea...pigs...0/135...(0%),...hamster...0/26...(0)...%).... Of...the...F. rodentium...sero-positive...mice,...only...one...mouse... was...confirmed...to...have...gross...lesions...(liver...changes...in...the... lungs,...pulmonary...involution...failure).... The...sero-positive...rate...of...F.rodentium...in...the...test...sample... investigated...this...time...tended...to...decrease...compared...to... the...previous...survey...(0.17%......0.03%).... The...number...of...mice...with...lung...lesions...confirmed...in...sero- positive...mouse...also...decreased...(61%......25%).... For... this... reason,... F. rodentium... has... been... considering... canceling...the...monitoring...enhancement...items...since...2023.... After... excluding... F.... rodentium... from... the... monitoring... enhancement... item,... F. rodentium... will... be... monitored... irregularly...in...lung...lesion-positive...individuals. Pasteurella pneumotropica contains bacterial groups other than Rodentibacter 2 species, Part 1: qRT-PCR analysis Yurina Tomiyama, Hanako Morita, Masafumi Yamamoto, Mai Tanaka, Nobuhito Hayashimoto ICLAS...Monitoring...Center,...Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals 100 half-width characters Research results of animals not tested for Filobacterium rodentium (CAR bacillus) at Central Institute for Experimental Animals (December 2020-November 2021) Tomoko Ishida1 , Mai Tanaka1 , Hanako Morita1 , Yurina Tomiyama1 , Masahiko Yasuda2 , Nobuhito Hayashimoto 1 ICLAS...Monitoring...Center,...Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals...(CIEA)... 2 Pathology...Center,...Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals...(CIEA) P-19 P-20 --S 87-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 87 69...... The...microbiological...quality...of...laboratory...animals...changes... with...the...times...under...the...influence...of...the...environment... surrounding...the...laboratory...animals....In...the...past,...some... data...on...the...microbial...positive...rate...of...mice...have...been... published...at...academic...conferences...or...as...papers,...but...most... of...them...are...based...on...data...for...a...single...year...or...several... years.... Therefore,... to... understand... the... changes... of... the... microbiological...quality...of...mice...in...the...experimental...animal... facility...of...academia...from...a...macroscopic...point...of...view,...we... investigated...the...microbial...positive...rate...over...the...past...10... years...based...on...our...test...results. Materials... and... MethodsSixteen... items... that... were... positive...multiple...times...(Helicobacter billis,...Helicobacter hepaticas,... mouse... hepatitis... virus,... murine... norovirus,... Mycoplasma purmonis,... Pasteurella pneumotropica,... Pneumocystis murina,... Pseudomonas aeruginosa,... Staphylococcus aureus,...5...species...of...protozoans...and...2... species... of...pinworms)... were... targeted.... The...number... of... survey...facilities...varies...depending...on...the...test...items,...but... the...maximum...was...25,530. Results...and...DiscussionAs...a...result...of...comparing...the... positive...rates...(number...of...positive...facilities/...number...of... testing... facilities)... in... 2011... and... 2020... and... performing... Fisher's...exact...test...for...all...items,...a...significant...decrease...in... the...positive...rates...of...the...following...items...was...confirmed;...H. hepaticus, P. pneumotropica, S. aureus,...MHV,...Murine... Norovirus,...Entamoeba...spp.,...Octomitus...spp.,...Tritrichomonas... spp.,...Aspiculuris...spp....S. aureus...had...the...highest...positive... rate...in...2011...at...21.45%,...but...it...was...15.57%...in...2020....The... next...highest...was...murine...norovirus,...with...a...positive...rate... of...9.38%...in...2011...and...3.33%...in...2020....On...the...other...hand,... the...positive...rate...increased...slightly...in...M. pulmonis...and...P. aeruginosa,...which...had...relatively...low...positive...rates...in... 2011....These...results...indicate...that...the...microbial...positive... rate...of...mice...in...the...animal...facilities...of...academia...has...been... declining...overall...in...the...last...10...years,...and...the...microbial... items...whose...positive...rate...has...remained...relatively...low... are...not...eradicated...from...animal...facilities. Pasteurella pneumotropica... (Pp),... which... can... cause... respiratory...infections...in...immunocompromised...animals,...is... a...single...species,...but...is...known...to...be...a...complex...consisting... of...multiple...bacterial...groups,...including...two...biotypes....In... 2017,... among... Pp... biotype... Jawetz... and... Heyl... were... reclassified... as... Rodentibacter pneumotropicus... (Rp),... Rodentibacter heylii...(Rh)....Our...research...revealed...that...the... strains...identified...as...Pp...were...found...to...include...Rp,...Rh...and... other...strains...as...Unclassified...Pasteurella...(UP). Therefore,...to...investigate...from...various...aspects...whether... UP... is... a... bacterial... group... different... from... Rp... and... Rh,... Phylogenetic...tree...analysis...based...on...spectral...data...of... carbohydrates...was...performed...by...using...novel...bacterial... typing...device,...IR-Biotyper....We...used...100...isolates...(from...73... facilities)... derived... from... mice... identified... as... Pp... by... the... traditional...methods....All...isolates...were...confirmed...for...Rp... and...Rh...using...qRT-PCR....The...UP-specific...primer...was... developed...in...this...study...and...all...isolates...were...confirmed... for...UP...using...PCR...also....Furthermore,...all...isolates...were... tested...using...MALIDI...Biotyper...(MALDI...TOF-MS). Of...the...100...isolates,...Rp...was...49...isolates,...Rh...was...37...isolates,... and...UP...was...14...isolates....In...the...phylogenetic...tree...analysis,... it...was...roughly...divided...into...three...clusters....The...first... cluster...included...Rp...47...isolates...and...Rh...5...isolates....The... second...cluster...included...Rh...14...isolates....The...third...cluster... included...Rp...2...isolates,...Rh...18...isolates...and...UP...14...isolates.... All...UP...isolates...were...contained...in...the...cluster...mainly... composed...of...Rh....The...results...of...MALDI...Biotyper...are...as... follows,...identified...as...Rp:...43...isolates,...identified...as...Rh:...19... isolates,... Rodentibacter... genus... level... identification:... 29... isolates,...Rodentibacter...related...bacteria...level...identification:... 9...isolates....In...the...UP...group,...Rp...was...the...highest...score...in... all...isolates,...and...it...was...not...possible...to...clearly...distinguish... it...from...Rp....From...these...results,...to...perform...the...test...for...Pp... with... same... accuracy... as... before,... isolates... that... are... not... identified... as... Rp/Rh... must... also... be... tested.... Further... investigation...is...necessary...for...this...UP. Human... red... blood... cells... (RBCs)... engrafted... humanized... mouse...is...expected...to...be...a...malaria...infectious...model...for... vaccine... development... and... drug... discovery... research.... However,...the...conventional...NOG...mice...are...unsuitable... model... for... human... RBCs... engraftment... because... erythrophagocytosis... mechanisms... mediated... by... macrophages,...neutrophils,...and...etc....may...be...elicited...in...the... xenogenic...environment....In...this...study,...we...attempted...to... identify...the...mouse...cells...responsible...for...human...RBCs... elimination...and...generated...a...new...transgenic...NOG...mouse... in...which...human...RBCs...can...be...engrafted...for...a...long-term... in vivo. To...examine...the...localization...of...erythrophagocytosis...in... NOG...mice,...we...transferred...XenoLight...DiR...labeled...human... RBCs...and...analyzed...the...DiR...fluorescence...using...IVIS... imaging...system....The...strong...fluorescence...was...observed... in...lung,...liver,...and...spleen,...but...not...in...other...organs...of...DiR- labeled...human...RBC-transferred...NOG...mice....Moreover,... flow... cytometric... analysis... showed... that... the... CD68+ ... macrophages...highly...incorporated...DiR+ ...human...RBCs...in... these... tissues.... These... results... suggest... that... the... CD68+ ... macrophages...are...responsible...for...erythrophagocytosis...in... the... human... RBC-transferred... NOG... mice.... Next,... we... generated...thymidine...kinase...(TK)...expressed...transgenic... NOG...mice...under...control...of...the...human...CD68...promoter... (NOG...pCD68-TK...Tg)...in...which...CD68+ ...macrophages...are... specifically... depleted... by... ad... libitum... access... of... Valgancicrovir...(VGCV)...in...drinking...water....We...found...that... the...CD68+...macrophages...were...significantly...depleted...after... VGCV...administration....In...these...macrophage-depleted... mice,...human...RBCs...were...successfully...engrafted...over...2... weeks,... although... it... is... no... longer... than... a... few... days... in... conventional...NOG...mice....Taken...together,...these...results... demonstrated...that...the...depletion...of...CD68+ ...macrophages...is... required...for...the...long-term...maintenance...of...human...RBCs,... and... the... NOG... pCD68-TK... Tg... mouse... is... a... useful... experimental...animal...to...study...pathophysiological...role...in... CD68+ ...macrophages...in vivo. Recent...advances...in...cancer...immunotherapy...have...shown... that...immune...checkpoint...inhibition...increases...the...anti- tumour...activity...of...immune...cells....However,...this...strategy... can...result...in...the...development...of...autoimmune...diseases.... Here,...we...established...a...small...molecule-assisted...shutoff... (SMASh)... degron... system... that... can... degrade... the... programmed-cell...death-1...protein...(PD-1)...in...cultured...cells... and... mice...upon...drug...administration....SMASh...degron- tagged... PD-1-mCherry... in... Jurkat... cells... and... CD3+... splenocytes...was...degraded...by...NS3/4A...protease...inhibitors,... asunaprevir...(ASV)...or...grazoprevir...(GRV)....Growth...of...MC- 38... colon... adenocarcinoma... cells... injected... in Pdcd1- mCherry-SMASh...homozygous...knock-in...(KI)...mice...was... repressed...by...ASV...or...GRV....Moreover,...growth...of...MC-38... cells...was...also...suppressed...in...wild-type...mice...transplanted... with...KI...bone...marrow...cells...after...GRV...treatment....This...is... the... first... study... to... use... a... degron... tag... targeting... an... endogenous...mouse...protein...and...propose...the...use...of...this... approach...for...the...treatment...of...diseases.... Development of a humanized mouse model for long-term engraftment of human red blood cells Yusuke Ohno, Yunmei Mu, Misa Mochizuki, Kenji Kawai, Motohito Goto, Riichi Takahashi, Mamoru Ito, Ryoji Ito Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals A degron system targeting endogenous PD-1 inhibits the growth of tumor cells in mice Chie Naruse1 , Kazushi Sugihara1 , Pan Xuchi1 , Tatsuhiko Miyazaki2 , Fumihiro Sugiyama3 , Masahide Asano1 1 Lab....Anim.,...Grad....Med....Kyoto...Univ.,...2 Dep....Pathol....Gifu...Univ....Hosp.,...3 Lab....Anim....Resource,...Univ....Tsukuba P-23 P-24 --S 89-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 89 69...... Aims)... It... is... possible... to... obtain... hybridomas... secreting... human...IgG...by...using...human...peripheral...blood...mononuclear... cells...(PBMC),...the...yield...is...very...low....Because...human...B... cells...can...be...effectively...engrafted...in...hu-PBL...hIL-4...NOG... mice,... the... yield... of... antigen-specific... IgG-producing... hybridoma...might...increase...by...using...the...humanized...mouse... system....Therefore,...we...tried...to...evaluate...the...efficiency...of... specific...clone...yield...of...hu-PBL...hIL-4...NOG...mice. Materials...and...Methods)...PBMC...was...obtained...and...the... fused...with...P3-X63-U1P...by...electrofusion....Hybridomas... were...screened...for...human...IgGs...and...specific...IgGs...against... CH401MAP,...a...multiple...peptide...antigen...of...HER2,...a...breast... cancer...antigen...subpeptide,...by...ELISA.... PBL-NOG-hIL-4-Tg... mice... were... immunize... with... CH401MAP...emulsified...with...Freund's...ajuvant....After...2... weeks,...the...mice...were...boosted...with...the...same...antigen...and... after...4...weeks,...mice...were...sacrificed...and...the...spleen...cells... were...fused...with...P3-X63-U1P...by...electrofusion....The...IgG... secreting... hybridoma... and... specific... antibody-secreting... hybridoma... were... screened... by... ELISA.... The... antigen... specificity... was... evaluated... by... the... 3rd ... party... antigen,... BAL6MAP. Results...and...Discussion)...The...yield...of...the...CH401MAP- specific...clones...was...low...(4.7%)....On...the...other...hand,...hu-PBL... hIL-4...NOG...mice...immunized...with...CH401MAP...increased... the...plasma...anti-CH401MAP...antibody...titer...compared...to... the...control...mice....Moreover,...most...of...the...spleen...B...cells... were... plasmablast-like... cells.... The... hybridoma... yield... secreting... CH401MAP-specific... IgG... was... significantly... higher... (26.4%)... than... PBMC-derived... clone... yield.... Low... crossreactivity...against...BAL6MAP...was...observed,...but... only...antigen-specific...clones...were...also...detected.... Collectively,...hu-PBL...hIL-4...NOG...mice...is...a...promising...tool... to... effectively... produce... antigen-specific... human... IgG... secreting...clones....It...also...may...be...used...for...personalized... medicine,...because...it...can...reconstruct...individual...immune... environment...in...the...mouse.... Activated... T... cells... express... programmed-death... 1... and... interact...with...PD-L1...expressed...on...tumor...cells,...which... induce...T...cell...exhaustion....However,...by...adding...Nivolumab,... a...humanized...antibody...against...PD-1,...it...binds...to...PD-1... molecule...and...inhibits...PD-1/PD-L1...interaction...and...T...cell... exhaustion.... Similarly,... Atezolizumab,... a... humanized... antibody...against...PD-L1...avoids...PD-1/PD-L1...interaction... and... T... cell... exhaustion.... However,... the... effects... of... both... antibodies...are...reported...to...be...different....Because...there...are... no...good...in...vivo...system,...the...difference...of...the...function...of... these...antibodies...are...not...clear....We...established...human... immune...environment...using...hu-PBL...hIL-4...NOG...mice...and... tried...to...clarify...the...difference...of...functional...difference...of... these...antibodies. Healthy...donor's...blood...was...collected...after...the...informed... consent,...and...peripheral...blood...mononuclear...cells...(PBMCs)... were...prepared...and...transplanted...into...NOG-hIL-4-Tg...mice... intravenously....The...same...day,...HER2...antigen...peptide... CH401MAP... was... immunized... with... Freund's... complete... adjuvant....Two...weeks...after...the...immunization,...booster... was...conducted...with...Freund's...incomplete...adjuvant....Mice... were...sacrificed...after...4...weeks...and...PBMCs,...spleens,...bone... marrows,... lungs,... livers,... and... kidneys... were... removed.... Leukocytes...of...PBMCs,...spleens...and...bone...marrows...were... analyzed...by...flow...cytometry,...and...the...leukocytes...of...lung,... liver...and...kidneys...were...analyzed...by...immunohistochemistry.... As...a...result,...the...number...of...spleen...cells...was...significantly... lower...than...control...in...the...Atezolizumab-administered... mice...while...the...decrease...is...not...observed...in...Nivolumab- administered... mice.... T... cells... expressed... PD-1... in... Atezolizumab-administered...mice,...while...the...expression... was... significantly... decreased... in... the... Nivolumab- administered...mice.... These...results...suggest...that...the...functional...difference...of... immune...checkpoint...antibodies...can...be...detected...by...the... system...we...developed...using...NOG-hIL-4-Tg...transplanted... with...human...PBMC....It...might...become...aneffective...tool...for... personalized...medicine. Analysis of antigen-specific antibody-secreting clone using humanized hu-PBL hIL-4 NOG mice Shino Ohshima, Souga Yamada, Nagi Katano, Mao Suzuki, Yoshie Kametani Department...of...Molecular...Life...Science,...Tokai...University...School...of...Medicine,...Isehara,...Japan Evaluation of immune check point antibodies using humanized mouse Nagi Katano1 , Daisuke Kirigaya1 , Soga Yamada1 , Shino Ohshima1 , Toshiro Seki2 , Yoshie Kametani1 1 Department...of...molecular...life...science,...2 Department...of...Nephrology,...Endochrinology...and...Metabolism,... Tokai...University...School...of...Medicine,...Isehara,...Japan P-25 P-26 --S 90-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 90 69...... Filobacterium rodentium... is... a... Gram-stain-negative... filamentous...rod...that...causes...chronic...respiratory...disease...in... rodents...(Ike...et al....IJSEM,...2016)....Recently,...reports...using... 16S... rRNA... gene... metagenomic... analyses... showed... a... considerable...number...of...Filobacterium...spp....were...found...in... soil,...riparian...animals,...and...domestic...cattle....According...to... these... reports,... Filobacterium... spp.... are... so-called... environmental...bacteria,...and...it...was...interpreted...that...they... constitute...a...commensal...community...in...animals....Last...year,... we...published...that...Filobacterium...sp....(tentatively...F. felis) is...involved...in...chronic...bronchitis...in...cats...(Naeradska...et al. PLOS...ONE,...2021)....In...this...paper,...although...we...did...not... isolate...F. felis...from...cats,...we...found...that...the...Filobacterium... sp....comprised...a...finite...part...of...the...normal...feline...lower... respiratory...microbiome....Under...certain...circumstances,... this...bacterium...increased...in...abundance...and...gave...rise...to... bronchopneumonia.... Thus... we... concluded... that... this... causative...agent...belonged...to...a...novel...species...in...the...genus... Filobacterium...based...on...the...16S...rRNA...sequence....Isolation... and...pure...culture...of...Filobacterium...spp....is...a...challenging... issue,... and... there... are... few... reports... to... confirm... their... pathogenicity...using...isolates...of...Filobacterium...spp....other... than... F. rodentium.... When... we... sequenced... the... whole... genome...of...the...type...strain...of...F. rodentium,...SMR-CT ,...we... did...not...find...any...previously...reported...genes...involved...in... virulence...in...the...genome....However,...it...was...inferred...that... the... type... 9... secretion... system... (T9SS)... gene... cluster... (in... charge...of...the...gliding...motility...of...this...organism)...might... affect...the...host...pathogenicity....This...presentation...aims...to... summarize...what...we...know...so...far...about...Filobacterium... spp....with...the...latest...findings...and...identify...what...needs...to... be...clarified...in...the...future...and...share...it...with...our...society... members. Helicobacter mastomyrinus is...frequently...detected...among... Helicobacter...species...in...laboratory...mice...kept...in...Japan.... However,...a...few...reports...described...the...pathogenicity...of... the...species...in...mice...are...found....In...this...study,...we...isolated...H. mastomyrinus...from...laboratory...mice...and...investigated... their...characteristics...including...the...pathogenicity...in...C.B-17... SCID...male...mice. The...isolates...formed...curved...or...spiral...shape...with...bipolar... sheathed...flagella,...and...the...size...was...0.2-0.35...m...width...and... 1.5-3.5...m...length....By...sequence...analysis,...1740...bp...of...16S... rRNA...genes...from...3...isolates...were...determined,...which... contained... an... intervening... sequence... and... had... 99.7... %... similarity...with...the...type...strain...of...H. mastomyrinus....All... isolates... had... oxidase,... catalase,... and... urease... activity,... although...some...of...characteristics...differed...from...the...type... strains...such...as...alkaline...phosphatase...activity....In...SCID... mice,... the... body... weight... and... length... of... colon... were... significantly... reduced... at... 24... weeks... post... infection... comparing...with...the...uninfected...control...mice....The...cecum... and... colon... of... some... infected... mice... showed... severely... thickened...walls...and...the...contents...of...which...were...watery.... Histological... analysis... evaluated... that... the... marked... infiltrations...of...granulocytes...and...hyperplasia...of...epithelial... cells...were...observed...in...mucosa...of...cecum...and...colon...of... infected... mice.... In... addition,... the... bacterial... genes... were... detected...in...liver...tissues...of...infected...mice,...accompanying... the...infiltrations...of...granulocytes....The...expressions...of...IL-6,... TNF,...and...IFN...mRNA...increased...along...with...IL-22... mRNA...expression...in...lamina...propria...cells...of...cecum...and... colon...from...infected...mice,...while...IL-10...and...TGF...mRNA... expressions...increased...in...splenocytes. H. mastomyrinus...isolates...infection...in...SCID...mice...induced... sever...inflammation...in...the...mucosa...of...large...intestines,...and... the...bacteria...translocated...into...the...liver...tissue...resulted...in... the...induction...of...hepatitis....These...results...indicates...that...H. mastomyrinus... has... a... potent... pathogenicity... in... immunocompromised...mice.... UVC...is...electromagnetic...radiation...at...wavelengths...of...200... to...280...nm....254...nm-UVC...induces...mutagenic...DNA...lesions... such... as... cyclobutane... pyrimidine... dimers... (CPD)... in... pathogens...and...elicits...germicidal...activity....However,...254... nm-UVC...induces...CPD...in...human...cells...as...well...and...leads...to... the...initiation...of...skin...cancer....It...was...reported...that...222...nm- UVC...elicits...the...same...levels...of...germicidal...activity...as...254... nm-UVC...and...is...harmless...to...human...skin...because...222-nm... UVC...is...absorbed...in...the...stratum...corneum...layer...before... reaching... nuclei... within... the... epidermal...cells.... Krypton- chloride...(KrCl)...excimer...lamp...principally...emits...222...nm- UVC.... However,... the... lamp... also... emits... UVC... at... longer... wavelength...than...222...nm...and...UVB...which...cause...CPD...in... keratinocyte....Bandpass...filter...equipped...to...KrCl...excimer... lamp...has...been...reported...to...reduce...the...harmful...effect...of... the...UVC...by...skin...model....However,...the...effectiveness...of... bandpass...filter...has...not...been...demonstrated...by...animal... experiments....In...this...study,...mice...were...irradiated...with... UVC...emitted...from...KrCl...excimer...lamp...with...or...without... bandpass... filter.... CPD-positive... cells... were... induced... by... irradiation...of...UVC...emitted...from...unfiltered...KrCl...lump...at... doses...of...50,...150...and...300...mJ/cm2 ,...whereas...UVC...emitted... from...filtered...lump...did...not...increase...CPD-positive...cells...in... epidermis.... In...this...study,...it...is...demonstrated... that...the... bandpass...filter...plays...a...critical...role...reducing...harmful... effect... of... the... emission... outside... of... 222... nm... to... mouse... keratinocytes,...and...suggested...that...222-nm...UVC...emitting... devices... with... bandpass... filter... are... potential... tool... to... inactivate...pathogens...in...the...residential...setting...and...animal... breeding...room. In...natural...environment,...including...gastrointestinal...tract,... bacteria...colonize...through...biofilm...formation....Previously,... we...established...a...mutant...strain...of...Escherichia coli...with... enhanced...biofilm...formation...ability...(adhesion-enhanced...E. coli...strains;...AEEs)...in...the...intestinal...tract...of...mice...(The...68th ... Annual... Meeting).... However,... the... reproducibility... of... colonization...dynamics...was...insufficient...when...carbenicillin... (Cb)...was...used...as...antibiotics....In...this...study...we...investigated... the...optimal...conditions...of...antibiotics...for...stable...colonization. Plasmids...encoding...the...autoluminescent...luciferase...genes... and...antibiotics...resistance...genes...were...introduced...into... AEEs...for...visualization...and...monitoring....Antibiotics...were... administered... to... ICR... mice... by... free... drinking... water... containing...Cb...or...kanamycin...(Km),...and...several...conditions,... including...antibiotics...concentration...and...starting...time... before...inoculation,...were...tested....The...intestinal...colonization... of...AEEs...was...evaluated...by...measuring...luminescence...in... feces,...or...in vivo...imaging...using...Ami...HTX....Administration... of... Km,... rather... than... Cb,... was... more... stable... in... the... colonization...of...AEEs....In...the...highest...condition...(Km...5...g/L),... colonization...level...was...comparable...between...AEEs...and... control...E. coli...1...week...after...inoculation....On...the...other... hand,...in...the...middle...condition...(Km...3...g/L),...the...AEEs... showed...clearly...higher...colonization...than...the...control...E. coli throughout...the...experiment....However,...in...lower...Km... conditions,...stable...colonization...was...not...maintained....These... results...suggest...that...interaction...with...indigenous...bacteria... in...the...intestinal...tract...strongly...affects...stability...of...AEEs. Proteolytic...cleavage...of...the...hemagglutinin...(HA)...protein...is... essential...for...influenza...A...virus...(IAV)...to...acquire...infectivity.... This...process...is...mediated...by...a...host...cell...protease(s)...in... vivo....We...have...demonstrated...that...TMPRSS2,...expressed... in...the...airway...and...lung,...is...critically...important...for...HA... cleavage...of...seasonal...IAVs...(H1N1,...H3N2)...in...vivo...(J...Virol.... 88:5608-16....2014)....On...the...other...hand,...in...the...seasonal...H3N2... IAV... infection,... we... found... that... serial... passaging... of... TMPRSS2...knockout...mice...resulted...in...the...emergence...of...a... mutant...virus...that...acquired...cleavability...by...an...alternative... HA...activation...mechanism/protease(s)....(J...Virol....89:5154-8.... 2015).... In...this...study,...we...investigated...the...temporal...analysis...of... viral... mutations... associated... with... serial... passaging... of... influenza...A...virus...in...TMPRSS2...knockout...mice. From...KOpass0...to...KOpass20,...no...mutations...were...observed... in...the...NA...gene...sequence,...but...two...viral...mutations...were... observed...in...the...HA...gene....First,...the...HA_N24K...mutation... began...to...be...introduced...at...KOpass2...and...was...completely... replaced... by... KOpass4.... The... HA_N24K... mutation... was... involved...in...the...loss...of...an...oligosaccharide...in...the...HA...stalk... region... and... was... thought... to... allow... physical... access... of... protease(s)...other...than...TMPRSS2...to...the...HA...cleavage...site.... Second,...the...HA...mutation...at...the...HA...cleavage...site...began... to...be...introduced...at...KOpass12...and...was...entirely...replaced... by...KOpass13....The...mutation...at...the...HA...cleavage...site...had... a...characteristic...sequence...with...two...consecutive...basic... amino...acids....Unlike...KOpass0,...KOpass20...which...had...these... two...mutations...had...an...ability...to...form...plaque...in...MDCK...in... the...absence...of...trypsin.... These... temporal... analyses... of... viral... mutations... results... provide...a...new...mechanism...for...the...acquisition...of...protease... utilization. Viral...pneumonia...associated...with...Influenza...A...virus...(IAV)... infection...can...be...divided...into...primary...viral...pneumonia... caused... by... the... virus... itself... and... secondary... infectious... pneumonia...involving...bacterial...infection....About...primary... viral...pneumonia,...we...have...demonstrated...that...a...type...II... transmembrane...serine...protease,...TMPRSS2,...expressed...in... the... airway... and... lung,... is... critically... important... for... HA... cleavage...of...IAVs...(H1N1,...H3N2)...in...vivo...(J...Virol....88:5608- 16....2014)....On...the...other...hand,...the...detailed...pathogenesis...of... secondary...infectious...pneumonia,...which...accounts...for...the... majority... of... deaths,... remains... unclear,... although... the... involvement...of...viral...and...bacterial...synergism...has...been... suggested....We...consider...that...the...main...reason...for...this...is... that...an...appropriate...bacterial...infection...model...has...not...been... established...yet,...although...viral...infection...models...have...been... established...in...mice...that...can...be...genetically...engineered....In... this... presentation,... we... attempted... to... establish... mice... infection...model...for...Streptococcus...pneumoniae.... In...this...study,...we...established...mice...infection...model...for... Streptococcus...pneumoniae...using...inbred...strain...of...ICR... mice.,...and...TMPRSS2...gene-deficient...inbred...strains...of...ICR... mice.... In... order... to... analyze... the... pathogenesis... of... secondary... pneumonia,...we...will...conduct...a...mixed...infection...of...virus... and...Streptococcus...pneumoniae...and...focus...on...the...viral... activation...by...bacterial...proteases.
