Anim....70(2),...161-168,...2021,...Tosa...N....et...al.,...For...mice:...J....Am.... Assoc....Lab....Anim....Sci....58(6),...790-796,...2019,...Tosa...N....et...al.).... The...recombinant...NP...of...Hantavirus...was...used...as...antigen.... The...other...antigens...and...antibody-positive...serum...against... HFRS... (Hantavirus),... HVJ... (Sendai... virus),... Tyzzer... (Clostridium piliforme),...SDAV...(Sialodacryoadenitis...virus),... and... mouse... hepatitis... virus... (MHV)... were... provided... by... ICLAS...Monitoring...Center....Colloidal...Gold...WRGH2...(Wine... red...Chemicals)...with...rabbit...anti-rat...IgG...protein...(SIGMA)... or...protein...A...were...used....The...multiplex...ICG...sticks...were... stored...in...a...vacuum...or...non-vacuum...state...with...or...without... antioxidants...or...desiccants...at...room...temperature,...4...,...or... -30.... [Results] The...ICG...sticks...stored...at...-30......showed...a...clear... control...and...test...lines...even...after...six...months...of...storage.... The... ICG... sticks... stored... at... room... temperature... with... antioxidants...exhibited...thin...band...but...those...stored...at... -30......showed...clear...band....No...effects...of...vacuum...and... desiccants...were...observed...except...for...the...inhibitory...effect... of... antioxidants... on... the... decrease... in... sensitivity.... No... nonspecific... reaction... was... observed... in...any... of...storage... conditions.... [Discussion] These...results...suggest...that...storage...of...ICG... sticks...at...-30......able...to...maintain...the...sensitivity...of...the... multiplex... ICG... tests... with... or... without... antioxidants,... desiccants,...and...vacuum...state. CD28-mediated...costimulation...is...critical...for...the...activation... of... T... cells.... CD28... has... no... enzymatic... activity... in... the... intracellular...domain...but...contains...four...tyrosine...residues... and...several...functional...motifs,...such...as...a...YMNM...motif...and... two...PxxP...motifs,...which...recruit...several...adaptor...proteins... and...activate...PI3K,...MAPK,...NF-kB,...and...mTOR...signaling... pathways....Most...inhibitors...of...signaling...pathway...inhibit...T... cell...activation...and...proliferation....However,...we...found...that... several... signaling... inhibitors... not... only... inhibit... but... also... augment... CD28-mediated... proliferation... of... T... cells... depending...on...the...concentration...of...the...inhibitor...in...the... PMA...plus...anti-CD28...mAb...stimulatory...condition....In...this... study,... we... report... the... phenotype... of... T... cells... when... a... signaling... inhibitor... is... added... to... the... above... T... cell... stimulatory...conditions....And...we...would...like...to...discuss...how... one... inhibitor... both... inhibits... and... enhances... T... cell... proliferation...depending...on...the...concentration. Recent...analyses...using...next-generation...sequencers...have... revealed... that... mutations... in... various... genes... cause... neurodevelopmental... disorders... including... intellectual... disabilities...and...autism...spectrum...disorders....To...understand... the...symptoms...of...these...disorders,...studies...using...model... mice...are...effective....However,...when...using...heterozygous... dominant... mutant... models,... problems... may... arise... in... maintaining...the...models....In...order...to...maintain...the...model... mice,...the...model...mice...themselves...need...to...be...crossed...with... wild-type...mice,...but...maintenance...may...be...difficult...due...to... the...disease-related...phenotype...and...growth...retardation...of... the...model...mice....To...address...this...issue,...we...have...developed... a...system...to...introduce...donor...mutations...in...specific...genes... into...sperm...using...the...Cre-LoxP...system....Since...the...father... mouse...has...the...mutated...gene...only...in...its...sperm,...it...is... healthy...and...fully...capable...of...mating....Even...if...the...model... mice,...which...are...the...sons...of...the...father...mice,...show...severe... phenotypes,...we...can...obtain...enough...model...mice...for...our... research...by...continuing...the...mating...between...the...father... and...wild-type...females....To...confirm...the...usefulness...of...this... system,...we...applied...it...to...the...generation...of...two...syndromic... intellectual... retardation... model... mice,... Mowat-Wilson... syndrome...and...Rubinstein-Taybi...syndrome,...which...are... difficult...to...maintain...in...the...inbred...strain...C57BL6....Each... model...showed...a...characteristic...cranial...appearance...that... has... important... implications... for... the... diagnosis... of...each... disease....This...phenotype...was...not...clearly...observed...in...the... model...mice...with...mixed...genetic...background....Furthermore,... these... model... mice... showed... behavioral... abnormalities... associated...with...these...diseases....These...results...indicate...the... usefulness... of... the... de novo... mutation... system... for... the... generation...and...study...of...dominantly...inherited...disease... models,...especially...those...that...are...difficult...to...maintain. One...out...of...every...5.5...couples...in...Japan...conceives...and...gives... birth...after...undergoing...fertility...treatment....Among...these,... IVF,...in...which...an...egg...and...sperm...are...fertilized...outside...the... body...and...returned...to...the...uterus,...is...the...most...frequently... used...method,...and...currently...one...in...16.1...births...is...the...result... of... IVF.... However,... the... average... success... rate... of... IVF... pregnancies... is... only... 30%.... The... main... cause... of... this... is... implantation... failure,... but... the... cause... and... the... detailed... mechanism...of...implantation...are...still...unknown....It...has...been... reported...that...the...implantation...process...proceeds...when... blastocyst-derived...proteases...act...on...epithelial...sodium... channels...(ENaC)...in...the...luminal...epithelium...of...the...uterus... and... activate... the... signaling... cascade... leading... to... decidualization,... but... among... the... many... proteases,... the... protease...that...activates...ENaC...is...unknown. However,...among...the...many...proteases,...the...protease...that... activates...ENaC...is...unknown.... To...identify...the...blastocyst-derived...protease...that...acts...as... an... implantation... initiation... signal,... we... conducted... implantation...inhibition...experiments...by...administering... inhibitors... to... the... mouse... uterus.... Since... proteases... are... classified... into... many... types... based... on... their... active... structures,... we... attempted... to... identify... them... by... using... inhibitors....First,...an...inhibitor...(amiloride)...that...specifically... inhibits...serine...proteases...was...administered...to...one...side...of... the...mouse...uterus...on...day...3...of...pregnancy,...and...PBS...was... administered...to...the...other...side...as...a...control....On...day...7...of... gestation,...the...implantation...site...was...visualized...using... Chicago...Sky...Blue...dye,...and...amiloride-specific...implantation... inhibition...was...observed....We...are...also...planning...to...conduct... the... same... analysis... for... a... drug... that... inhibits... cysteine... protease...(E-64)...and...a...drug...that...inhibits...a...specific...serine... protease...(nafamostat...mesylate),...and...we...would...like...to... report...the...results...as...well. [Objective] Oxidative...stress...is...an...important...factor...in... essential...hypertension....Although,...the...environment...in...the... mother's...womb...may...influence...the...development...of...adult... hypertension,...the...effects...of...oxidative...stress...on...pregnancy... and...childbirth...are...largely...unclear....Here,...we...investigated... the... potential... therapeutic... benefits... of... artificially... suppressing...increases...in...blood...pressure...and...reducing... oxidative...stress...using...spontaneously...hypertensive...rats... (SHR). [Method] Male...and...female...SHR...rats...were...mated...and... after...confirming...the...presence...of...a... vaginal... plug,...the... females...were...separated...and...used...in...the...experiment....A... control... group... (distilled... water... ad... libitum)... and... an... experimental... group... (3mM... tempol... ad... libitum)... were... established;... these... groups... were... maintained... during... pregnancy...and...for...40...days...after...parturition....Oxidative... stress...was...assessed...by...measuring...8-OHdG...levels...in...the... urine...of...the...adult...females;...body...weight...(BW),...systolic... blood...pressure...(SBP),...and...milk...yield...were...also...measured.... On...the...21st...day...after...parturition,...urine...was...collected... from...female...rats...and...their...offspring,...and...corticosterone... levels...in...the...urine...of...the...offspring...were...measured. [Results and Discussion]... Adult... female... BWs... were... similar...in...both...groups....The...mean...SBP...of...the...experimental... group...was...lower...than...that...of...the...control...group....Milk... yield...increased...with...lactation...and...there...was...no...significant... difference...between...the...two...groups....A...mean...urinary... 8-OHdG...level...of...132...ng/day...was...found...in...the...control... group...compared...to...85...ng/day...in...the...experimental...group.... Urinary... corticosterone... levels... in... the... offspring... were... significantly...lower...in...the...experimental...group...than...in...the... control... group.... These... results... indicate... that... a... stress- reducing...effect...was...induced...by...administration...of...tempol... both...in...the...adult...females...and...their...offspring....Our...results... suggest...that...administration...of...tempol...during...pregnancy... and...parturition...may...reduce...hypertension. Hematopoiesis...is...always...in...a...dynamic...state,...and...blood... cells...are...constantly...producing...and...destroying...themselves... to...maintain...hematopoietic...homeostasis....Hematopoiesis...is... carried...out...in...a...hierarchical...and...orderly...manner,...starting... from...multipotent...and...self-renewing...hematopoietic...stem... cells...through...hematopoietic...progenitor...cells...to...mature... blood...cells....Various...transcription...factors...and...cytokines... are...thought...to...be...involved...in...regulating...the...direction...of... hematopoietic... differentiation.... On... the... other... hand,... hematopoietic...tumors,...in...which...the...homeostasis...of...blood... cells...is...disrupted,...are...known...to...have...abnormalities...in...the... expression...and...function...of...these...transcription...factors...due... to...chromosomal...abnormalities...or...genetic...mutations....The... transcription... factor... GATA2... is... highly... expressed... in... hematopoietic...stem/progenitor...cells...and...is...essential...for... the...maintenance,...proliferation,...and...differentiation...of...these... cells....It...has...been...reported...that...mice...lacking...the...GATA2... gene...die...of...hematopoietic...failure...during...fetal...life....The... expression... of... GATA2... varies... depending... on... the... differentiation...stage...of...hematopoietic...stem/progenitor... cells...and...is...thought...to...be...involved...in...the...direction...of... differentiation....Recent...advances...in...molecular...biological... research...have...revealed...that...familial...mutations...in...the... GATA2... gene... are... found... in... the... blood... cells... of... actual... patients... with... hematopoietic... tumors,... including... acute... myeloid... leukemia... and... myelodysplastic... syndromes.... However,...the...molecular...mechanisms...by...which...GATA2... mutations...cause...these...pathological...conditions...has...not... been...elucidated....It...has...been...reported...that...GATA2...is... down-regulated...in...the...blood...cells...of...patients...with...acute... monocytic... leukemia... and... chronic... myelomonocytic... leukemia....Our...Gata2...knockdown... mice...have... reduced... expression...of...Gata2...in...bone...marrow...cells...to...about...20%...of... the...wild-type...level...and...exhibit...monocytosis...with...aging....In... this...study,...we...analyzed...the...pathogenesis...of...monocytic... leukemia...caused...by...reduced...expression...of...GATA2...and... the...relationship...between...GATA2...mutations...and...myeloid... leukemia...in...vivo...by...using...the...Gata2...knockdown...mice. X... chromosome....In...human...patients,...they...exhibit...progressive... muscle... weakness... as... they... grow,... leading... to... motor... dysfunction...and...multiple...organ...system...dysfunction....In... addition,...DMD...patient...have...CK...levels...10...to...100...times... higher...than...the...normal...range....Mdx...mice...with...C57BL/10... genetic...background,...exhibiting...phenotypes...similar...to... those... of... human... We... successfully... established... DMD... mice... model... with... similar...phenotype...of...human...DMD...patient....This...mouse... model...will...be...useful...as...DMD...model...and...can...be...applied...to... understanding...the...DMD...pathogenesis...and...to...development... of...novel...strategy...for...gene...therapy. We...have...maintained...and...supplied...various...genetically... modified...mouse...strains....Several...similarly...short-limb...mice... were...found...in...the...offspring...of...mice...colonies....In...this...study,... mating...tests,...CT...image...analysis,...and...histopathological... diagnosis...were...performed...on...short...limb...mice...to...reveal... their...traits....These...phenotypes...were...quite...similar...strain... of...the...brachypodism...5...Jackson...mouse...(bp)...line,...and...its... causative...gene...of...GDF5...(Growth...Differentiation...Factor...5)... was...confirmed...by...PCR. In...mating...normal...mice,...the...incidence...of...short-limb...was... 22.0%....In...mating...short-limb,...all...pups...were...short-limb....All... pairs...gave...birth...to...pups,...nursed...until...weaning....But...there... is...a...decrease...in...litter...size. CT...image...analysis...showed...long...bone...shortening...and... fibula...hypoplasia,...knee...joint...dislocation,...and...phalange... shortening...or...loss...in...short-limb...mice....Histopathological... analysis...showed...deformation...of...hyaline...cartilage...in...the... femoral...condyle...in...the...knee...joint...tissue...of...short-limb... mice....PCR...analysis...showed...the...Gdf5...gene...lacked...about...1.1... kb... from... the... latter... half... of... exon2... in... short-limb... mice.... Although... the... mutation... site... is... different... from... the... previously...reported...(Storm...EE...et...al.,...1994),...this...short- limb... mouse...was...confirmed...as...a...new...bp...mouse...line.... Mutations...in...GDF5...in...humans...have...been...associated...with... cartilage...dysplasia,...brachydactyly,...etc.,...and...have...also... been...reported...as...one...of...the...candidate...genes...associated... with...OA...(Louise...NR...et...al.,...2013)....Therefore,...the...bp-Jic... mouse...discovered...this...time...is...expected...as...a...new...model... of...OA...and...will...be...established...in...the...future. Chronic...kidney...disease...(CKD)...is...difined...as...kidney...damage... or...decreased...glomerular...filtration...rate...for...3...months...or... more,...and...the...prevalence...of...CKD...are...estimated...at...about... 13%...of...the...adult...population...in...Japan....Polysistic...kidney... disease...(PKD)...is...one...cause...of...CKD,...and...PKD...patients... often...have...hypertension....Therefore,...reducing...salt...intake... and...control...blood...pressure... is...important...to...suppress... decline...of...renal...function...in...the...patients....The...SS-PCK...rat,... establised...by...introducing...the...pkhd1...gene...of...PCK...rats... into...Dahl...salt-sensitive...(SS)...rat...genome,...is...a...novel...model... of... PKD.... The... strain... was... obtained... from... Wisconsin... University....Here...we...investigated...renal...pathology...in...SS- PCK...rats. All...male...rats...of...Sprague...Dawley...(SD),...PCK,...SS...and...SS- PCK...strains...were...given...standard...chow...with...normal...salt... and... body... weight,... food... and... water... intake,... and... blood... pressure...were...measured...from...5...to...18...weeks...of...age.... Serum...urea...nitrogen...and...creatinine...were...measured,...and... the...kidney...and...liver...tissue...samples...were...fixed...with...4%... PFA....Paraffin-embedded...tissue...sections...were...stained... with... H&E,... PAS... and... sirius... red,... and... analysed... by... immunohistochemistry...with...several...antibodies...(Ki67,... CD68,...and...TGF-). The...growth...curve...of...body...weight,...and...changes...in...food... and...water...intake...showed...a...similar...tendency...between... strains...with...the...same...genetic...background...(SD...and...PCK,... SS...and...SS-PCK)....Blood...pressure...levels...were...elevated...in... the...SS-PCK...rats...even...under...normal...sodium...diet,...whereas... SS...rats...exhibit...high...salt-induced...hypertension....For...renal... pathology,...SS-PCK...rats...had...different...features...from...PCK... rats....The...cyst...progression...was...slow...as...compared...with... PCK...rats,...but...severe...damaged...glomeluri...was...observed.... These... findings... suggest... that... the... pathogenesis... and... progression...of...CKD...in...PKD...patients...is...greatly...influenced... by...salt-sensitive...hypertension. Neuropathy... target... esterase... (NTE)... is... a... type... of... lysophospholipase...whose...amino...acid...sequence...is...well... conserved... across... species,and... mutations... in... its... gene... PNPLA6... are... found... in... many... human... motor... function... diseases.... In... addition,... NTE... covalently... binds... to... organophosphorus...and...causes...a...variety...of...neurological... symptoms...through...subsequent...chemical...changes...of...the... complex....As...a...clue...to...the...pathogenesis...of...these...diseases,... we...generated...six...strains...of...mice...with...partial...mutations... in...the...vicinity...of...the...active...center...of...the...NTE...enzyme... and...conducted...phenotypic...analysis...focusing...on...brain... function...in...some...of...the...strains. There... have... been... reports... of... large... deletion... mutant... knockout...mice...(Winrow...et al....2003)...and...brain-specific... knockout...mice...using...the...nestin...promoter...(Akassoglou...et al.... 2004).... The... former... reported... fetal... lethality... of... the... homozygous...embryos...due...to...placental...dysplasia...and... hyperactivity... in... heterozygous... mice,... and... the... latter... reported... vacuolar... degeneration... of... neurons... near... the... hippocampus...and...decreased...coordination...in...the...rotarod... test. In...our...strains...we...examined,...no...homozygous...mutant...mice... were...born,...suggesting...that,...as...in...the...case...of...the...large... deletion...mutant...knockout...mice,...a...reduced...normal...NTE... activity...or...a...partially...mutated...NTE...itself...caused...the... early... developmental... abnormalities... that... resulted... in... embryonic...lethality. Behavioral...analysis...of...some...lines...of...heterozygous...partial... NTE... mutant... mice... showed... reduced... function... in... the... Rotarod...and...Open...field...tests. These...results...suggest...that...the...phenotype...may...differ... depending...on...the...type...of...mutation. Histological... analysis... suggested... that... the... decrease... in... function... of... the... above... heterozygous... mutant... mice... by... Rotarod...test...may...be...due...to...the...decrease...in...Purkinje...cells.... No...abnormalities...were...observed...in...the...vertical...pole...test... or...muscle...tissue. No... effect... on... lipid... metabolism... was... detected... in... the... heterozygous... strains,... and... since... the... position... of... the... introduced...mutation...was...not...located...at...the...center...of... enzyme...activity,...it...is...assumed...that...the...NTE...molecule... itself...may...have...functions...other...than...enzyme...activity. In...the...future,...we...would...like...to...conduct...detailed...analysis... of...all...the...strains...to...analyze...the...pathogenesis...of...human... PNPLA6...mutant...diseases...and...sick...building...syndrome. Renal pathology in the rat model of polysistic kidney disease with salt-sensitive hypertension Aya Yoshimura1 , Eriko Matsuyama1 , Miwa Sakata1 , Takahiro Shirozu1 , Masanori Kugita1 , Kanako Kumamoto1 , Masumi Hirabayashi2 , Shizuko Nagao1 1 Fujita...Health...University,...2 National...Institute...for...Physiological...Sciences Analyses of the mutant mice of the pnpla6 gene coding for the neuropathy target esterase Minoru Kimura1 , Hisako Akatsuka2 , Masatoshi Itoh3 , Kou Sakabe2 , Tomomi Hatanaka4 , Akira Kato2 1 The...Institute...of...Medical...Sciences,...Tokai...University,...2 School...of...Medicine,...Tokai...University,...... 3 Support...Center...for...Medical...Research...and...Education,...Tokai...University...4 School...of...Pharmacy,...Josai...University P-43 P-44 --S 99-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 99 69...... Familial... visceral... amyloidosis... is... a... genetic... disease... in... humans... caused... by... a... missense... single... nucleotide... substitution...that...gives...rise...to...an...Asp76Asn...amino...acid... substitution...of...the...2 -microglobulin...(hB2M-D76N...variant).... In...patients...affected...with...this...disease,...hB2M-D76N...variant... protein...is...converted...to...amyloid...fibrils...and...deposits...to... organs... including... the... spleen,... liver,... and... heart.... As... an... attempt...to...establish...an...animal...model...for...this...disease,...we... generated...transgenic...mice...expressing...the...hB2M-D76N.... Seven... transgenic... founder... mice... were... obtained... by... microinjection...of...the...expression...construct...for...the...hB2M- D76N...into...fertilized...eggs...of...BDF2...mice....N1...transgenic... mice...were...obtained...from...five...of...the...founder...mice....N2... mice...homozygous...for...the...transgene...were...bred...from...one... founder...mouse....RT-PCR...analysis...indicated...that...these... mice...express...transcripts...for...the...transgene...in...major... organs....An...immunoblotting...study...demonstrated...that...free... hB2M-D76N...(~50...mg/L)...was...circulating...in...the...blood...of... these...mice....Amyloid...deposition...was...not...observed...in...any... organ...of...these...mice...sacrificed...at...6-24...months...of...age.... Amyloid...deposition...was...absent...also...in...transgenic...mice...of... the... endogenous... B2m... null... genotype.... These... results... suggest...that...it...would...be...formidable...to...develop...a...mouse... model...for...A2M...amyloidosis. [Introduction] DBA/2FG-pcy...(hereinafter...referred...to...as... "pcy")...mouse...is...known...as...an...animal...model...of...spontaneous... polycystic...kidney...disease...(J...Urol...1986)....The...disease...of...the... pcy...mouse...is...caused...by...a...mutation...in...the...NPHP3...gene... and...is...transmitted...as...an...autosomal...recessive...trait....The... purpose...of...this...study...is...to...collect...background...data...on...the... pcy...mouse...which...our...company...raise...and...supply. [Methods] Four...to...10-week-old...five...male...pcy...mice...were... used...for...this...experiment....The...body...weight...and...organ... weight... (actual... and... relative... weight)... were... measured.... Moreover,...blood...biochemical...tests,...such...as...blood...urea... nitrogen...(BUN)...and...creatinine...(Cr)...levels,...were...performed... to...assess...their...kidney...function. [Results] Renal... cysts... were... observed... grossly... and... histologically...from...the...age...of...4...weeks...on....The...increases... in...body...weight,...actual...and...relative...kidney...weight...were... observed...until...10...weeks...old....On...the...other...hand,...the...blood... biochemical...values...were...maintained...at...normal...levels....The... declines...in...kidney...function...were...not...observed...in...the... blood...biochemical...tests. [Conclusion] In...this...study,...we...collected...background... data...on...the...pcy...mouse...which...our...company...raise...and... supply.... Renal... cysts... had... been... observed... grossly... and... histologically...from...the...age...of...4...weeks...on....Both...actual...and... relative...kidney...weights...had...increased...compared...with... other...organs...according...to...occurrence...of...the...renal...cysts.... However,...no...abnormal...values...had...been...found...in...the... blood...biochemical...tests...for...the...first...10...weeks...old....The... blood...biochemical...tests...had...not...showed...any...declines...in... kidney...function.... Future... studies... will...be...necessary... to... investigate... indices... of... age-associated... kidney... function... decline. Edge...Research,...Shinshu...University,...2 Department...of...Aging...Biology,...Shinshu...University...Graduate...School...of... Medicine,...Science...and...Technology,...3 Department...of...Neurology,...Kindai...University...Faculty...of...Medicine,... 4 Department...of...Molecular...Pathology,...Faculty...of...Medical...Sciences,...University...of...Fukui,... 5 Community...Health...Care...Research...Center,...Nagano...University...of...Health...and...Medicine Background data analysis on 4 to-10-week-old DBA/2FG-pcy mice Yasufumi Tsushima1 , Takayuki Goto1 , Masahiko Yasuda2 , Saika Kasai1 , Satoshi Nakamura1 , Takaki Nishikawa1 and Hideki Shinohara1 1 Kyudo...Co.,...Ltd.,...2 Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals P-45 P-46 --S 100-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 100 69...... Chronic...recurrent...multifocal...osteomyelitis...(CRMO)...is... characterized...by...the...prolonged...multifocal...chronic...status... of...inflammation...and...bone...destruction...with...pain....Because... the... underlying...mechanisms...of... bone... pain... are... almost... unknown,...preclinical...models...of...CRMO...are...necessary...for... alleviation...of...pain....Ali18...mutant...mice...exhibit...spontaneous... inflammation...in...bone...marrow...and...peripheral...paws....These... phenotypes... are... similar... to... autoinflammatory... disease... symptoms,... and... Ali18... is... a... dominant... gain-of-function... mutation... in... a... member... of... Src... family... kinase... Fgr.... Interestingly,... some... of... CRMO... patients... exhibit... rare... polymorphisms...in...the...coding...region...of...FGR....Thus,...Ali18... mice...could...be...a...CRMO...model...to...understand...bone...pain...in... molecular...levels....First,...various...pain-related...behavior...tests... were...examined...using...heterozygous...(Ali18/+)...and...wild... type...(+/+)...mice....Among...behavior...tests...for...heat,...chemical,... and...mechanical...stimulation,...Ali18...mice...exhibit...increased... sensitivity...of...pain-related...behavior...against...mechanical... stimulation... (von... Frey... test).... Interestingly,... the... pain... threshold... level... as... measured... by... the... von... Frey... test... correlates...with...the...strength...of...paw...inflammation...judged... by...macroscopic...clinical...scores....The...results...of...behavior... tests...for...heat...and...chemical...stimulation...were...comparable... between...Ali18/+...and...+/+...mice....Further,...this...increased... sensitivity...for...mechanical...stimulation...was...reduced...in... strength... when... multi-kinase... inhibitor... dasatinib... was... administrated...into...Ali18...mice...for...two...weeks....Dasatainib... is...reported...to...diminish...paw...inflammation...and...to...increase... bone... density... in... Ali18... mice... previously.... Thus,... these... results... suggest... that... the... mechanical... hyperalgesia... phenotype... of... Ali18... mice... depends... on... severity... of... spontaneous...autoinflammation....Although...the...underlying... mechanisms... in... pain-related... behavior... remain... poorly... understood,...Ali18...mice...could...be...a...CRMO...model...for...bone... pain...without...surgical...operation,...which...diminish...validity... and...reproducibility...of...experiments....As...an...in...vivo...system,... Ali18...mice...might...be...useful...for...screening...of...analgesic... drugs...for...bone...pain...in...CRMO...patients. [Objective] Mutations...in...the...CHCHD2...gene...cause...an... autosomal...dominant...late...onset...Parkinson's...disease....The... gene...product...CHCHD2...contains...mitochondria...targeting... sequence...in...the...N-terminus...and...coild-coil...domain...at...the... C-terminus...and...has...been...localized...to...the...intermembrane... space...of...mitochondria....Although...little...is...known...regarding... the...physiological...and...pathological...roles...of...CHCHD2....To... understand...the...physiological...and...pathological...roles...of... CHCHD2...in...vivo,...we...established...CHCHD2...knockout...(KO)... mice.... [Methods]...We...generated...and...examined...the...CHCHD2... KO...mice...to...clarify...the...phenotype...(behavioral...analysis,... mitochondria...structure,...dopaminergic...neuron)...with...aging.... [Results]... CHCHD2... KO... mice... exhibited... p62... inclusion... formation...and...dopaminergic...neuronal...loss...in...an...age- dependent...manner....These...changes...were...associated...with... a... reduction... in... mitochondria... complex... activity... and... abrogation...of...inner...mitochondria...structure....In...particular,... the...OPA1...proteins,...which...regulate...fusion...of...mitochondrial... inner...membranes,...were...immature...in...the...mitochondria...of... CHCHD2...KO...mice....CHCHD2...regulates...mitochondrial... morphology...and...p62...homeostasis...by...controlling...the...level... of...OPA1.... [Conclusions]...Our...findings...highlight...the...unexpected... role...of...the...homeostatic...level...of...p62,...which...is...regulated...by... a... non-autophagic... system,... in... controlling... intracellular... inclusion...body...formation,...and...indicate...that...the...pathologic... processes...associated...with...the...mitochondrial...proteolytic... system. Hyperalgesia and therapeutics in a mouse model for chronic recurrent multifocal osteomyelitis (93 cha.) 100 half-width characters Koichiro Abe1 , Masanobu Yoshikawa2 Tokai...University...School...of...Medicine,...1 Department...of...Molecular...Life...Science,...2 Clinical...Pharmacology Loss of CHCHD2 causes inclusion body formation and dopaminergic neuronal loss in aged mice Shigeto Sato1 , Sachiko Noda2 , Nobuhiro Tada1 , Nobutaka Hattori2 1 Laboratory...of...Biomedical...Research...Resources,...Juntendo...University...Graduate...School...of...Medicine,... 2 Department...of...Neurology,...Juntendo...University...Graduate...School...of...Medicine P-47 P-48 --S 101-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 101 69...... [Background and Objectives] Neuroaxonal...dystrophy... (NAD)...is...a...neurodegenerative...disease...characterized...by... spheroid...(swollen...axon)...formation...in...the...nervous...system.... We...have...focused...on...a...mutant...rat...strain...(KK...rat)...with... hindlimb...gait...abnormalities...from...a...young...age,...which...was... diagnosed...as...NAD,...and...have...analyzed...the...causative...gene... kk... and... its... pathogenesis.... In... this... study,... we... aimed... to... establish...kk...mutant...rats...as...a...novel...NAD...model.... [Materials and Methods] 1)... Identification... of... the... causative...gene...of...KK...rat:...Mapping...of...the...causative...gene... was...performed...using...F2...affected...rats...obtained...from... crosses...with...BN...strain...and...SSLP...markers....RT-PCR...and... sequencing...analysis...were...performed...for...candidate...genes.... 2)...Generation...of...kk...mutant...rats...by...the...CRISPR/Cas... system...and...their...phenotypic...analyses:...Using...CRISPR/ Cas9...and...long...single...stranded...DNA,...a...kk...mutation...of...KK... rat...was...knocked...into...the...kk...gene...of...F344/Jcl...strain....The... founder... rats... were... backcrossed... to... F344/Jcl,... and... F2... progeny...was...obtained....The...phenotypes...of...the...kk...mutant... homozygous... rats... were... evaluated... (observation... of... symptoms...and...histopathological...analysis).... [Results]...We...identified...a...missense...mutation...in...Hspa8... gene...as...the...causative...gene...on...chromosome...8....Two...lines... of...F2...rats...carrying...the...targeted...homozygous...mutation...of... Hspa8... gene... were... obtained,... and... Hspa8... homozygous... mutant...rats...exhibited...abnormal...hindlimb...gait...and...weight... loss...from...a...young...age....Histopathologically,...numerous... spheroids...were...observed...mainly...in...the...spinal...cord...and... brainstem.... These... phenotypes... were... similar... to... those... observed...in...KK...rats.... [Discussions] We...identified...a...missense...mutation...in... Hspa8... gene... as... the... causative... gene... of... KK... rats,... and... established...the...Hspa8...mutant...rat...as...a...novel...animal...model... for...NAD....The...Hspa8...gene...has...not...been...reported...as...a... causative...gene...for...neurodegenerative...diseases...including... NAD....We...are...currently...conducting...functional...analysis...of... mutated...Hspa8...gene...and...detailed...pathological...analysis...of... the...Hspa8...mutant...rats. The...Japan...Mouse...Clinic...(JMC)at...the...RIKEN...BioResource... Research... Center... (BRC)... provides... mouse-phenotyping... platforms...to...research...community...in...Japan....One...of...the... important...roles...of...the...phenotypic...data...collected...from... mutant...mice...at...the...JMC...is...contributing...to...development... of...disease...models....However,...from...the...viewpoint...of...the... construct...validity,...it...is...difficult...to...carry...out...objective... classification... of... mice... with... mutations... in... functionally... unknown...genes...as...disease...models....In...order...to...resolve... this...problem,...we...carried...out...systematic...classification...of... the...mutant...mice...as...disease... models... by...a...phenotypic... information...driven...approach. Our...phenotyping...platforms...consist...of...2...pipelines,...pipeline... 1...and...pipeline...2....In...the...pipeline...2...(https://ja.brc.riken.jp/ lab/jmc/mouse_clinic/en/pipeline_en/pipeline_02. htm#p2-00),... we...perform...multiple... behavioral... tests... in... order... to... evaluate... behavioral... characteristics... of... mice... comprehensively....In...this...study,...we...collected...phenotypic... data... from... 13-mutant... strains... that... include... known... neurodevelopmental-disorder...models...as...positive...controls... by...using...the...pipeline...2....At...first,...we...statistically...compared... baseline...data...collected...from...wild-type...mice...among...the... multiple...cohorts...(number...of...mice,...93;...number...of...cohorts,... 12;...genetic...background,...C57BL/6N)...to...evaluate...stability... of... the... data.... In... this... analysis,... we... detected... significant... differences...among...the...cohorts...in...several...parameters.... This...result...indicates...that...a...direct...comparison...of...the... phenotypic... data... collected... from... mutants... of... different... cohorts...is...difficult....Therefore,...the...data...from...the...mutant... mice... were... converted... to... Z-scores... and... used... for... the... classification.... In... the... classification,... we... used... the... J48... algorithm...installed...in...the...WEKA...software...(https://www. cs.waikato.ac.nz/ml/weka/)...for...a...machine...learning...based... analysis... and... a... generation... of... a... decision... tree.... The... phenotype-based...classification...performed...in...this...study... will...add...new...values...to...the...mutant...mice...phenotypically... characterized...in...our...platform. Medicine,...Kyoto...University,...3 Department...of...Animal...Science,...Tokyo...University...of...Agriculture,...4 Institute...of...Medical... Science,...the...University...of...Tokyo,...5 SHIMIZU...LLABORATORY...SUPPLIES...Co.,...Ltd. Phenotypic classification of mutant mouse strains analyzed at the Japan Mouse Clinic Tamio Furuse, Ikuko Yamada, Tomoko Kushida, Ikuo Miura, Masaru Tamura RIKEN...BRC P-49 P-50 --S 102-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 102 69...... The... conventional... method... to... produce... tissue-specific... knockout...mice...has...time-consuming...steps....To...overcome... this...problem,...we...aim...to...establish...a...novel...method,...namely... hyper-speed...conditional...knockout...(HS-cKO)...system....In... this...study,...we...assessed...the...utility...of...this...system...for... cardiomyocyte-specific...gene...knockout. In... this... myocardial... HS-cKO... system,... Cre-sgRNA... expression...cassette...consisting...of...Myh6...promoter-Cre-U6... promoter-single...guide...RNA...was...efficiently...transfected... into...fertilized...eggs...of...EGFPflox -Cas9...mice,...which...express... Cas9...depending...on...the...Cre...expression. To... evaluate... tissue... specificity... of... Cre... expression,... we... introduced...Myh6-Cre-sgRNA...cassette...into...fertilized...eggs... of...a...tdsRed...Cre...reporter...strain....We...found...red...fluorescence... in...the...hearts...of...all...mice...carrying...Cre-sgRNA...cassette,... while...fluorescence...was...also...observed...in...other...tissues...in... some...of...these...animals....Next,...we...generated...Prmt1-HS- cKO...mice....Previous...studies...have...shown...that...systemic... knockout...of...Prmt1...causes...embryonic...lethality,...while... cardiomyocyte-specific...Prmt1...knockout...based...on...the...Cre- loxP... system... results... in... dilated... cardiomyopathy.... Unexpectedly,... we... obtained... only... one... Prmt1-HS-cKO... animal,... indicating... the... leakage... of... Cas9... expression... in... fertilized... eggs.... The... Prmt1-HS-cKO... mouse... exhibited... dilated... cardiomyopathy... as... seen... in... the... previous... cardiomyocyte-specific...Prmt1-cKO...mice....To...avoid...the... Cas9... leakage,...we...applied...FLEx...system...for... the...Cre- dependent...Cas9...induction....However,...FLEx-based...Prmt1- HS-cKO...mice...did...not...show...significant...cardiac...phenotype,... suggesting...the...insufficient...Cas9...induction. These...results...indicate...that...the...HS-cKO...system...can...be... used...to...analyze...cardiac...gene...function....However,...we...need... to...improve...the...leakage...of...Cas9...expression...and...tissue... specificity. The...Japan...Mouse...Clinic...(JMC)...at...RIKEN...BioResource... Research... Center... is... one... of... core... members... of... the... International...Mouse...Phenotyping...Consortium...(IMPC),... which... is... an... international... project... aims... to... carry... out... generating...and...systematical...phenotyping...knockout...mouse... strains....In...the...standard...procedure...of...the...Y...maze...of... IMPC,...7...males...and...7...females...in...each...genotype...are...used... as...subjects...in...each...strain,...and...the...procedure...is...carried... out...on...the...Early...adult...pipeline...(EA:...11w)...and...Late...adult... pipeline...(LA:...51w),...respectively....In...the...JMC...protocol,... autopsy...was...performed...on...half...of...the...subjects...used...in... the...EA....Therefore,...the...LA...was...supplemented...with...naive... mice.... It... is... known... that... the... behavioral... phenotype... is... susceptible...to...differences...in...experimental...equipment,... breeding...environment,...and...prior...experience. In...this...study,...we...analyzed...the...effects...of...experimental... experience...on...the...results...of...the...Y...maze...in...KO...mice. The...following...15...strains...were...analyzed,...Fbn2, Ppme1, Wdhd1, Etv6, Scml2, Hrh1, Tnr, Frmpd2, Tmed6, Dync2h1, Tgfbr2, H2-M3, Ybx3, Cnot7,...and...Tmen63c KOs....Mice...were...divided...into...three...groups,...wild...type,... naive...KO,...and...experienced...KO....Based...on...the...value...of... wild...type,...the...measured...values...were...converted...into...a...Z... score,...and...the...effects...of...the...experimental...experience... were...analyzed. As...a...result,...the...locomotor...activity...was...lower...in...the...naive... KO... than... in... the... experienced... KO.... In... addition,... the... alternation...rate...was...also...lower...in...the...naive...KO....These... results... show... that... the... behavioral... phenotype... differs... depending...on...the...presence...or...absence...of...experimental... experience...regardless...of...the...KO...strain....Terefore,...it...is... important... to... examine... and... control... the... experimental... history...when...evaluating...gene...function. Development of cardiomyocyte-specific hyper-speed knockout system by using in vivo genome editing Tomoka Ema1 , Kazuya Murata2 , Eiichi Okamura3 , Natsuki Mikami4 , Shoma Matsumoto3 , Seiya Mizuno2 , Masatsugu Ema3 , Fumihiro Sugiyama2 1 Masters...Program...in...Medical...Sciences,...University...of...Tsukuba,...2 Faculty...of...Medicine,...University...of...Tsukuba 3 Research...Center...for...Animal...Life...Science,...Shiga...University...of...Medical...Science 4 Ph.D....Program...in...Human...Biology,...University...of...Tsukuba Effect of prior experience on the Y maze in IMPC phenotypic analysis Ikuko Yamada, Tomoko Kushida, Tamio Furuse, Masaru Tamura RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center P-51 P-52 --S 103-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 103 69...... Type...I...diabetes...is...an...insulin-dependent...diabetes...caused... by...insulin...deficiency...due...to...the...destruction...of...pancreatic... beta...cells...and...requires...daily...insulin...injections...for...its... treatment....Rodent...models...are...widely...used...in...diabetes... research,... but... medium... to... large... animal... models... are... essential...tools...for...clinical...applications...in...humans....In...this... study,...we...report...the...establishment...of...a...diabetes...model... through... the... destruction... of... pancreatic... beta... cells... by... intravenous...administration...of...streptozotocin...(STZ)...to... micro-mini...pigs...(MMP). The...study...was...conducted...in...a...pig...experimental...facility...at... Tokushima...University....STZ...(150...mg/kg)...was...administered... intravenously...under...anesthesia....Evaluation...of...fasting... blood...glucose...concentrations...and...an...intravenous...glucose... tolerance...test...(IVGTT)...were...performed...before...and...after... STZ...treatment...to...evaluate...glucose...tolerance....Before...STZ... treatment,...the...pigs...showed...a...decrease...in...blood...glucose... concentration...15...min...after...intravenous...glucose...loading,... indicating...normal...glucose...tolerance....In...contrast,...STZ- treated... pigs... showed... high... fasting... blood... glucose... concentrations...(>...200...mg/dL)...and...no...decrease...in...blood... glucose... levels... after... 60... min... of... transvenous... glucose... administration...in...the...IVGTT,...indicating...that...they...had... developed...diabetes. Our...results...show...that...150...mg/kg...STZ...can...stably...induce... a...diabetic...model...in...MMPs....The...response...to...the...STZ... treatment...may...differ...among...pig...strains...because...the...STZ... concentration...used...in...previous...reports...was...variable....This... MMP...diabetic...model...is...expected...to...be...a...medium...to...good... animal...model...for...diabetes...research,...such...as...regenerative... therapy...and...the...development...of...new...biomedical...devices. Human... unilateral... renal... agenesis... (URA)... is... a... urinary... malformation...characterized...by...congenital...absence...of...one... kidney....The...inbred...rat...strain...ACI...is...known...as...an...animal... model...for...URA....Recently,...we...have...demonstrated...that...the... LTR...insertion...in...the...Kit...gene...was...causative...of...URA...in... ACI...rats....However,...various...genes...have...been...known...to...be... involved...in...the...human...URA....We,...therefore,...hypothesized... that...ACI...rats...harbored...different...genes...involved...in...the... URA...rather...than...the...Kit...gene....Here,...we...performed...QTL... analysis...with...(WKY...x...ACI)...x...ACI...backcross...progeny.... Among...1808...backcross...progeny,...62...(3.4%)...rats...exhibited... kidney...malformations...consisting...of...43...URA...rats...and...19... hydronephrosis...rats....Incidence...of...URA...was...significantly... higher...in...the...right...side...than...in...the...left...side....Although...we... could...not...find...the...association...between...URA...and...Kit...gene,... we...identified...an...QTL...that...was...significantly...associated... with... expression... of... kidney... malformations... (URA... and... hydronephrosis)...on...chromosome...20...and...named...it...renal... agenesis... 2... (Renag2).... These... findings... suggested... that... different...genes...were...involved...in...the...expression...of...URA... of...ACI...rats....Our...study...contributes...to...the...identification...of... gene(s)...responsible...for...URA...in...rats.... Biomedical...Sciences An QTL associated with CAKUT of ACI rats mapped on chromosome 20 Hoang Hieu1 , Kenta Hayashi1 Kanta Izaki, Momoka Suzuki1 , Haruki Kitazume1 , Ayumi Watanabe1 , Norihide Yokoi2 , Takashi Kuramoto1 1 Department...of...Animal...Science,...Faculty...of...Agriculture,...Tokyo...University...of...Agriculture,... 2 Laboratory...of...Animal...Breeding...and...Genetics,...Graduate...School...of...Agriculture,...Kyoto...University P-53 P-54 --S 104-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 104 69...... Focal...epilepsy...is...a...common...neurological...disorder...that...is... characterized...by...seizures...arising...from...the...part...of...the... brain.... The... role... of... genetic... factors... is... increasingly... recognized....Variations...in...GATOR1...(GAP...activity...towards... RAGs...1)...complex...genes...(DEPDC5,...NPRL2,...and...NPRL3)... are...the...most...common...genetic...cause...of...focal...epilepsies.... Since...they...are...associated...with...a...broad...spectrum...of...focal... epilepsies,... a... unique... pathology... categorized... as... "GATORopathy"...can...be...conceptualized.... To...decipher... GATORopathy,...animal...models...recapitulating...the...clinical... features... of... patients... are... essential.... While... several... genetically...modified...animal...models...recapitulate...DEPDC5- related... epilepsy,... no... models... have... been... reported... for... NPRL2-...or...NPRL3-related...epilepsies.... Here,...we...conditionally...deleted...Nprl2...and...Nprl3...from...the... dorsal...telencephalon...in...mice...(Emx1cre/+;...Nprl2f/f...(Nprl2- cKO)... and... Emx1cre/+;... Nprl3f/f... (Nprl3-cKO))... and... compared...their...phenotypes...with...Emx1cre/+;...Depdc5f/f... (Depdc5-cKO)... mice.... Nprl2-cKO... and... Nprl3-cKO... mice... recapitulated...the...major...abnormal...features...of...patients-- spontaneous...seizures,...and...dysmorphic...enlarged...neuronal... cells...with...increased...mechanistic...target...of...rapamycin... complex...1...(mTORC1)...signaling--similar...to...patients...and... Depdc5-cKO...mice....Chronic...postnatal...administration...of...an... inhibitor...of...mTORC1,...rapamycin,...dramatically...prolonged... the...survival...period...and...inhibited...seizure...occurrence...in... Nprl2-cKO...and...Nprl3-cKO...mice....However,...the...benefit...of... rapamycin...after...withdrawal...was...less...durable...in...Nprl2-... and...Nprl3-cKO...mice...compared...with...Depdc5-cKO...mice.... These... conditional... knockout... mice... are... useful... for... understanding...GATORopathy...and...for...the...identification...of... novel...therapeutic...targets. Cancer...cachexia...is...wasting...syndrome...of...late-stage...cancer... with...body...weight...loss....We...generated...a...novel...cancer... cachexigenic... mouse... model... with... oncogenic... K-ras,... conditionally...expressed...by...Cre/loxP...system...on...p53...(-/-)... background.... Oncogenic... K-ras... expression... in... skeletal... muscle... resulted... in... generation... of... pleomorphic... rhabdomyosarcoma... (RMS).... The... RMS... model... mouse... showed...extensive...weight...loss...of...muscle...and...fat...tissues... around...2...weeks....We...established...cachexigenic...tumor...cell... line...(RMS3)...and...noncachexigenic...tumor...cell...line...(RMS6)... from...primary...tumor....Gene...expression...profiles...of...RMS3-... and...RMS6-derived...tumors...revealed...that...IL-6...expression... levels...in...RMS3-derived...tumors...were...significantly...higher... than...those...in...RMS6-derived...tumors....We...knocked...down... IL6...of...RMS3...by...shRNA...and...examined...the...involvement...of... IL-6...in...the...onset...of...cachexia....In...addition...to...normal...mice,... transplantation... experiments...were...performed...on...IL-6... knockout...mice,...and...examined...role...of...IL-6...from...host...mice.... As...a...result,...it...was...clarified...that...IL-6...derived...from...the... tumor...and...the...host...are...synergistically...involved...in...the... cancer... cachexia... caused... by... the... polymorphic... rhabdomyosarcoma...cell...line...RMS3. Novel epileptic animal models of GATORopathy revealed different drug susceptibility Di Zhao1,2 , Yuta SAWADA1 , Yuichi HIRAOKA1 , Tomoji MASHIMO2 , Kohichi TANAKA1 , Saeko ISHIDA1,2 1 Laboratory...of...Molecular...Neuroscience,...Medical...Research...Institute,...Tokyo...Medical...and...Dental...University,...2 Division... of...Animal...Genetics,...Laboratory...Animal...Research...Center,...Institute...of...Medical...Science,...The...University...of...Tokyo Analysis of IL-6 in cancer cachexia model of murine pleomorphic rhabdomyosarcoma Hiromitsu Saito, Noboru Suzuki Dept....of...Animal...Functional...Genomics...of...Advanced...Sci....Res....Promotion...Center,...Organization...for...the...Promotion...of... Regional...Innovation...at...Mie...University P-55 P-56 --S 105-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 105 69...... Cystinuria...is...an...autosomal...metabolic...disorder...caused...by... mutations... in... the... SLC3A1... and/or... SLC7A9... genes,... encoding...the...amino...acid...transporter...proteins,...rBAT...and... b0,+ AT,...which...are...responsible...for...the...reabsorption...of... cystine...and...dibasic...amino...acids...(lysine,...ornithine,...and... arginine)...in...the...renal...proximal...tubule....The...impaired...renal... reabsorption...leads...hyperexcretion...of...cystine...in...urine.... Hexagonal... crystals... appear... in... the... urine... at... high... concentration...of...cystine,...because...of...its...low...solubility,...and... then...often...form...recurrent...renal...calculi...in...urinary...tract,... resulting...in...obstructive...uropathy....Here,...since...we...have... observed...renal...stones...in...an...inbred...mouse...strain...FVB/ NJcl,... we... characterized... this... mutant... phenotype,... and... identified...a...causal...mutation.... The...affected...mice...showed...a...bladder...full...of...cream-colored... calculi,...and...often...developed...kidney...failure....Typical...flat... hexagonal...crystals...were...observed...in...the...urine...from...the... affected...mice....Fourier...transform...infrared...spectrometry... analysis... revealed... that... the... calculi... were... composed... of... cystine....To...identify...the...causal...gene,...we...first...investigated... the...expression...of...Slc7a9...and...Slc3a1...genes,...known...disease... genes... for... cystinuria....RT-PCR...analysis...revealed...that... Slc7a9... expression... was... completely... abolished... in... the... affected...mouse...kidney....Next,...we...performed...PCR...of...the... genomic...DNA...for...sequencing...of...Slc7a9...exons....However,... we...could...not...amplify...the...exon-1...and...-2...regions...of...Slc7a9... gene...in...the...affected...mouse....Eventually,...we...identified...a... large...sequence...deletion...in...the...promoter...region...of...Slc7a9... gene...(c.-1,612_59del)...in...the...affected...mouse.... As...a...result...of...PCR-based...genotyping...in...our...FVB/NJcl... colony,...all...the...affected...mice...were...homozygous...for...the... Slc7a9...mutant...allele,...whereas...the...heterozygous...mice...did... not...show...cystine...crystal...in...urine....Then,...we...designated... the...mutant...allele...as...cys....Male...cys...mice...showed...calculi...in... the...bladder,...and...often...developed...kidney...failure...by...the... time...they...were...12...weeks...of...age....In...contrast,...female...cys... mice... showed... the... low... detection... rate... of... renal... stone... although...cystine...crystal...was...observed...in...the...urine....This... sex-dependency...is...commonly...observed...among...cystinuria... mouse...models.... Macaque...monkeys,...which...are...the...closest...to...humans...in... physiology...and...anatomy,...have...been...reported...to...be...useful... as...animal...models...for...various...diseases....We...have...studied... many... cardiac... diseases... in... macaques,... but... familial... cardiomyopathy,...which...is...known...to...occur...in...humans,...has... not...been...studied...as...much...due...to...the...difficulty...of...the... family...tree. In...this...study,...we...investigated...the...results...of...genealogical... research... and... physiological... tests... on... two... cases... of... cardiomyopathy...in...Japanese...macaques...that...occurred...at... the...Primate...Research...Institute...of...Kyoto...University...(the... 68th...report...of...this...society). Physiological... examinations... included... hematology,... biochemistry,...human...ANP...and...BNP,...troponin...I...and...T,... peripheral... venous... blood... pressure,... chest... X-ray,... electrocardiography,... echocardiography,... and... cardiac... pathology...after...euthanasia. Both...animals...showed...enlarged...cardiac...area...in...chest... X-ray,...hypotension,...and...regurgitation...at...the...mitral...and... tricuspid...valves...with...echocardiogram....The...QRS...interval... was... prolonged... in... both... animals,... and... the... QTc... was... prolonged... in... one... animal.... Echocardiography... and... pathological...examination...revealed...thinning...of...the...left... ventricular...wall...and...dilatation...of...the...right...ventricle...in... one...patient...and...thickening...of...the...left...ventricular...wall...in... the...other....In...addition,...we...found...an...individual...with...similar... findings... in... the... family... of... the... individual... with... left... ventricular...thickening. From...these...results,...it...was...confirmed...that...both...individuals... had...cardiomyopathy...and...presented...with...heart...failure.... The...left...ventricular...thickening...was...observed...in...this...case,... and...it...is...known...that...hypertrophic...cardiomyopathy...in... humans...is...often...an...ancestral...disease,...and...there...are...many... reports...on...the...causative...gene....There...is...a...high...possibility... that...some...genetic...mutation...may...be...involved...in...this...case... as...well,...and...since...the...disease...is...familial,...we...would...like...to... conduct...a...follow-up...survey...of...past...individuals...as...well...as... an...additional...survey...of...surviving...individuals. Establishment of a spontaneous cystinuria mouse model with FVB/N genetic background Takeru Sasaki, Hayato Sasaki, Koki Hiura, Masaki Watanabe, Nobuya Sasaki Laboratory...of...Laboratory...Animal...Science...and...Medicine,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Kitasato...University Analysis of pathogenesis and family tree in cases of Japanese macaque cardiomyopathy Shunya Nakayama1,3 , Hiroshi Koie1 , Chungyu Pai1,3 , Yoshiko Munesue3 , Kiichi Kanayama1 , Yuto Sawada2 , Takako Miyabe2 , Akihisa Kaneko2 , Naohide Ageyama3 1 Veterinary...physiology,...Nihon...UNIV.,...2 Primate...Research...Institute,...Kyoto...University,... 3 Tsukuba...Primate...Research...Center,...NIBION P-57 P-58 --S 106-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 106 69...... MicroRNAs... (miRNAs)...play...an... important...role...in... the... regulation...of...gene...expression,...and...their...involvement...in... carcinogenesis...is...also...attracting...attention. We...have...focused...on...acute...myeloid... leukemia... (AML),... which...is...known...to...be...caused...by...the...accumulation...of...very... few...genetic...mutations...compared...to...other...cancer...types. In...recent...years,...miRNA...mutations...have...been...reported... from... AML... patients,... among... which... miRNA-142-3p... mutation...was...the...most...frequent. In...this...study,...we...have...introduced...the...mutation...detected... in...AML...patients...into...miR-142-3p...of...C57BL/6N...mice...and... analyzed...the...phenotype...to...verify...the...possibility...that...point... mutations...in...miR-142...contribute...to...the...development...of... AML. Mice...homozygous...for...the...point...mutation...had...reduced...red... blood...cells,...white...blood...cells,...platelets,...and...lymphocytes,... and...enlarged...spleen...and...liver...compared...to...wild-type... mice. In...addition,...they...began...to...die...after...12...weeks...of...age,...and... few...survived...until...after...20...weeks...of...age....Furthermore,... even...in...heterozygotes,...the...white...blood...cell...count...was... decreased,...and...enlargement...of...the...spleen...was...observed... near...20...weeks...of...age.... When...heterozygous...bone...marrow...cells...were...transplanted... into...irradiated...recipient...mice...to...determine...if...they...were... cancerous,...after...20...weeks...of...transplantation,...many...of...the... mice...showed...a...large...increase...in...white...blood...cells...and... then...wasted...away,...and...by...37...weeks,...all...of...them...had...died... or...were...euthanized. Similar...results...were...obtained...in...an...experiment...in...which... bone... marrow... cells... from... homozygous... mice... were... transplanted,...indicating...that...the...introduction...of...a...point... mutation...in...miR-142-3p...has...a...manifestly...deleterious...effect... on...blood...cells. Diabetes...mellitus...is...known...several...complications...and...the... reports...of...diabetic...cardiomyopathy...(DiCM)...are...also...been... increasingly...all...over...the...worlds....However,...the...mechanism... of...DiCM...is...unknown....In...this...study,...we...evaluated...the... usefulness...of...screening...test...to...extract...DiCM...model...from... the...breeding...colony...of...cynomolgus...monkeys.... We...used...71...of...looks...like...healthy...cynomolgus...monkeys... that...kept...in...the...NIBIOHN....Blood...smears...were...stained... with...Giemsa...and...ultraviolet...stain,...then...the...white...blood... cell...fraction...and...reticulocyte...ratio...were...calculated...by... microscopy....In...addition,...we...used...a...hematology...analyzer... (ProCyte... Dx,... IDEXX)... for... complete... blood... count.... Moreover,...the...concentration...of...glycated...albumin...(GA),... HbA1c,...glucose,...ANP,...and...BNP...concentrations... were... measured,...and...the...correlation...between...each...values...were... analyzed.... There... were... correlations... between... the... hematology... analyzer...and...microscopy...for...the...ratio...of...reticulocyte,... neutrophil,...lymphocyte,...and...eosinophil....There...were...also... correlations...between...body...weight...and...GA...or...HbA1c,... respectively....Furthermore,...these...values...were...compared... between...the...groups...with...high...and...normal...levels...of...BNP.... The...results...showed...that,...significant...differences...were... observed...in...reticulocyte...ratio...and...GA...in...each...groups.... These...results,...suggested...that...the...presence...of...DiCM... monkeys...in...this...colony.... The...complete...blood...count...by...hematology...analyzer...was... considered... to... be... useful... for... analysis... of... DiCM... in... cynomolgus...monkeys....Furthermore,...the...test...of...GA...and... reticulocyte...ratio...may...be...useful...as...screening...indices...for... diagnosis...of...DiCM. Analysis of the mechanism of leukemia caused by gain-of-function mutations in miR-142 Shingo Kawano1 , Jie Bai2 , Goro Sashida2 , Imari Furukawa1 , Kumiko Yoshinobu1 , Yuri Kitamoto1 , Satoru Takahashi3 , Tadashi Kaname4 , Kimi Araki1 , Masatake Araki1 1 IRDA...Kumamoto...University,...2 IRCMS...Kumamoto...University,...3 Tsukuba...University,... 4 National...Center...for...Child...Health...and...Development Usefulness of Screening Test for Diabetic Cardiomyopathy in Nonhuman Primates Genya Tomonari1,2 , Hiroshi Koie1,2 , Shunya Nakayama1,2 , Chungyu Pai1,2 , Ryo Takashima1,2 , Yasuyo Ito-Fujishiro1,2 , Yuto Sawata3 , Kiichi Kanayama1 , Tadashi Sankai2 , Yasuhiro Yasutomi2 , Naohide Ageyama2 1 Laboratory...of...Veterinary...Physiology...and...Pathophysiology,...Nihon...University,...Kanagawa,...Japan 2 Tsukuba...Primate...Research...Center,...NIBIOHN,...Ibaraki,...Japan,...3 CPRLP,...Ibaraki,...Japan P-59 P-60 --S 107-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 107 69...... Cardiac...disease,...especially...myocarditis...is...the...leading... cause... of... human... morbidity... and... mortality.... Recently,... myocarditis...has...been...reported...as...a...side...effect...of...vaccines... for...COVID-19....However,...the...pathogenesis...and...treatment... of...myocarditis...are...still...unknown....Therefore,...we...have... been... developing... and... analyzing... an... experimental... autoimmune...myocarditis...(EAM)...model...using...cynomolgus... monkey,...which...are...more...closely...related...to...humans....In... this... study,... we... analyzed... the... kinetics... of... anti-myosin... antibodies...using...an...EAM...model...of...cynomolgus...monkey... Five...healthy...monkeys...that...kept...in...the...NIBIOHN...were... used...in...this...study....We...tried...to...induce...an...autoimmune... response...to...the...myocardium...in...these...monkeys....Blood... samples...were...collected...every...few...weeks,...and...cardio- specific...physiological...and...histopathological...examinations... were...performed....Blood...samples...were...used...for...measuring... the... temporal... variation... of... anti-myosin... antibodies... by... ELISA....The...results...showed...that...the...increasing...of...anti- myosin...antibodies...in...the...monkeys....In...addition,...changes...in... cardiac... contractility,... electrocardiography,... and... T-cell... responses...were...observed...with...the...increase...of...antibodies.... Moreover,...histopathological...analysis...revealed...myocardial... fibrosis...that...reflect...the...human...condition....These...results... indicate...that...the...changes...in...blood...anti-myosin...antibodies... in...the...EAM...model...faithfully...reflect...the...pathophysiology... of...myocarditis,...confirming...its...usefulness...as...a...pathological... model....In...conclusion,...this...EAM...model...may...be...useful...for... elucidating...new...pathological...mechanisms...and...treatment... of...myocarditis. [purpose] The...B...virus...is...the...pathogen...of...the...zoonosis... which...is...the...most...important...in...treating...a...monkey....It...is... revealed...that...human...infection...was...caused...in...Japan...in... 2019....It...is...expected...that...the...enhancement...of...laboratory... procedure,...the...prevention...and...the...cure...will...be...hurried.... However,...it...cannot...be...said...that...the...study...advances...in... Japan... because... it... is... needed... special... facilities... for... the... handling...of...the...infectious...virus....As...a...result...of...having... analyzed...reactivation...mechanism...of...Aujeszky's...disease... virus... (PRV)... to... belong... to... the... same... alphaherpesvirus... subfamily,...it...was...reported...the...possibility...to...inhibit...the... reactivation...of...the...latent...virus...by...suppressing...the...UL41... expression...using...CRISPR-Cas9....After...trying...it,...the...similar... method...may...be...applied...about...the...B...virus...and...some... knowledge...was...got. [materials and method] B... virus... UL41... gene... was... amplified...by...polymerase...chain...reaction...(PCR)...by...using... the...positive... template... for...PCR...test...(distributed... from... Georgia...State...University,...B...virus...Research...and...Resource... Laboratory),... and... the... sequence... of... upper... stream... was... decided... partly.... PAM... sequence... for... the... cause... was... searched...in...database...information...next...and...composed...4... sgRNA...candidate...sequence...and...evaluated...the...cutting... ability...for...the...PCR...product...using...Guide-itTM ...sgRNA...In... Vitro...Transcription...and...Screening...System. [a result and discussion]... The... sequence... of... upper... stream...of...the...amplified...PCR...product...accorded...with...the...B... virus...UL41...gene...in...the...database,...and...it...was...assumed... that...the...precise...PCR...product...was...provided....In...4...PAM... sequence...decided...the...sequence...in...the...database...for...the... cause,... the... cutting... ability... for... the... PCR... product... was... recognized...about...two...candidates.... Evaluation of Anti-myosin Antibodies in Experimental Autoimmune Cardiomyopathy Model (EAM) of Nonhuman Primates Ryo Takashima1,2 , Hiroshi Koie1 , Shunya Nakayama1,2 , Chungyu Pai1,2 , Genya Tomonari1,2 , Yasuyo Ito-Fujishiro1,2 , Yoshiko Munesue3 , Kiichi Kanayama1 , Tadashi Sankai2 , Yasuhiro Yasutomi2 , Naohide Ageyama2 1 Laboratory...of...Veterinary...Physiology...and...Pathophysiology,...Nihon...University,...Kanagawa,...Japan 2 Tsukuba...Primate...Research...Center,...NIBIOHN,...Ibaraki,...Japan,...3 CPRLP,...Ibaraki,...Japan For inhibition of latent infection B virus reactivation using CRISPR-Cas9 Seiichi TANAKA Fukuoka...University,...Center...for...Experimental...Animals P-61 P-62 --S 108-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 108 69...... Adriamycin...(ADR)-induced...nephropathy...is...frequently... utilized...as...a...rodent...model...of...podocytopathy....Among... mouse...strains,...BALB/c...mice...and...129/SvJ...are...sensitive...to... ADR....However,...C57BL/6...(B6)...mice,the...most...commonly... used...strain,...are...resistant...to...ADR...and...so...the...mouse... strains...with...B6...genetic...background...were...not...applicable... to...ADR...nephropathy....In...our...laboratory,...we...generated... Prkdc...R2140C...knock-in...mice...(B6-PrkdcR2140C )...and...showed... that...these...mice...exhibit...acute...kidney...injury...comparable...to... that...of...BALB/c....However,...we...did...not...test...whether...the... novel...strain,...B6-PrkdcR2140C ,...would...develop...chronic...kidney... disease...(CKD)...after...administration...of...ADR....In...addition,... BALB/c...and...B6J...have...been...reported...to...differ...in...various... phenotypes,...but...no...strain...differences... are...known...for... kidney... disease,... especially... ADR...nephropathy.... In...this... study,...we...investigated...whether...B6-PrkdcR2140C ...could...be... converted...to...CKD...by...blood...chemistry...and...histopathology... after...ADR...administration...and...whether...there...is...a...strain... difference...against...ADR...nephropathy...by...comparing...the... results...with...BALB/c. The...renal...pathology...of...B6-PrkdcR2140C ...on...day...28...of...ADR... treatment...showed...glomerulosclerosis,...tubular...atrophy... and...interstitial...fibrosis,...indicating...a...shift...to...CKD....In... comparison...with...BALB/c,...serum...BUN,...creatine...levels,... urinary... albumin... levels,... glomerulosclerosis,... and... tubulointerstitial... damage... severity... were... significantly... lower...in...B6-PrkdcR2140C ....On...the...other...hand,...the...degree...of... renal...interstitial...fibrosis...in...both...strains...was...comparable. The... ihs... mouse... is... a... novel... congenital... diabetic... model... derived...from...the...ICGN...mouse...that...is...a...model...of...chronic... kidney...disease....This...mouse...is...characterized...by...glucose... intolerance...and...hypoinsulinemia...after...glucose...loading,...as... well...as...severe...impairment...of...glucose-stimulated...insulin... secretion....Genetic...linkage...analysis...for...blood...glucose...after... oral...glucose...loading...and...comprehensive...gene...expression... analysis...for...candidate...genes...suggested...that...the...Nihs... gene,...which...showed...a...significant...decrease...in...the...ihs... islets,...was...a...strong...candidate...gene...for...hypoinsulinemia...in... the...ihs...mice....To...clarify...the...function...of...Nihs...gene...on... glucose...metabolism...by...using...Nihs...knockout...mice...(Nihs- KO),...we...performed...the...oral...glucose...tolerance...test...(OGTT)... and...perfusion...experiments...in...mouse...pancreata....As...the... results... of... OGTT,... Nihs-KO... mice... showed... significant... glucose...intolerance...(AUC:...B6:...26106.3984.8...vs...Nihs-KO:... 33641.71688.3,...p<0.001)...and...hypoinsulinemia...(AUC:...B6:... 32.21.9...vs...Nihs-KO:...16.51.4,...p<0.01)...similar...to...those...in... ihs...mice....It...was...unexpected...that...the...glucose-stimulated... insulin... secretory... capacity... of... Nihs-KO... mice... was... comparable... to... that... of... control... mice... in... situ... pancreas... perfusion...experiments...(B6:...99.813.7...vs...Nihs-KO:...109.4 7.9,...p=0.60)....Although...the...impairment...of...glucose...tolerance... and...hypoinsulinamia...in...the...ihs...mice...are...caused...by...the... disfunction...of...Nihs...gene,...it...is...suggested...that...the...Nihs... gene...in...the...islets...is...not...involved...in...the...insulin...secretion... but...the...degradation...and/or...stability...of...insulin....Therefore,... we...evaluated...the...ability...of...insulin...clearance...of...Nihs-KO... mice,...indicating...that...the...insulin...clearance...ability...of...Nihs- KO...mice...was...comparable...to...that...of...control...mice....In... addition,...we...also...revealed...that...there...is...no...difference...in... the...expression...levels...of...insulin-degrading...enzymes...in...the... Nihs-KO...mice....These...results...suggested...that...the...Nihs... gene...is...a...novel...gene...involved...in...the...stability...of...insulin...in... the...mouse...islets. Genetic background dependent diversity in ADR nephropathy in the mouse Masaki Watanabe1 , Koki Hiura1 , Kenta Nakano2 , Tadashi Okamura2 , Hayato Sasaki1 , Nobuya Sasaki1 1 Laboratory...of...Laboratory...Animal...Science...and...Medicine,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Kitasato...University, 2 Department...of...Laboratory...Animal...Medicine,...Research...Institute,...National...Center...for...Global...Health...and...Medicine Identification of the gene responsible for glucose intolerance and hypoinsulinemia in the ihs mice Kenta Nakano1 , Yukiko Shimizu1 , Nobuya Sasaki2 , Tadashi Okamura1 1 Department...of...Laboratory...Animal...Medicine,...Research...Institute,...National...Center...for...Global...Health...and...Medicine,...... 2 Laboratory...of...Laboratory...Animal...Science...and...Medicine,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Kitasato...University P-63 P-64 --S 109-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 109 69...... Late...infantile...neuronal...ceroid...lipofuscinosis...type...2...(CLN2)... is...an...inherited...neurodegenerative...disease...in...childhood.... CLN2... is... characterized... by... systemic... accumulation... of... lipofuscin...and...progressive...motor...dysfunction,...although... some...patients...exhibit...cardiac...and...visual...failure...at...the... very...latest...stages...of...disease....Based...on...identification...of... mutated...gene,...clinical...signs...and...pathology,...we...discovered... a...family...of...cynomolgus...macaques...with...CLN2...disease...at... Tsukuba...Primate...Research...Center....We...aimed...to...clarify... the...clinical...course...in...a...CLN2 -/- cynomolgus...macaque....We... performed...head...magnetic...resonance...imaging...(MRI)...every... 2... months.... We... also... performed... fundus... examination,... echocardiogram,...and...measurements...of...electrocardiogram... and...blood...pressure...every...3-6...months....The...head...MRI... revealed...that...at...1.0...year...of...age,...cerebellum...and...cerebrum... had... been... already... atrophied... and... those... atrophies... progressed...for...two...years...comparing...to...age-matched... normal... control.... Meanwhile,... detectable... abnormalities... weren't...able...to...observe...in...fundus...examination....There... were...slight...cardiac...abnormalities...at...the...middle...to...latest... of...the...disease....Creatine...phosphokinase...(CPK)...showed... high...values...from...the...early...stage...of...the...disease....These... results...suggested...that...the...MRI...was...useful...in...detecting... early...alteration...in...brain...even...before...clinical...onset,...and... CPK...might...be...a...biomarker...of...CLN2...disease....All...of...these... tests...we...performed...were...less...invasive...and...would...be... suitable... tools... for... the... future... clinical... evaluation... of... therapeutic...strategy. Multiple...sclerosis...(MS)...is...a...chronic...inflammatory...disease... characterized...by...demyelination...at...the...white...matter...in... the...central...nervous...system...(CNS),...leading...to...functional... reduction...of...neurons....Autoreactive...T...cells,...which...are... capable... of... recognizing... neuron-derived... antigens,... are... responsible...for...the...induction...of...inflammatory...in...the...CNS.... Experimental...Autoimmune...Encephalomyelitis...(EAE),...an... animal...disease...model...of...multiple...sclerosis,...has...contributed... to...the...understanding...of...the...pathogenesis...in...MS,...in...which... Th1...cells...producing...IFN-...and...Th17...cells...producing...IL- 17... are... involved... in... eliciting... chronic... inflammation.... However,...there...still...remains...a...question...what...factor(s)... ignites...chronic...inflammation...in...the...CNS....GPR141...is...a...new... orphan... GPCR,... which... was... identified... by... amino... acid... sequence...homology...search....GPR141...belongs...to...the...family... A,...which...includes...receptors...associated...with...mast...cell's... degranulation... and... chronic... airway... inflammation.... Therefore,...GPR141...is...predicted...as...a...receptor...able...to... regulate...inflammation...and...allergic...responses,...but...the... physiological...functions...and...its...ligands...remain...unclear....In... this...study,...we...generated...Gpr141-/- ...mice...and...analyzed... the...role...of...GPR141...in...the...immune...system....Gpr141-/- ... mice...exacerbated...EAE...compared...to...WT...mice...and...the... number... of... myeloid... cells... infiltrating... in... spinal... cord... increased...in...Gpr141-/- ...mice...after...EAE...induction....Recall... response...of...lymphocytes...to...MOG35-55 ...was...increased...in... Gpr141-/- ... mice.... These... data... show... that... GPR141... is... a... negative...factor...for...chronic...inflammation...in...the...CNS....We... would... like... to... discuss... how... GPR141... functions... in... the... pathogenesis...of...chronic...inflammation...in...the...CNS.
