Stem... Cell... Factor... (SCF)/KIT... ligand... is... a... cytokine... produced...mainly...by...fibroblasts...and...endothelial...cells....SCF... binds...to...a...specific...receptor...called...c-Kit...(CD117)...and...plays... an...important...role...in...the...survival...and...maintenance...of...a... variety...of...cells....Mice...harboring...spontaneous...mutations...in... Kitl...and...Kit...genes...were...well-known...as...Steel...(Sl)...and... dominant-White Spotting...(W),...respectively....Abnormal... signal...of...SCF/c-Kit...showed...various...phenotypes,...such...as... white...coat...color,...anemia,...gastric...ulcer,...mast...cell...defect,... and...infertility....SCF...exists...both...as...a...soluble...SCF...(sSCF)... and... the... membrane... bound... SCF... (mSCF).... mSCF... is... processed...to...sSCF...by...a...particular...protease....Sld ...mutant... mice,...which...produce...only...sSCF,...show...various...phenotypes,... indicating...a...prior...role...of...mSCF....However,...the...biological... significance...of...mSCF...and...sSCF...has...still...been...unclear.... Therefore,... in... this... study,... we... developed... novel... less- sheddable...Kit...ligand...mutant...(Kitl ls )...mice...by...genome... editing,...and...analyzed...the...phenotypes. Mutant...mice...were...produced...by...the...i-GONAD...method.... For... evaluation... of... the... effect... on... coat... color,... we... first... generated...colored...ICR...by...introducing...reverse...mutation... (S103C)... into... Tyr... gene.... Then,... the... major... proteolytic... cleavage...site..."VAAS"...in...exon...6...and...rodent...specific...minor... site..."KAAK"...in...exon...7...were...consecutively...edited,...and...cis- knock-in...Kitlls ...mice...were...successfully...established....Kitlls/ls ... colored... ICR... mice... showed... a... hyperpigmentation-like... phenotype,...indicating...that...dominant...expression...of...mSCF... enhanced...signaling...in...melanocytes...in vivo....This...result... suggests...that...Kitlls ...mice...are...a...useful...tool...for...analyzing... the...biological...significance...of...mSCF...and...sSCF. In...human,...myosin...VI...(MYO6)...haploinsufficiency...causes... postlingual... progressive... hearing... loss.... Because... the... usefulness... of... mouse... models... remains... unclear,... we... produced... novel... Myo6... null... (Myo6 em1Tmims/em1Tmims :... /)... mutant...mice...and...analyzed...the...hearing...phenotypes...of... Myo6 +/- (+/)...heterozygous...mutants....We...first...recorded... and...compared...the...auditory...brainstem...responses...and... distortion... product... otoacoustic... emissions... in... control... Myo6 +/+ ...(+/+)...wild-type...and...+/...mice....These...hearing... phenotypes... of... +/... mice... were... mild;... however,... we... confirmed...that...+/...mice...developed...progressive...hearing... loss....In...particular,...the...hearing...loss...of...female...+/...mice... progressed... faster... than... that... of... male... +/... mice.... The... stereocilia...bundles...of...+/...mice...exhibited...progressive... taper...loss...in...cochlear...inner...hair...cells...(IHCs)...and...outer... hair...cells...(OHCs)....The...loss...of...OHCs...in...+/...heterozygotes... occurred...at...an...earlier...age...than...in...+/+...mice....In...particular,... the...OHCs...at...the...basal...area...of...the...cochlea...were...decreased... in...+/...mice....IHC...ribbon...synapses...from...the...area...at...the... base...of...the...cochlea...were...significantly...reduced...in...+/ mice.... Thus,... our... study... indicated... that... MYO6... haploinsufficiency...affected...the...detection...of...sounds...in... mice,...and...we...suggest...that...+/...mice...with...Myo6...null... alleles...are...useful...animal...models...for...gene...therapy...and... drug...treatment...in...patients...with...progressive...hearing...loss... due...to...MYO6...haploinsufficiency. Yasuda1 , Yoshiaki Kikkawa1 1 Deafness...Project,...Tokyo...Metropolitan...Institute...of...Medical...Science,... 2 Laboratory...for...Transgenic...Technology,...Tokyo...Metropolitan...Institute...of...Medical...Science P-67 P-68 --S 111-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 111 69...... Cystinosis...is...an...autosomal...recessive...disorder...in...which... cystine... accumulates... in... lysosomes... due... to... the... loss... of... function...of...the...cystine...transporter,...cystinosin...(CTNS)... gene....Cystine...accumulates...throughout...the...body,...leading... to...Fanconi's...syndrome...at...around...6...months...of...age,...chronic... renal...failure...at...around...10...years...of...age,...and...various...other... complications....Early...administration...of...cysteamine,...the... only... therapeutic... drug... for... cystinosis,... is... effective... in... delaying...the...onset...of...the...disease...and...reducing...symptoms.... It...has... been... reported... that... cystine... levels... of...congenic... C57BL/6...(B6)...Ctns...knockout...(Ctns-KO)...tissues...were... significantly...higher...than...those...of...FVB/N...(FVB)...Ctns-KO... tissues,... indicating... the... accumulation... of... the... Ctns-KO... tissues...is...dependent...on...the...genetic...background...(Nevo...N... et...al,...2009)....To...identify...the...modifier...gene...involved...in... cystine...metabolism...in...the...Ctns-KO...mice,...we...performed... the...genetic...association...analysis...and...quantitative...trait... locus...(QTL)...analysis...for...cystine...accumulation...using...171... (B6...Ctns-KOxFVB...Ctns-KO)...x...B6...Ctns-KO...N2...backcross... progeny...by...using...chi-square...test...and...map...manager...QTX,... respectively....Cystine...levels...in...the...liver...and...kidney...of... 25-week-old...individuals...were...measured...using...LC-MS/MS.... Cystine...levels...in...B6,...FVB...and...F1...Ctns-KO...liver...were... 25.510.2,...1.90.31...and...0.340.02...(nmol...1/2...cystine/mg... protein),...respectively....There...was...no...significant...difference... in...cystine...contents...between...B6,...FVB...and...F1...Ctns-KO... kidney.... Using... chi-square... analysis,... we... detected... a... significant... association... of... the... camf... locus... with... SSLP... marker...on...chromosome...12...(D12mit34,...p=8.0E-12)....QTL... analysis...for...cystine...levels...in...the...liver...also...showed...one... significant...QTL...peak...on...the...same...locus...with...likelihood... ratio...statistic...(LRS)...score...of...57.6....These...results...indicate... that...B6...Ctns-KO...mice...have...a...modifier...gene...responsible... for...marked...cystine...accumulation...in...the...liver...on...mouse... chromosome...12....The...identification...of...the...gene...mutation... will...expand...our...understanding...of...cystinosis...pathogenesis,... and...provide...new...insights...into...cystine...metabolism. Acute...damage,...late...effect...and...effect...of...repeated...low...dose... exposure...by...whole...body...X-ray...irradiation...were...examined... in...male...C57BL/6J,...BALB/cAnNCr...and...C3H/HeJ...mice.... For...acute...damage,...the...mice...were...irradiated...with...single... doses... of... 0.1~10... Gy,... and... 3... days... later,... examined... for... hematology,... blood... chemistry... tissue... weight... and... histopathology....For...late...effect,...the...mice...were...exposed...to... 0.1...or...2...Gy...and...examined...6...months...later....In...repeated...low... dose...exposure,...the...mice...received...10...or...50...mGy...once...a... week...for...10...weeks. [Results]...Acute...damage:...In...all...strains,...body...weight,...food... consumption,... water... intake... and... WBC... decreased:... the... sensitivity...was...BALB/cAnNCrC57BL/6JC3H/HeJ.... At...10...Gy,...blood...glucose...and...cholesterol...were...raised,... while...albumin...decreased....In...C57BL/6J,...elevation...of...total... bilirubin...was...found....The...weight...of...spleen,...thymus...and... testis...reduced....Cell...density...in...thymus...and...bone...marrow... were...lowered,...and...atrophy...of...the...intestinal...mucosa...were... observed. Late... effects:... Blood... glucose... and... cholesterol... slightly... elevated...in...all...strains....By...2...Gy...exposure,...the...weight...of... thymus...and...testis...decreased,...and...mild...degeneration...were... observed...in...seminiferous...tubule. Effects...of...repeated...low...dose...exposure:...Blood...glucose...was... dose-dependently...raised... in... all... strains.... In... C57BL/6J,... increased... water... intake... and... decrease... of... WBC... were... observed. [Discussion]... Whole... body... X-ray... irradiation... induced... increase...of...blood...glucose...and...cholesterol...in...all...strains.... The...effects...remained...even...6...months...after...irradiation,... suggesting... the... possibility... of...irreversible... damage.... In... addition,...elevated...total...bilirubin...found...in...C57BL/6J...mice... by...10...Gy...exposure...may...possibly...reflect...hepatobiliary... damage. A genetic mapping of responsible loci for cystine accumulation using Cystinosin knockout mice Yukiko Shimizu1,2 , Kenta Nakano1 , Tadashi Okamura1 1 Department...of...Laboratory...Animal...Medicine,...Research...Institute,...NCGM... 2 Department...of...Pediatrics,...School...of...medicine,...Juntendo...University Effects of X-ray exposure in 3 strains of mice: acute, late and repeated low dose Kazunori Ozawa1,2 , Yoshiko Hashimoto1 , Yuko Yamamoto1 , Junji Ezaki1 , Kiyoaki Katahira1 1 Translational...Research...Center,...2 Laboratory...Animal...Research...Center,...Fukushima...Medical...University P-69 P-70 --S 112-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 112 69...... [Introduction] The... common... marmoset... (marmoset,... Callithrix jacchus)...is...a...fecund,...small,...non-human...primate.... Several... methods... for... genetic... modification... have... been... established...in...the...marmosets,...and...the...gene...manipulated... marmosets...are...considered...beneficial...as...experimental... animals....The...target...gene...knockdown...(KD)...technology...can... reversibly...control...gene...expression...by...the...tetracycline... (Dox)...system....The...KD...can...avoid...embryonic...lethality...and... create... genetically... modified... models... that... cannot... be... achieved...with...knockout...technology....In...this...study,...we... attempted...to...create...a...KD...marmoset...that...reversibly... develops...type...II...diabetes...by...controlling...the...expression...of... the...insulin...receptor...(INSR)...by...Dox. [Methods] Six...types...of...Dox-inducible...shRNA-expressing... lentiviral...vectors...with...GFP...as...a...gene...integration...marker... were...generated,...and...their...KD...efficiency...was...examined.... In vitro...or...in...vivo...fertilized...oocytes...were...infected...with... the...shRNA...and...GFP...expressing...lentiviral...vectors....The... embryos... expressing... GFP... were... transplanted... into... recipients....When...the...founders...were...sexually...mature,...F1... was... produced... by... artificial... insemination... or... in vitro fertilization....The...F1...animals...were...orally...administered... with...Dox...for...five...days,...and...changes...in...body...weight,... water...intake,...and...blood...glucose...were...examined. [Result and discussion]... Six... founders... have... been... obtained...through...embryo...transfer....To...date,...three...of...them... have...reached...sexual...maturity...and...successfully...produced... F1,...indicating...a...germline...transmission....In...addition,...F1... orally...treated...with...Dox...showed...increased...water...intake... and...elevated...blood...glucose...levels,...confirming...the...onset...of... diabetes....In...conclusion,...we...have...successfully...produced... the...first...KD...model...of...type...II...diabetes...in...non-human... primates. The... Arg/N-degron... pathway... is... a... ubiquitin-protein... degradation...pathway...in...which...the...N-terminal...amino...acid... residue...is...used...as...a...proteolytic...signal...(N-degron),...and...a... group...of...ubiquitin...ligases...that...specifically...recognize...and... bind... to... N-degron... are... called... N-recognin.... UBR... box... N-recognin...4...(UBR4)...is...one...of...the...N-recognins,...a...large... protein... with... a... molecular... weight... of... 574,000... that... is... evolutionarily...conserved...in...multicellular...organisms,...but... its...physiological...functions...and...molecular...mechanisms... remain...unclear....The...Ubr4...gene...is...essential...during...mouse... development,... as... UBR4... gene... knockout... mice... exhibit... embryonic...lethality...with...abnormal...angiogenesis...in...Yolk... Sac....To...investigate...the...role...of...the...Ubr4...gene...in...adult... mice,... we... generated... conditional... UBR4KO... mice... by... crossing...UBR4flox ...mice...with...tissue-specific...Cre...mice.... Among... them,... we... report... the... phenotype... specific... to... intestinal...epithelium....No...difference...was...found...in...intestinal... tissue... samples... from... mice... lacking... the... intestinal... epithelium-specific...Ubr4...gene...(UBR4(-)...group)...and...wild- type... (UBR4(+)... group).... On... the... other... hand,... when... azoxymethane...(AOM)/dextran...sulfate...sodium...(DSS)...was... administered...and...a...colitis-associated...colorectal...cancer... model...was...created,...the...degree...of...colitis...tended...to...worsen... in...the...UBR4(-)...group....In...addition,...when...colorectal...cancer... was...generated...by...long-term...rearing...after...AOM/DSS... administration,...the...incidence...of...colorectal...cancer...was... found...to...be...significantly...higher...in...the...UBR4(-)...group...than... in...the...UBR4(+)...group....These...results...suggest...that...UBR4... plays...an...inhibitory...role...in...colitis...and...colon...carcinogenesis.... ... CRISPR/Cas9...system...is...now...widely...used...in...the...fields...of... basic... and... applied... studies... and... expected... for... clinical... application...to...therapies...of...cancers...and...genetic...diseases.... We...have...produced...adenovirus...vectors...(AdVs)...expressing... multiplex...gRNAs...and...found...that...these...AdVs...can...disrupt... genes...of...hepatitis...B...virus...and...human...papilloma...virus...in... vitro...by...simultaneous...infection...together...with...the...AdV... expressing... Cas9... or... Cas9... nickase.... Moreover,... we... established...a...system...simultaneously...administrating...the... AdVs...to...mice...and...found...efficient...knockout...of...the...target... gene... in... the... liver... cells.... Successful...knock-in... was... also... occurred...by...simultaneous...injection...of...the...Cas9...nickase- expressing...AdV...and...an...AdV...containing...both...double- nicking...gRNAs...and...a...donor...DNA. Phenylketonuria... (PKU)... is... the... most... frequent... and... important... inherited... metabolic... disease,... caused... by... deficiency...of...hepatic...phenylalanine...hydroxylase...(Pah)... gene....We...have... succeeded... in...curing...PKU...disease...by... administration...of...an...AdV...overexpressing...Pah...in...PKU... mouse...model,...although...the...normal...range...of...the...serum... phenylalanine...concentration...remained...only...for...14...d...in... this...system....In...this...study,...we...constructed...several...knock- in...AdVs...containing...both...multiplex...gRNA...units...and...a... donor...DNA....When...the...AdVs...were...infected...to...the...culture... cells...together...with...the...Cas9/Cas9...nickase...expressing... AdVs,...the...point...mutation...in...the...Pah...gene...was...corrected.... The...knock-in...efficiency...was...found...to...be...the...highest...(4%)... when...the...donor...DNA...was...excised...out...from...the...AdV... genome...by...utilizing...gRNA-mediated...cleavage....We...are... now...administrating...the...knock-in...AdVs...to...the...PKU...mouse... model... to... evaluate... the... therapeutic... potential... of... gene... therapy...approaches...for...the...treatment...of...PKU.... RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center...(BRC)...is...the...largest... comprehensive...bioresource...center...that...provides,...study,... and... develop... various... kinds... of... bioresources... such... as... experimental...animals...(e.g.,...mouse...strains),...cell...materials... (e.g.,...cancer...cells),...and...DNA...materials...(e.g.,...mouse...BAC... clones)....Expanding...the...resource...usage...for...biomedical... research...fields...is...one...of...the...center's...missions....Moreover,... it...is...the...core...competence...that...the...center...can...provide... simultaneously...various...kinds...of...bioresources....So...far,...the... center...has...developed...a...bioresource...retrieval...system... (BRC...Catalogue...Retrieval...System,...https://brc.riken.jp)...so... that... experimental... researchers... can... precisely... and... comprehensively...find...their...interested...bioresources...using... official...gene...and...protein...symbols...and...synonyms,...the... cross-search... between... species... through... orthologue... information,...and...English...and...Japanese...disease...names...and... the...International...Classification...of...Diseases...(ICD)....In...this... presentation,... we... share... the... retrieval... system... usage,... including... the... bulk... search... method... for... experimental... animals...(e.g.,...disease...model...mice)...and...the...relevant...gene... and...cell...materials. [Object]...Although...conventional...laboratory...mice...are... widely... used... in... biomedical... research,... their... genetic... diversity...is...limited....Wild-derived...mice...(wild...mice)...can... compensate...for...this...disadvantage,...but...adapting...assisted... reproductive... technology... to... them... has... been... difficult,... making...their...maintenance...inefficient...in...many...mouse... facilities....In...this...study,...we...attempted...to...establish...and... characterize... nuclear... transfer... Embryonic... Stem... Cells... (ntESCs)... from... wild... mouse... strains... as... the... backup... forgenetic...preservation...of...these...strains.... [Methods] B6D2F1...(M. m. domesticus)...females...were... used...to...collect...oocytes...for...nuclear...transfer....Granulocytes... or...monocytes...derived...from...CASP/1Nga...or...CAST/Ei...(M. m. castaneus),...subspecies...wild...strains,...were...used...as... nuclear...donors....NtESC...lines...were...established...from...the... inner...cell...mass...of...reconstructed...blastocysts...cultured...with... DMEM...supplemented...with...2i...and...LIF....NtESC...lines...thus... established...were...examined...for...their...microsatellites...and... mtDNA....Their...qualities...were...confirmed...by...analyzing...the... expressions...of...pluripotent...marker...genes,...the...number...of... chromosomes,... and... the... teratoma... formation... ability.... Chimeric...mice...were...produced...by...injection...of...ntESCs...into... 8-cell-...or...blastocyst-stage...embryos.... [Results]...13...and...11...ntESC...lines...were...established...from... CASP/1Nga...and...CAST/Ei,...respectively....The...microsatellite... patterns...revealed...their...donor...nuclear...origin,...while...their... mtDNAs...were...replaced...with...those...of...recipient...oocytes.... We...used...high-quality...cell...lines...for...injection...into...8-cells...or... blastocysts...and...obtained...chimeric...mice...in...both...strains.... Furthermore,...we...confirmed...germline...transmission...using... a...male...ntESC...line...from...CAST/Ei.... In...recent...years,...the...production...of...genetically...modified... rats... has... increased... rapidly,... brought... about... by... the... development...of...genome-editing...technology....In...response... to... this,... we... at... CARD... have... developed... reproductive... technology... in... rats,... and... launched... a... private... rat... bank... service...and...a...research...support...service...for...rats...in...2019... (https://ratbank.weebly.com/)....In...addition,...in...2020,...we... have...succeeded...in...rat...sperm...freezing...(Nakagata,...et...al.),... and...have...subsequently...started...to...cryopreserve...not...only... fertilized...oocytes...but...also...sperm...taken...from...rats....Indeed,... we...have...already...frozen...sperm...taken...from...many...breeds... of...genetically...modified...rat...up...to...now....In...this...presentation,... we...will...introduce...the...rat...sperm...freezing...system...used...in... the... CARD... Private... Rat... Bank... Service... as... well... as... the... results...of...IVF...carried...out...using...frozen-thawed...rat...sperm. The...domestic...and...international...transport...of...laboratory... animals...and...biomaterials...has...been...adversely...affected...by... the...global...spread...of...COVID-19....CARD...Mouse...Bank...has... long...been...involved...in...the...transport...of...live...mice...and... cryopreserved... or... refrigerated... sperm... and... embryos.... Cryopreserved...embryos...and...sperm...are...transported...using... a...dry...shipper...in...which...the...temperature...can...be...kept...at... -196C... for... two... to... three... weeks.... The... transport... of... biomaterials...using...a...dry...shipper...is...available...to...both... Japanese...and...international...research...institutions....However,... in...recent...years...some...Japanese...domestic...carriers...have... refused...to...accept...dry...shippers...due...to...worries...that...excess... leftover...liquid...nitrogen...therein...may...result...in...transport... problems...or...safety...hazards....Before...transporting...frozen... embryos... or... sperm,... all... dry... shipper... users... should... understand... and... implement... the... proper... dry... shipper... handling...practices....(http://card.medic.kumamoto-u.ac.jp/ card/japanese/manual/dryshipper/index.html) An...alternative...method...that...does...not...require...the...use...of... dry...shippers...is...the...refrigerated...transport...of...embryos...and... sperm....This...method...requires...the...use...of...refrigerated... transport...kits...and...refrigeration...storage...solutions....Dry...ice... can...also...be...used...to...transport...frozen...sperm,...and...various... methods...can...be...used...to...transport...biological...samples....In... this... presentation,... we... will... introduce... the... methods... of... transport...used...at...CARD,...present...CARD's...past...results,... and... share... information... on... how... to... safely... transport... genetically...modified...mice...during...the...COVID-19...pandemic. The... National...BioResource...Project...-...Rat...(NBRP-Rat),... started... its... first... term... of... collecting,... preserving,... and... providing...rat...resources...in...2002....Since...then,...it...has...been... used...by...many...researchers...in...Japan...and...abroad...up...to...the... current... fourth... term.... Deposits... of... rat... resources... are... accepted...free...of...charge,...and...are...safely...stored...in...the...form... of...frozen...sperm...and...embryos....In...addition,...the...backups... are...stored...by...RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center....The... deposited...strains...can...be...kept...private...until...the...research... results... are... published.... Recently,... there... has... been... an... increase...in...the...number...of...genome-edited...rats...deposited,... and...we...look...forward...to...your...active...deposit...even...before... the...publication...of...your...paper.... The... deposited... rat... strains... are... widely... disseminated... through...the...NBRP-Rat...website...and...in...collaboration...with... the...Rat...Genome...Database,...an...international...rat...database.... Since...the...number...of...available...strains...of...the...NBRP-Rat...is... 1.6...times...more...than...that...in...the...Rat...Resource...&...Research... Center,...the...NBRP-Rat...is...the...largest...rat...resource...center... in...the...world....It...is...widely...used...for...various...disease...models,... systemic...or...tissue-specific...reporter...rats,...and...Cre...rats.... The... Institute... of... Medical... Science,... The... University... of... Tokyo...is...in...charge...of...providing...severe...immunodeficiency... rats. In...the...fourth...term,...we...are...focusing...on...the...development... of...rat...reproductive...technology,...and...disseminating...the... results...obtained...through...training....The...training...has...been... held... 11... times,... and... 27... people... from... 22... institutions... nationwide...have...participated....In...the...fifth...term,...we...will... also...start...a...new...experiment...such...as...rental...labs...to...make... rats... readily... available... to... researchers... who... have... no... experience...in...rat...keeping. To...use...model...organisms,...information...of...the...genomes...and... their...variations...is...indispensable...for...strategic...planning...of... biomedical... researches... and... its... effective... execution.... Experimental...mouse...strains...are...the...advanced...models...in... biomedical...researches...and...their...genomes...have...mosaic... structures...with...discrete...segments...originating...from...at... least...three...genetically...divergent...subspecies....We...have... conducted... a... whole-genome... resequencing... of... 10... wild- derived...inbred...mouse...strains...originated...from...the...above- mentioned...different...subspecies....More...than...40...million... nucleotide...variations...from...the...results...are...open...to...public... via...the...mouse...genome...database...of...RIKEN...BRC,...MoG+... (https://molossinus.brc.riken.jp/mogplus/)....MoG+...enables... the...user...to...visualize...intuitively...those...nucleotide...variations... in...the...genes...and...intergenic...regions...of...the...multiple...mouse... strains.... In... this... presentation,... we... introduce... current... upgrading...of...MoG+...to...apply...the...contents...in...data...science... field...analysis...to...link...genomic...variations...of...mouse...for... biomedical...researches. The...CARD...Mouse...Bank...aims...to...promote...and...support... biomedical...research...using...genetically...engineered...mice....In... the...CARD...Mouse...Bank,...we...provide...two...types...of...mouse... bank... system:... a... Public... Mouse... Bank... System... and... a... Premium...Mouse...Bank...System....The...Public...Mouse...Bank... System...aids...the...sharing...of...genetically...engineered...mice... by...supporting...the...production,...preservation...and...supply... thereof.... In... the... system,... we... archive... cryopreserved... embryos...and...sperm...derived...from...genetically...engineered... mice.... Information... concerning... the... archived... mice... is... published...on...the...websites...of...CARD...R-BASE...(https:// cardmice.com/rbase/)...and...the...International...Mouse...Strain... Resource... (IMSR,... http://www.findmice.org/).... All... researchers... can... use... the... mice... under... the... terms... of... a... material...transfer...agreement....On...the...other...hand,...the... CARD...Premium...Mouse...Bank...System...enables...the...efficient... preservation...and...production...of...genetically...engineered... mice... for... a... fee.... Using... the... system,... researchers... can... efficiently...manage...animal...production...plans...based...on...an... experiment...design;...recover...a...mouse...line...suffering...from... subfertility...or...infertility;...and...clean...up...mice...of...pathogenic... organisms...before...they...enter...an...animal...facility....In...this... presentation,...we...will...present...in...detail...the...activities...of... CARD...Mouse...Bank...in...terms...of...the...number...of...requests... made...to...each...bank...for...the...preservation...of...cryopreserved... embryos...and...sperm,...and...the...supply...of...embryos,...sperm... and...live...pups. The...RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center...(BRC)...was... established...in...2001...and...has...been...selected...as...the...core... facility... of... the... mice... (NBRP-Mice)... by... the... National... BioResource...Project...(NBRP)...of...the...Ministry...of...Education,... Culture,...Sports,...Science...and...Technology...since...2002....We... report... on... achievements... of... NBRP-Mice... and... users'... publications...during...the...4th...phase...(FY2017-2021)...of...NBRP.... The...NBRP-Mice...mainly...has...collected,...preserved,...quality- control...and...distribute...mouse...strains...developed...in...Japan.... We...have...contributed...to...the...promotion...of...life...sciences...in... Japan...and...overseas...by...providing...mouse...resources...unique... to...Japan...that...do...not...overlap...with...those...overseas....In...the... 4th...phase...of...NBRP-Mice,...1,397...genetically-modified...mouse... strains...have...been...deposited...by...290...researchers....Through... rigorous...microbial...and...genetic...quality...testing,...we...have... distributed...12,700...high-quality...mouse...resources...to...1,880... researchers...at...873...institutions...in...Japan...and...the...world...(941... researchers... at... 484... institutions... from... 32... overseas... countries)....Users...of...our...mice...have...published...332...papers... and...9...patents....When...we...examined...the...publications...since... 2001,...the...average...interval...from...our...distribution...to...the... users'...publication...was...4.5...years...(n...=...996)....Eighty...percent... of...the...researches...were...published...in...journals...with...Impact... Factor...(IF)...3...or...higher...(average...IF:...7.1),...contributing...to... the...elucidation...of...human...health...and...disease...mechanisms.... We...plan...to...continue...close...collaboration...with...the...research... community...and...expand...the...mouse...strains...useful...for...a... wide...range...of...life...science...researches,...keeping...in...mind...the... social...and...research...needs...of...infectious...diseases,...aged- society,...and...genomic...medicine. Collagen...is...temporally...produced...in...wound...healing...state... but...in...chronic...inflammation...excessive...accumuration...of... collagen... occurs... and... results... in... pathological... fibrosis.... Fibrosis...occurs...in...almost...all...organs...and...various...tissues... but...there...are...few...effective...treatments...for...fibrosis...besides... grafting,...because...the...detailed...mechanism...of...onset...of... fibrosis...has...not...been...elucidated...enough....Furthermore...it... is...another...reason...that...there...is...no...established...method...to... quantitatively...observe...fibrosis...over...time....Therefore,...we... tried...to...develop...a...new...animal...model...that...can...visualize... collagen...using...imaging...technology. Collagen...protein...is...produced...into...endoplasmic...reticulum... and...then...the...N-terminus...and...the...C-terminus...are...cleaved... off...when...it...is...secreted....The...remaining...central...part...takes... a...tight...triple...helical...structure....For...these...characteristics,... it...is...difficult...to...visualize...collagen...by...fusing...fluorescent... proteins...either...at...the... edges...or...in...the...middle...of... the... collagen...protein....However,...we...found...that...type...V...collagen... could... be... applied... for... imaging... because... its... N-terminal... globular... domain... remains... after... cleavage.... We... have... developed...type...V-based...collagen...probes,...and...succeeded... in...visualizing...extracellular...collagen...fiber...in vitro.... In...this...study,...we...have...established...the...collagen...probe... knock... in... mouse... by... knocking... HaloTag... into... type... V... collagen... gene... using... CRISPR-Cas9... systetm.... HaloTag... protein...is...easily...labeled...by...covalent...binding...to...fluorescent... HaloTag...ligands.... Moreover,...the...homozygous...collagen...probe...knock...in...mice... could...be...established...and...did...not...show...any...significant... abnormalities,...indicating...that...our...type...V-based...collagen... probe...functions...normally...in...vivo....By...using...these...mice,...it... is...possible...to...image...the...dynamics...of...collagen in vivo...in...a... live...state...over...time,...which...will...lead...to...elucidating...the... mechanism...of...fibrosis. Achievement and users' publications in the 4th phase NBRP-Mice Saori Mizuno, Hatsumi Nakata, Masayo Kadota, Megumi Tanaka, Maiko Ijuin, Tomomi Hashimoto, Mizuho Iwama, Ayako Kajita, Shinya Ayabe, Toshiaki Nakashiba, Noriko Hiraiwa, Fumio Ike, Keiji Mochida, Atsuo Ogura, Atsushi Yoshiki RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center Establishment of collagen-visualizing model mice and application to fibrosis research Yoshihiro Miwa1,2,3 , Junko Kijima-Tanaka1,2 , Kanae Ban1,4 , Seiya Mizuno2,3 , Fumihiro Sugiyama2,3 , Michito Hamada2,3 Satoru Takahashi2,3,5 1 BRC...RIKEN,...2 Med....Univ...Tsukuba,...3 LARC....Univ...Tsukuba,...4 Comprehensive...Human...Sci....Univ...Tsukuba,... 5 TMRC....Univ...Tsukuba P-81 P-82 --S 118-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 118 69...... Proper...breeding...and...storage...environment...of...laboratory... animals... is... essential... for... animal... testing.... Our... facility... supports...BSL1-3...level...research....The...research...subjects... are...wide-ranging,...such...as...gene.../viral.../...cell...therapy...and... vaccine...development....Along...with...the...recent...increase... ... in... transplantation... experiments,... the... numbers... of... immunodeficient...animals...have...also...increased....In...addition,... experiments...using...viral...vectors...trend...upward....In...the... context...of...these...circumstances,...it...has...been...required...to... improve...the...animal...breeding...and...research...environment... in...which...each...research...can...coexist...in...the...same...facility.... However,...on... the...other...hand,...aging... facilities,...lack...of... breeding...space,...and...efficiency...of...facility...maintenance... have...been...issues...for...many...years....In...order...to...solve...these... problems,... our... facility... has... been... working... on... the... introduction...of...an...individual...ventilation...system...that...can... be...made...into...a...barrier...for...each...cage...from...2019. In... the... BSL2... breeding... room,... where... transplantation... experiments...and...viral...vector...administration...are...mainly... performed,... the... system... has... become... possible... to... significantly...increase...the...number...of...accommodations....We... also... introduced... it... in... the... quarantine... room,... which... previously...used...a...balloon...isolator....This...has...enabled...us...to... introduce...animals...more...efficiency...for...newly...appointed... researchers. In...the...newly...established...rat...breeding...area,...two...types...of... individual...ventilation...systems...were...introduced...according... to... the... purpose... of... production... and... maintenance.... In... addition,...a...bioBUBBLE...system,...which...is...a...prefabricated... clean... room,... was... introduced... for... the... purpose... of... maintaining...the...breeding...of...severely...immunodeficient... rats. In...this...seminar,...we...would...like...to...introduce...the...features,... operation...methods,...problems,...and...future...issues...of...several... newly...introduced...breeding...equipment. By...entering...data...into...CARD...ENTRY,...researchers...can... use...the...CARD...mouse...bank...at...Kumamoto...University,... which...stores...genetically...modified...mouse...strains.... After...the...work...at...the...mouse...bank,...the...entered...data...is... transferred...to...CARD...R-BASE...and...made...public...with...the... consent...of...the...requestor. Since...the...aging...of...CARD...ENTRY...and...CARD...R-BASE... was...a...problem,...we...updated...them....We...used...Java...and... Spring...Tool...Suite...as...the...development...environment...and... PostgreSQL...as...the...database...application. Associate...Professor...Kawamoto...and...his...colleagues...at... National...Institute...of...Genetics,...who...developed...the...old... system,...shared...all...the...source...code...with...us....We...analyzed... it...and...implemented...all...the...functions...in...the...new...system. Using...a...cloud-based...VPS...machine...as...the...server...machine,... we...eliminated...maintenance...and...management...costs...such... as...hardware...purchases...and...power...outage...support....And... we...were...able...to...use...the...system...for...about...40,000...yen/ year.... In... the... new... CARD... ENTRY... (https://cardmice.com/ cardentry/loginForm),...information...on...3149...strains...from... 290...researchers...can...be...searched...by...various...parameters,... and...information...on...2489...strains...from...271...researchers...is... available...in...the...new...CARD...R-BASE...(https://...cardmice. com/rbase/)...(February...17,...2022). In...the...new...development...environment,...we...were...able...to... develop...the...system...very...quickly....We...would...like...to...use... the...same...development...environment...for...the...other...mouse... bank...(information...confidential...type)...to...promote...efficient... and...user...friendly...systems. Breeding equipment in IMSUT animal facility -Current status and issues- Miho Hoshi, Saeko Ishida, Tomoji Mashimo Laboratory...Animal...Research...Center,...Institute...of...Medical...Science,...The...University...of...Tokyo Update of the databases CARD ENTRY and CARD R-BASE of the CARD Mouse Bank at Kumamoto University Shuuji Tsuchiyama, Toru Takeo Div....of...Reprod....Eng.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ. P-83 P-84 --S 119-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 119 69...... In...vitro...fertilization...(IVF)...is...widely...used...for...fertility... treatment,...breeding...of...domestic...animals,...and...production... and...preservation...of...laboratory...animals....In...IVF,...many... sperm...with...high...motility...are...required...to...obtain...fertilized... oocytes... in... fertilization... medium,... whereas... in... vivo... fertilization...is...completed...by...only...a...few...sperm...in...the... oviduct....Therefore,...improving...a...fertilization...medium...by... mimicking... the... environment... of... oviductal... fluid... may... improve...the...fertilization...efficiency...in...IVF....In...this...study,... we...focused... on...the...amino... acid...composition... of...mouse... oviductal...fluid...and...developed...a...protocol...for...the...analysis... of... amino... acids... using... high-performance... liquid... chromatography... (HPLC).... Mouse... tubal... fluids... were... collected...after...the...induction...of...superovulation...by...PMSG... and...hCG....In...the...oviductal...fluid,...taurine,...glycine,...glutamine,... glutamic... acid,... threonine,... and... alanine... were... detected.... Taurine...was...the...most...abundant...in...the...mouse...oviductal... fluid....In...summary,...we...established...to...determine...the...amino... acids...component...in...mouse...oviductal...fluid...using...HPLC... and...revealed...the...composition...of...the...amino...acid...in...mouse... oviductal...fluid....The...finding...will...be...helpful...to...develop...a... higher...performance...of...fertilization...medium. Some...human...gynecological...diseases...are...exacerbated...in... response... to... the... menstrual... cycle.... Some... rodent... and... primate... models... have... been... developed... surgically... for... elucidating...the...mechanisms...and...for...developing...medical... treatments.... However,... rodents... generally... exhibit... an... incomplete...estrous...cycle,...is...not...observed...a...luteal...phase... and...menstruation....This...makes...it...difficult...to...study...the... clinical...mechanism...of...the...human...gynecological...diseases.... Recently,... it... has... reported... that... Acomys cahirinus,... distributing...in...north...Africa,...has...an...estrous...cycle...with... menstruation,... and... is... expected... to... be... used... in... basic... medicine....It...is...difficult...to...obtain...the...laboratory...strain...of... the...species...in...Japan,...but...we...have...maintained...a...colony...of... relative... species,... A. dimidiatus.... In... this... study,... we... examined...the...changes...in...the...estrous...cycle,...endocrinology,... and... genital... histology... to... explore... the... potential... of... A. dimidiatus...as...menstrual...model...rodent...available...in...Japan.... As...a...result,...red...blood...cells...were...found...in...the...vaginal... smear...in...accordance...with...the...estrous...cycle,...and...blood... discharge... from... vagina... (menstrual... blood)... was... also... confirmed....Plasma...progesterone...levels...were...higher...in... pro-... and... di-estrous... (19.515.8,... 16.89.0... ng/ml,... respectively)....Histological...observations...showed...that...the... thickened...endometrium...in...metestrus...was...maintained...for... a...while,...and...then...the...epithelium...was...shed,...a...primate...type... of...menstrual...change....In...addition,...the...presence...of...tubular... tissue,...presumably...spiral...arteries,...was...also...confirmed...in... the... endometrium... during... diestrus... stage.... Our... study... revealed...that...A. dimidiatus...has...an...estrous...cycle...with... human-like...menstruation,...and...has...a...potential...to...be...used... as...a...rodent...model...for...human...menstruation...obtainable...in... Japan.
