Characterization of the Acomys dimidiatus as a new experimental animal to mimic human menstruation Momoko Amano1 , Goro Nagura2 , Akio Shinohara2 , Narantsog Choijookhuu3 , Yoshitaka Hishikawa3 , Yujiro Asada4 , Masataka Nakaya5 , Chihiro Koshimto2 1 Graduate...School,...2 FSRC,...3 Department...of...Anatomy,...Faculty...of...Medicine,... 4 Department...of...Pathology,...Faculty...of...Medicine,...University...of...Miyazaki,...5 ASHBi,...Kyoto...University P-85 P-86 --S 120-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 120 69...... Protein... glycosylation... influences... cancer... growth... and... metastasis...in...a...variety...of...ways....Galactose...chains...are... known...to...play...a...role...in...natural...immunity,...but...there...have... been...few...studies...on...their...roles...in...tumor...immunity....Beta- 1,4-Galactosyltransferase...(B4galt)...is...abundant...in...human... cancer...tissues...and...has...been...linked...to...a...poor...prognosis...in... some...cancers....However,...the...role...of...B4galt...in...the...tumor... microenvironment...is...unclear....To...investigate...the...role...of... B4galt...in...the...tumor...microenvironment,...we...first...created... B4galt...knockout...(KO)...mice...using...Crispr/Cas9....Then,...the... weak...immunogenicity...and...strong...immunogenicity...tumor... cells...were...subcutaneously...transplanted...into...wild-type...and... knockout... mice... to... study... tumor... cell... proliferation.... To... determine... whether... B4galt... regulates... tumor... growth... through... the... immune... system,... bone... marrow... transfer... experiments...were...performed....Flow...cytometry...was...used... to...detect...immune...cell...infiltration,...and...glycoproteomics... was... used... to... investigate... changes... in... glycosylation... structure. B4galt... KO... mice... are... capable... of... normal... growth... and... development....Blood...and...urine...biochemistry...tests...were... normal....The...growth...of...strong...immunogenic...tumor...cells... can... be... suppressed... in... B4galt... KO... mice,... but... weak... immunogenic...tumors...are...unaffected....In...B4galt...KO...mice,... flow...cytometry...revealed...a...significant...increase...in...tumor- localized... T... cell... infiltration.... The... growth... of... strong... immunogenic...tumor...cells...was...also...inhibited...in...wild-type... mice...transplanted...with...B4galt...KO...bone...marrow....Overall,... we... believe... that... B4galt... knockout... mice... cause... tumor... growth...by...altering...immune...cell...function. A...rabbit...bone...fusion...model...was...prepared...to...confirm...the... effectiveness...of...a...medical...material...used...for...the...treatment... of...fracture...and...bone...fusion...to...evaluate...the...fusion...ability... of...the...magnesium...alloy...headless...compression...screws... (under...the...development...as...bone...fixing...screws)...in...the... bone. Male...Kbs:JW...rabbits...aged...about...13...weeks...were...used....In... the...bone...fusion...model,...the...autologous...ilium...was...fused...in... the...femur...and...fixed...with...a...magnesium...alloy...material.... The...observation...period...was...4...and...12...weeks....The...efficacy... of... the... medical... material... was... evaluated... by... X-ray... photography...and...CT...observation...and...the...undecalcified... polished...specimens....The...newborn...was...formed...between... the...autologous...bone...and...femur...4...weeks...after...implantation... and...the...bone...fusion...was...observed....The...magnesium...alloy... material... was... not... collapsed... and... the... gas... generation... decreased....The...bone...formation...was...confirmed...on...the... surface...of...the...material....The...absorption...of...the...material... was...progressed...and...the...combined...ilium...was...slightly... absorbed...12...weeks...after...implantation....The...fusion...of...the... material...with...the...femur...was...observed...in...a...wider...range... of...the...femur...and...the...affinity...with...the...bone...increased. In...the...rabbit...bone...fusion...model...prepared...and...used...in...the... present...study,...the...bone...fusion...was...induced...4...weeks...after... adhesion... of... the... autologous... ilium... to... the... femur.... The... magnesium...alloy...material...used...for...the...bone...fusion...had... the...holding...power...for...the...bone...fusion...and...did...not...cause... any...fusion...delay...or...inflammation...induction....Moreover,...it... was...confirmed...that...the...magnesium...alloy...material...was... present...even...12...weeks...after...adhesion,...the...bone...formation... was... observed... around... the... material... area,... the... bone... induction...was...promoted...and...the...affinity...of...the...material... with...the...bone...was...high. Identification and analysis of glycoproteins involved in cancer immunity Wei Heng1 , Chie Naruse1 , Kazushi Sugihara1 , Daisuke Takakura2 , Nana Kawasaki2 , Masahide Asano1 1 Institute...of...Laboratory...Animals,...Graduate...School...of...Medicine,...Kyoto...University,... 2 Graduate...School...of...Medical...Life...Science,...Yokohama...City...University Evaluation of Magnesium Alloy Screws in a Rabbit Bone Fusion Model Suzuki Teruo, Seki Azusa, Hidaka Tomonari, Iriya Rhuuichi, Hirakawa Kouhei, Kitagawa Akira 1 HAMRI...co.,Ltd.,...2 Mel-Frontier...Ltd. P-87 P-88 --S 121-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 121 69...... [INTRODUCTION and PURPOSE] In...recent...years,...the... promotion... of... digital... transformation... (DX)... has... been... progressing...in...various...fields....Specifically,...efficiency...is... being...improved...by...utilizing...digital...technology,...artificial... intelligence...(AI),...internet...of...things...(IoT),...and...more....By... promoting...DX...in...the...field...of...experimental...animals,...it...can... be...expected...to...facilitate...research...speed,...and...improved... the...animal...welfare....At...present,...the...introduction...of...digital... technology...focus...on...behavior...analysis...and...environmental... management,...but...it...is...still...inadequate...for...other...studies,... for...example,...animal...maintenance,...state...management,... reproductive...management,...etc....Therefore,...we...constructed... a... system... that... senses... various... information... about... experimental...animals,...analyzes...and...evaluates...them...by... IoT... and... AI,... and... sends... the... results... to... researchers,... experimental...animal...breeders,...managers...by...e-mail....In... this...study,...we...investigated...whether...this...system...could... apply...the...delivery...of...mice. [RESULTS and DISCUSSION] Assuming... detection... troubles... due... to... differences... in... hair... colors,... we... used... pregnant...mice...with...multiple...hair...colors...(white,...black,... agouti,...and...gray).......As...a...result,...we...succeeded...in...receiving... a...delivery...notification...mail...from...this...system...at...the...times... of...mice...delivery....Finally,...we...would...like...to...continue...to... construct...useful...systems...for...reducing...work...and...avoiding... risks...in...management...of...experimental...animals. The...number...of...heated...tobacco...products...(HTPs)...users,... such...as...IQOS,...is...increasing...rapidly....However,...the...health... effects... of... HTPs... have... been... poorly... reported... and... are... unknown....A...key...problem...is...no...standardized...aerosol... exposure... apparatus... to... deliver... HTPs... for... in... vivo... experiments....Therefore,...we...have...developed...a...novel...HTPs... aerosol...exposure...apparatus...for...mice...and...demonstrated... that... nicotine... and... other... chemicals... in... HTPs... aerosol... generated...by...the...apparatus...can...be...delivered...to...mice... with...adequate...efficiency. Methods By...using...the...developed...apparatus,...C57BL/6N...mice...were... exposed...to...IQOS...aerosol....After...that,...the...plasma...and...the... urinary... levels... of... nicotine... and... its... metabolites... were... quantified....Further,...the...skin...surface...temperature...of...mice... was...monitored...to...confirm...the...vasoconstriction...action...of... nicotine. Results The...plasma...nicotine...concentrations...of...two...mice...exposed... to...five...IQOS...aerosols...were...253...ng/mL...and...284...ng/mL,... respectively,...immediately...after...exposure....Plasma...cotinine... concentrations... were... 257... ng/mL... and... 217... ng/mL,... respectively....Based...on...the...quantified...plasma...nicotine... concentrations,...it...was...confirmed...that...the...IQOS...exposure... in...this...experiment...was...equivalent...to...25...IQOS...sticks...in... humans....The...highest...amounts...of...nicotine...metabolites...in... the...urine...of...mice...exposed...to...one...IQOS...aerosol...were...6.82 3.34g/mg...of...cotinine...after...1...hour...of...exposure...and... 32.910.5g/mg...of...3-hydroxycotinine...after...2...hours...of... exposure....This...indicates...that...nicotine...in...the...IQOS...aerosol... exposed...using...the...exposure...apparatus...entered...the...blood... circulation... via... the... respiration... was... subsequently... metabolized...and...was...excreted...in...the...urine....Regarding... the...changes...in...the...body...surface...skin...temperature,...it...was... 37.60.8...before...exposure...but...reached...a...minimum... value...of...33.50.5...after...30...minutes...of...exposure....These... results...indicate...that...the... nicotine... in... the... aerosol...was... absorbed...through...respiration,...resulting...in...an...increase...in... smoking...markers...and...a...decrease...in...body...surface...skin... temperature...due...to...vasoconstriction...caused...by...nicotine.... This...indicates...that...the...exposure...device...has...sufficient... capability... to... identify... the... health... hazard... of... heated... cigarettes. Development of mice delivery notification system by AI for attempt of digital transformation Toshiaki Kawabe1 , Shota Kita1 , Takahiko Furuta2 , Midori Morikawa2 , Hiroyuki Nishizaka2 , Hisato Yamauchi1 , Yasushi Chida1,3 , Seiya Inoue1 1 ARK...Resource...Co....Ltd.,...2 Y's...READING...Co....Ltd.,...3 Bycen...Co....Ltd. Development of aerosol exposure apparatus for heated tobacco products for in vivo experiments Marie Sawa1 , Akira Ushiyama2 , Yohei Inaba2 , Kenji Hattori1 1 Meiji...Pharmaceutical...University,...2 National...Institute...of...Public...Health P-89 P-90 --S 122-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 122 69...... [Background] Hyperthermal...treatment...(up...to...43)... shows...anti-cancer...effects...by...denaturing...proteins,...well... known...as...adjuvant...therapy...for...cancer...treatment....In... current...hyperthermal...treatment,...8...MHz...microwaves...are... used...for...therapeutic...application,...which...can...heat...deep... tissue...but...requires...a...long...time...for...heating....This...study... developed...an...ISM-band...(2.45...GHz)...microwave...irradiation... system... suitable... for... heating... the... body... surface... and... investigated...its...thermotherapeutic...effects.... [Materials and Methods] Mouse...melanoma...B16F10... cells... were... transplanted... into... the... plantar... region... of... C57BL/6N...mice...to...produces...a...tumor...transplantation... model...mouse....The...mice...were...heated...in...a...hot...bath...at... 42...or...irradiated...by...ISM...band...microwave...irradiation... system....B16F10...cells...were...heated...in...a...heat...incubator...at... 42...or...in...an...ISM-band...microwave...irradiation...system.... Gene...expression...and...protein...expression...of...HSF1...and... HSP40/70... were... analyzed... by... RT-qPCR... and... western... blotting. [Results] Incubator...heating...required...about...30...min...to... bring...the...temperature...from...23...to...42,...while...ISM...band... microwaves...required...about...40...sec....In...the...tumor...growth... inhibition... test... using... the... B16F10... transplanted... tumor... model,...there...was...no...change...in...tumor...growth...in...the... warm...bath...group...compared...to...non-treatment...group.... However,...ISM-microwave...significantly...delayed...the...tumor... growth,...and...extended...the...lifespan....Cytotoxicity...was... examined...using...B16F10...cells,...and...the...IC50...of...incubator... heating...was...80...minutes,...and...that...of...ISM...microwave... irradiation... was... 35... seconds.... The... gene... and... protein... expression... of... HSP40/70,... which... is... related... to... thermotolerance,...was...increased...by...incubator...heating,...but... was... hardly... induced... by... ISM... microwave... irradiation.... Further...analysis...of...the...protein...expression...of...HSF1,...a... transcription...factor...of...HSPs,...showed...that...the...molecular... weight...of...HSF1...increased...due...to...its...hyperphosphorylation... at...heat...incubator,...but...there...was...no...significant...increase...in... molecular...weight...at...ISM...band...microwave...hyperthermia. [Discussion] ISM-band... microwaves... hyperthermia... provides...efficient...cytotoxic...effects...in...a...short...time....In...a... mouse... model... of... tumor... transplantation,... ISM-band... microwave...hyperthermia...inhibited...tumor...invasion...and... improved... the... survival... rate.... We... confirmed... that... ISM... microwave...hyperthermia...is...less...inducible...for...HSPs....ISM- band...microwave...hyperthermia...may...be...a...better...option... for...thermotherapy. DNA...methylation...is...once...erased...and...established...during... germ...cell...development....The...reestablishment...spans...at... least...six...months,...from...2-month...to...8-month...old,...in...male... marmoset...germ...cells....This...is...a...much...more...extended... period... than... in... mice,... taking... only... seven... days.... This... difference...raises...the...possibility...that...the...remethylation... process... and... the... underlying... mechanisms... also... differ... between...mice...and...primates....To...reveal...such...differences,... we...examined...the...establishment...of...DNA...methylation...in... marmoset...and...crab-eating...macaque...male...germ...cells. Our... immunostaining... results... showed... that... DNA... methylation...levels...differed...between...cells...even...within...the... same...testis....Therefore,...we...used...single-cell...analysis...to... reveal... the... DNA... methylation... pattern... during... the... establishment....In...marmosets,...germ...cells...were...isolated... from...10...different...stages...(0,...1.1,...2.5,...3.4,...3.8,...5.0,...6.4,...7.4,...8.5,... and... 12.5... months... old),... and... a... total... of... 100... cells... were... analyzed....In...crab-eating...macaques,...data...from...30...cells...(0,...2,... 6,...13,...18,...20,...120...months...old)...were...analyzed. Marmoset...cells...showed...average...methylation...rates...of...4.2- 70.4%,... and... the... whole... process... of... remethylation... was... covered....The...remethylation...started...immediately...after... birth,...and...the...methylation...level...rapidly...increased...around... three...months...of...age....The...average...methylation...rate...was... 60%...at...6.4...-...8.5...months...of...age,...and...it...reached...70%...at...12.5... months... of... age.... Like... mice,... the... regions... where... DNA... methylation...was...established...earlier...were...enriched...in...CpG... islands...and...SINEs....However,...unlike...in...mice,...cell...division... occurs...during...the...reestablishment....Although...crab-eating... macaques...have...a...longer...lifespan...and...take...longer...to...reach... sexual...maturity...than...marmosets,...DNA...remethylation... occurred...in...a...similar...period...of...time...as...in...marmosets.... Because...DNA...methylation...in...gametes...affect...development... in...the...next...generation,...our...results...provide...fundamental... bases...for...the...study...of...gamete...differentiation...from...iPS... cells...in...primates.... Anti-cancer efficacy of ISM-band Microwaves hyperthermia Erika Fujimoto1 , Masaki Nagane1 , Takahiko Wada1 , Eiichi Kanai2 , Yuuki Shibata1 , Yasuhiko Nakamura 3 , Kazutoshi Kishi4 , Kazutaka Yamada5 , Tadashi Yamashita1 1 Laboratory...of...Biochemistry,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Azabu...University,... 2 Laboratory...of...Small...Animal...Surgery,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Azabu...University,... 3 Schneide-tec...Corp.,...4 Laboratory...of...Veterinary...Radiology,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Azabu...University,... 5 Laboratory...of...Clinical...Diagnosis,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Azabu...University Single cell analyses of the establishment of DNA methylation in primate common marmoset and crab-eating macaque male germ cells Kazuaki Kojima1 , Yosuke Kondo2 , Miho Kohara3 , Dollet Constance1 , Tadashi Sankai3 , Ryo Nakaki2 , Toshiaki Watanabe1 1 CIEA,...2 Rhelixa,...3 NIBIOHN P-91 P-92 --S 123-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 123 69...... The...production...of...double...knockout...(DKO)...mice...usually... requires...a...large...number...of...mating...with...low...DKO...birth... probability.... Recently,... Improved-Genome... editing... via... Oviductal...Nucleic...Acids...Delivery...(i-GONAD)...method,... which...is...a...trans-ovarian...genome...editing...technology,...has... been...developed...to...easily...generate...genome-edited...mice... from...zygotes...in...comparison...with...microinjection....DKO... mice...can...also...be...generated...in...a...shorter...time...by...using... i-GONAD...and...knockout...(KO)...mice....However,...i-GONAD... reportedly...has...not...been...well...established...in...the...C57BL... /6J...strain,...which...is...the...genetic...background...of...most...KO... mice....In...this...study,...we...focus...on...the...estrus...cycle...and...the... resistance...value...of...electroporation...create...DKO...mice...by... i-GONAD...in...C57BL/6J...strain...KO...mice. Eleven... female... acetaldehyde... dehydrogenase... type... 2... (ALDH2)...KO...mice...were...subjected...to...i-GONAD...to...delete... the...actinin...3...(ACTN3)...gene...by...CRISPR/Cas9....i-GONAD... was...performed...under...three...types...of...mixed...anesthetic.... Five...of...the...eleven...females...were...checked...for...early...estrus... by... smear... testing... the... day... before... i-GONAD.... The... electroporation...conditions...was...0.250.5......(Pp:...40...V...and... Tp:...10...V).... Two...out...of...five...females...that...were...checked...for...early... estrus...became...pregnant...and...a...total...of...eight...fetuses...were... born....Five...out...of...eight...fetuses...showed...mosaic...mutations... (mosaicism)...in...the...ACTN3...gene,...confirming...successful... gene...editing....Females...that...did...not...were...checked...for... smear...did...not...bear...fetuses. C57BL/6J...zygotes...are...susceptible...to...electric...current... stimulation...and...are...easily...damaged....In...this...study,...we... concluded...that...DKO...mice...can...be...produced...in...relatively... high... probability... by... smear... testing... and... adjusting... the... electrical...current...value. Injection...anesthesia...with...medetomidine,...midazolam...and... butorphanol...(MMB)...is...commonly...used...in...rodents...without... the...regulation...under...narcotic...laws....However,...a...well- known... drawback... of... MMB... injection... anesthesia... is... relatively...long...recovery...phase,...and...hypothermia...is...the... most...prominent...problem...in...this...phase....Alphaxalone...is...an... injectable... anesthetics... that... is... widely... used... to... induce... anesthesia...in...dogs...and...cats,...and...Tukamoto...Y....et...al...have... reported... that... the... combining... alfaxalone... with... medetomidine... and... butorphanol... allow... stable... surgical... operation...in...mice...(J Vet Med Sci,...2019)....Therefore,...we... evaluated... injection... anesthesia... recovery... with... medetomidine-alphaxalone-butorphanol... during... postanesthesia....After...weighing...the...female...Jcl:ICR...mice...at... 8-14...weeks...of...age,...medetomidine...(0.3mg/kg),...midazolam... (4 mg/kg)... and... butorphanol... (5mg/kg)... (MMB),... or... medetomidine...(0.3 mg/kg),...alphaxalone...(30 mg/kg)...and... butorphanol...(5 mg/kg)...(MBA30)...were...subcutaneously... administrated...and...were...then...placed...on...the...warming...mat.... Anesthesia...was...stopped...after...30...min...by...subcutaneous... injection...of...atipamezole...(0.75mg/kg),...and...mice...were...then... returned...to...their...home...cages...at...20...min...after...injection...of... atipamezole....Two-cell...embryos...were...transferred...into... pseudo-pregnant...female...mice...using...standard...procedure... under...MMB...or...MBA30...anesthesia....All...procedures...and... protocols... were...approved...by...the...president... of...NCGM... based...on...the...judgment...of...the...IACUC...of...NCGM...under... license...number...21097. In...the...MMB...anesthesia...group,...38.5%...and...86.5%...of...the... individuals... diminished... the... response... for... the... pedal... withdrawal... reflex... after... 5... and... 10... min... anesthetic... administration,... respectively.... The... induction... time... of... anesthesia...was...significantly...shortened...in...the...MBA...30... anesthesia...group,...with...71.4%...and...97.3%...of...the...individuals... which...lost...the...response...for...the...pedal...withdrawal...reflex... after...5...and...10...min,...respectively....Although...recovery...time... of...rightening... reflex... after... injection... of...atipamezole... in... MBA30...anesthesia...group...(8.51.4min)...was...significantly... delayed...compared...to...that...in...MMB...anesthesia...group...(3.6 0.5min,...P<0.004),...the...spontaneous...locomotor...activity... was...clearly...increased...in...MBA30...anesthesia...group....In... addition,...the...maximum...decrease...of...body...temperature...in... MMB... group... was... 3.7,... whereas... it... decreased... by... a... maximum...of...1.3...in...the...MBA30...anesthesia...group....The... implantation...rate...and...number...of...pups...after...fertilized...egg... transfer...in...MBA30...were...comparable...to...those...in...MBA30... anesthesia...group....Compared...to...MMB,...MBA30...is...expected... to...be...widely...used...as...a...new...balanced...anesthetics...for...mice,... because...it...causes...less...postoperative...body...temperature... decrease...as...well...as...rapid...induction...of...anesthesia...and... rapid...recovery...of...spontaneous...locomotor...activity. Generation of double knock out mouse using i-GONAD in C57BL/6J stain knock out mouse Sakura Hattori1 , Tamura Yuki2 , Kouzaki Karina1 , Kotani Takaya2 , Nakazato Koichi1 1 Nippon...Sport...Science...University...Faculty...of...Medical...Science,... 2 Nippon...Sport...Science...University...Faculty...of...Sport...Science The evaluation for injection anesthesia recovery with Medetomidine-Alphaxalone-Butorphanol in mice Tetsuya Arai1 , Kenta Nakano1 , Takahiro Kagawa2 , Yukiko Shimizu1 , Motohito Goto2 , Tadashi Okamura1,3 1 National...Center...for...Global...Health...and...Medicine...(NCGM),...2 Center...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals...(CIEA),... 3 Kitasato...University...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine P-93 P-94 --S 124-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 124 69...... [Introduction] When...we...euthanize...laboratory...animals,... we...are...obligated...to...use...appropriate...and...painless...methods.... The...laboratory...animal...breeding...and...experimental...facility... should... provide... to... users,... the... proper... methods... for... euthanasia...as...a...leader...on...the...appropriate...handling...of... laboratory...animals....Until...now,...pentobarbital...has...been... widely...used...as...euthanasia...solution...for...mice...however,...the... person...in...charge...of...experimental...animals...has...requested... an...alternative...solution....This...study...examines...the...effect...of... secobarbital...that...has...shown...to...be...useful...in...rat...euthanasia,... as...seen...in...mice...euthanasia...solution. [Methods] Secobarbital... solution... was... prepared... by... dissolving...IONAL...SODIUM...FOR...INJECTION...(Nichi-Iko... Pharmaceutical...Co.,...Ltd.)...powder...in...physiological...saline.... This...solution...was...administered...intraperitoneally...(150mg... /kg)...to...newborns,...1-,...5-,...and...over...8-week-old...of...Jcl:...ICR... mice....The...mice...were...then...observed...for...immobilization,... righting...reflex,...pedal...withdrawal...reflex...of...the...hindlimbs,... and...cardiac...and...respiratory...arrest....In...immature...mouse,... the...loss...of...the...flexion...reflex...to...the...noxious...stimuli...caused... by...pinching...the...hind...limbs...or...tail...was...used...as...an...index... to...complete...euthanasia,...since...it...is...difficult...to...confirm... cardiac...arrest...based...on...palpations. [Results and Discussion] After... administration... of... secobarbital,...all...mice...were...observed...for...immobilization,... pedal...withdrawal...reflex...in...hindlimbs,...and...cardiac...arrest... or...loss...of...flexion...reflex...within...approximately...2,...3,...and...15... minutes,... respectively.... The... most... important... point... in... euthanasia...is...that...the...mouse...should...lose...consciousness... and...sensation...as...soon...as...possible....From...that...point...of... view,...this...method...is...in...an...appropriate...form...of...euthanasia.... These...results...suggest...that...secobarbital...is...effective...as...an... alternative...solution...to...pentobarbital...in...mice....In...the...future,... we...will...consider...scientific...measurement...of...pain...level. To... continue... the... educational... activities... under... the... COVID-19... pandemic,... we... have... been... making... training... videos...of...the...technique...for...rearing...the...germfree...(GF)... mice...in...a...flexible...vinyl...film...isolator...(VI)....The...recorded... video...consists...of...10...parts;...(1)...Introduction...of...breeding... equipment...and...preparation...for...sterilization,...(2)...Assembly... of...disk...filter,...(3)...Precautions...for...sterilization...operation... and...preparation...of...disincentive...agent,...(4)...Sterilization... process...and...precautions,...(5)...Ventilation...and...drying...after... sterilization,... (6)... The... swab... inspection... to... confirm... achievement...of...sterilization,...(7)...Preparation...of...breeding... equipment... and... sterilization... using... sterile... cans,... (8)... Connection...of...sterilizing...autoclave...cylinder...to...VI...and... delivery... of... breeding... equipment,... (9)... Connection... of... transport...container...to...VI...and...delivery...of...GF...mice,...(10).... Daily...rearing...management...and...inspection...of...GF...mice.... In...learning...the...basic...technology...for...handling...VI,...it...is... essential...to...fully...understand...the...basic...structure...and... principle...of...VI,...acquire...the...technology...by...repeating...the... operation... method,... and... maintain... the... technical... level.... Therefore,...we...edited...narration...and...subtitles,...keeping...in... mind... the... easy... explanation... even... for... inexperienced... trainees...and...the...detailed...information...for...their...review. We...have...used...this...video...and...found...it...is...beneficial...not... only...for...infection...risk...management...but...also...for...remote... education...and...orientation...before...practical...training. The...purpose...of...this...presentation...is...to...ask...for...opinions... and...practical...training...needs,...other...than...basic...handling... techniques...to...enhance...video...content. Effects of secobarbital as a mouse euthanasia solution Kyuichi Taguma, Shigeharu Wakana Department...of...Animal...Experimentation,...Foundation...for...Biomedical...Research...and...Innovation...at...Kobe Efforts to make educational videos of rearing of germfree mice in flexible vinyl film isolator Kayo Tomiyama1 , Hayato Abe2 , Yuyo Ka1 , Takuma Mizusawa1 , Shinobu Mochizuki2 , Eiichi Ogawa2 , Tomoyuki Ogura1 , Akira Takakura1 , Riichi Takahashi1 1 Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals,...2 JAC...Co.,...Ltd. P-95 P-96 --S 125-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 125 69...... [Introduction] Telemetry...systems...are...widely...used...for... collecting...the...physiologic...parameters...(e.g.,...blood...pressure... and...heart...rate)...from...the...awake...animals...as...stabilized... data....For...operating...such...telemetry...systems,...the...surgeons... must...possess...microsurgical...expertise...to...insert...a...catheter... in...the...blood...vessels...of...small...animals...and...to...maintain...this... system... over... time.... This... study... aimed... to... analyze... the... protocol...for...catheterization...into...a...blood...vessel...using...a... bent...needle...introducer. [Materials and Methods] The...8-week-old...male...Lewis... rats...were...used...in...the...study....An...introducer...was...created... by...bending...a...commercially...available...21G...injection...needle... at... about... 45 .... Using... the... introducer,... a... catheter... was... inserted...into...the...left...femoral...artery...of...the...rats...under... anesthesia....As...a...control,...a...catheter...was...directly...inserted... into... the... blood... vessel... without... the... introducer.... The... insertion... time... of... each... catherization... method... was... measured....Blood...pressure...and...heart...rate...were...measured... 24...h...after...catheter...insertion...using...the...telemetry...system. [Results and Discussion] The...insertion...time...with...the... introducer... tended... to... be... shorter... than... without... the... introducer...(P=0.158)....The...frequency...of...the...insertion...with... no...catheter-based...errors...with...the...introducer...tended...to... be...higher...than...without...the...introducer...(P=0.143)....The... mean...arterial...pressure...and...heart...rate...24...h...after...catheter... insertion...in...each...catherization...method...were...almost...same... (P=0.492...and...P=0.605,...respectively)....This...study...showed... that...the...introducer...could...shorten...the...insertion...time...and... maintain...the...accurate...measurement...of...telemetry...systems... by... reducing... the... catheter-based... error.... Using... the... introducer,...even...relatively...inexperienced...surgeons...will...be... able...to...easily...insert...a...catheter...into...a...narrow...blood...vessel.... Furthermore,...this...method...markedly...reduces...the...surgical... time...and...is...useful...with...respect...to...animal...welfare. Many... of... behavioral... abnormalities... are... caused... by... symptoms...of...many...neurological...disorders....The...common... marmosets...(Callithrix...jacchus)...social...behaviors...are...similar... to...those...of...humans...than...rodents,...such...as...family-based... herding...and...food-sharing...behaviors....Recently,...various... genetically... manipulated... marmoset... models... of... neurodegenerative...diseases...have...been...created....However,... it...is...unclear...when...and...how...the...new...genetically...modified... marmoset...models...will...develop...symptoms....Therefore,...an... automated...behavioral...analysis...system...that...accurately... detects...and...quantifies...the...lifelong...behaviors...of...the...model... animals...is...necessary....However,...there...are...no...reports...of... behavior...analyzers...for...large...cages...that...can...accommodate... multiple...marmosets...or...marmoset...families....This...study... developed... a... novel... behavior... analysis... system... that... combines... light...detection...and...ranging...(LiDAR),...video... tracking,...and...deep...learning...for...automatically...tracking... and...analyzing...individual...behaviors...of...multiple...marmosets... in... a... family... cage... were... tracked... and... their... behaviors... detected. A...family...of...three...marmosets...were...kept...in...a...family...cage... (W820 x D610 x H1578 mm)... in... accordance... with... EU... guidelines.... At... the... front... and... back... of... the... cage... were... installed...acrylic...panels...for...acquisition...of...images...from... cameras...and...LiDAR....Four...LiDAR...and...four...cameras...were... set...up...in...front...of...the...cage....LiDAR...and...video...tracking...by... deep... learning... were... used... to... detect... the... positions... of... individual...marmosets...and...create...trajectories...for...each... scene....Each...trajectory...was...identified...by...face...recognition... using...deep...learning,...and...over...one...month...simultaneous... tracking...of...multiple...animals....In... addition,...the... animal... behaviors... were... detected... by... deep... learning... of... video... frames...to...determine...their...content...and...location....So...far,... the... face... recognition... accuracy... is... more... than... 98%.... In... addition,... we... have... confirmed... that... the... creation... of... trajectories...and...the...detection...of...grooming...behaviors...of... three...animals...can...be...accurately...done...by...comparing...with... visual...inspection. A microsurgical technique for catheterization in the rat femoral artery Kazuhisa Sugai1 , Tomoyoshi Tamura2 , Masaharu Kataoka2,3 , Momoko Hirano1 , Masahiko Fujisawa1 , Motoaki Sano2 , Eiji Kobayashi2 , Yoji Hakamata1 1 School...of...Veterinary...Nursing...and...Technology,...Faculty...of...Veterinary...Science,...Nippon...Veterinary...and...Life...Science... University,...2 Keio...University...School...of...Medicine,...3 University...of...Occupational...and...Environmental...Health Development of a new automated behavior analysis system for marmoset group under free-ranging Terumi Yurimoto, Takashi Inoue, Rika Kikuchi, Yusuke Shibuki, Yumi Hayasegawa, Michiko Kamioka, Rino Hashimoto, Eiko Yamazaki, Kenya Sato, Wakako Kumita, Erika Sasaki Department...of...Marmoset...Biology...and...Medicine,...Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals P-97 P-98 --S 126-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 126 69...... Salivary...samples...can...be...collected...with...less...invasiveness... compared...to...blood...samples...and...be...obtained...repeatedly,... suggesting...that...might...contribute...to...Refinement...and... Reduction...in...the...principles...of...3Rs....Our...laboratory...has... reported... that... salivary... corticosterone... is... available... to... evaluate...stress...response...in...mice...(JVMS...2016,...78:...775-780).... But...it...is...not...clear...how...much...water-soluble...bioactive... substances... can... be... detected... in... the... saliva... of... mice.... Catecholamine...(CA),...a...low...molecular...weight,...is...one...of...the... water-soluble...bioactive...substances...and...is...important...as...a... neurotransmitter... such... as... noradrenaline... (NA)... or... adrenaline...(Ad)....These...NA...and...Ad...secreted...from...adrenal... glands...are...available...to...evaluate...acute...stress...response....In... the... present... study,... we... examined... blood... and... saliva... concentrations...of...NA...and...Ad...in...response...to...restraint... stress...in...mice....Adult...ICR...male...mice...at...8-10weeks...of...age... were...used...in...this...study....Three...types...of...mixed...anesthetic... agents...(medetomidine.../...midazolam.../...butorphanol...=...0.3.../... 6.0.../...7.5mg/kg;...i.p.)...was...selected...for...anesthesia....To...detect... endogenous...CA...in...saliva,...mice...were...restrained...at...10... minutes...after...the...injection...of...pilocarpine...hydrochloride... (3mg/kg;...s.c.)...dissolved...in...10...%...polyvinylpyrrolidone,...and... then...saliva...samples...were...collected...for...15...minutes...with...or... without...anesthesia....In... the... control...group,...saliva...was... collected... from... mice... without... restraint... stress... under... anesthesia....Blood...was...collected...by...decapitation...at...25... minutes...(the...end...of...restraint...stress)...after...the...injection...of... pilocarpine...hydrochloride....This...study...was...approved...by... Nippon...Veterinary...and...Life...Science...University...(2019K-15,... 2020K-42,...2021K-48)....The...salivary...NA...and...Ad...were...not... detected... in... mice... treated... without... restraint... stress,... whereas... the... salivary... CA... could... be... detected... in... both... anesthetized...and...conscious...mice...treated...with...stress.... These... results... suggest... that... the... salivary... sample... is... available...to...evaluate...CA...release...in...response...to...stress...in... mice. A...three-anesthetic...mixture...of...medetomidine,...midazolam,... and...butorphanol...(Me/Mi/Bu)...has...been...used...as...injectable... anesthesia... for... laboratory... mice.... But... this... anesthesia... induces... hypothermia... and... hyperglycemia... as... adverse... effects....We...have...been...previously...reported...the...methods...of... preventing...hypothermia...(J. Vet. Med. Sci....82(12)...(2020)... and...J. Vet. Med. Sci....84(3)...(2022))....In...this...study,...we... investigated...the...anesthetic...way...of...sustaining...normal... levels...of...blood...glucose...using...secobarbital...(Seco)...as...an... alternative...to...Me/Mi/Bu...because...pentobarbital...(Pent)...as... pharmaceutical-grade... has... been... not... commercially... available.... Seco... has... been... known... as... a... short-action... barbiturate...and...can...be...available...as...pharmaceutical...grade.... Therefore,...we...examined...1)...anesthetic...score,...2)...blood... glucose...level,...and...3)...body...temperature...(the...thermal- support...duration)...after...administration...of...Seco...in...the... present...study....Male...ICR...mice...at...the...age...of...9...weeks...were... used...as...test...animals....1)...Anesthesia...score:...Five...reflexes...of... righting,...forelimbs,...hindlimbs,...eyelid,...and...tail-pinch...were... confirmed... for... 40... min... every... 5... min... after... anesthetic... administration....2)...Blood...glucose...level:...Blood...sampling...was... performed...by...decapitation...after...15...min...administration...of... anesthesia,...and...the...blood...glucose...level...was...measured...by... a...glucometer....3)...Body...temperature:...The...thermal...support... was...performed...for...2...h...after...administration...of...anesthesia,... and...subsequent...body...temperature...in...mice...was...measured... by...an...implantable...body...temperature...measuring...device.... This...study...was...approved...based...on...the...provisions...of... Nippon...Veterinary...and...Life...Science...University...(2022K-49).... The...results...suggested...that...1)...the...administration...of...Me/ Mi/Bu... 0.3/4.0/5.0... (original),... 0.2/6.0/10 mg/kg... (our... recommended),... and... a... combination... of... Seco... and... Bu... (Seco+Bu)...provided...mice...with...the...surgical...anesthetic... duration...of...40-50...min,...2)...the...administration...of...Me/Mi/Bu... only... induced... hyperglycemia,... and... 3)... mice... after... the... administration... of... Me/Mi/Bu... 0.2/6.0/10 mg/kg... (our... recommended),... Seco+Bu... maintained... their... body... temperature...by...thermal...support...for...2...h....In...conclusion,... Seco+Bu...can...be...an...alternative...candidate...for...Me/Mi/Bu... to...prevent...hypothermia...and...hyperglycemia,...and...be...useful... as...injectable...anesthesia...in...mice. Detection of endogenous catecholamine in salivary samples of mice Atsushi Tohei, Kanako Ogawa, Taiga Horiguchi, Ririka Mizuno Laboratory...of...Experimental...Animal...Science,...Nippon...Veterinary...and...Life...Science...University Establishment of secobarbital anesthesia for preventing Me/Mi/Bu-induced hyperglycemia in mice Mizuho Tashiro, Atsushi Tohei Laboratory...of...Experimental...Animal...Science,...Nippon...Veterinary...and...Life...Science...University P-99 P-100 --S 127-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 127 69...... Gum...arabic...(GA)...is...tree...gum...derived...from...Acacia...tree... widely... used... as... thickener... and... emulsifier.... Recently,... prebiotic...effect...and...anti-inflammatory...effect...of...GA...has... been... reported... in... several... papers.... Especially,... some... intestinal...bacteria... have... been...reported... to... be... able... to... assimilate...GA...directly....Common...marmoset...(Callithrix jacchus)... is... Exudivores... that... subsist... on... indigestible... oligosaccharides...found...in...tree...gums,...however,...there...is...no... report...about...the...bacteria...that...can...assimilate...GA...or...the... effect...of...GA...on...gut...microbiota...in...marmosets....Thus,...this... study...aimed...to...(1)...isolate...the...bacteria...that...can...assimilate... GA...directly,...(2)...assess...the...effect...of...GA...supplementation... on...gut...microbiota...of...common...marmosets.... (1)Forty-two...strains...of...genus...Bifidobacteroium... were... isolated...from...marmoset...feces...and...3...strains...of...them...grew... on...gum...arabic...supplemented-poor...sugar...medium....The...3... strains... were... determined... to... belong... to B. aesculapii (originated... from...marmosets)... according... to...16S...rRNA... genes...phylogeny....... (2)Six...marmosets...were...used...for...GA...supplementation,... while...same...number...of...animals...were...used...as...control.... Supplementation...of...gum...arabic...was...conducted...for...2... months,...blood...and...feces...sampling...were...conducted...before... supplementation,...1...month...of...supplementation,...2...months... of... supplementation,... and... 3weeks... after... end... of... supplementation....T-RFLP...analysis...showed...change...of...fecal... microbiome...during...GA...supplementation,...while...realtime- PCR...targeting...genus...Bifidobacterium...showed...tendency... of...increase...of...Bifidobacterium...during...GA...supplementation. This...study...showed...the...effect...of...GA...supplementation...gut... microbiota....We...are...also...planning...to...add...more...animals... and...further...investigation...of...GA...supplementation...effect...on... blood...parameter. [Background] The... adult... gerbil... naturally... has... hyperlipidemia.... Therefore,... this... study... compared... lipoprotein...lipase...(LPL)...activity...in...gerbils,...mice,...and...rats... of...the...same...age...to...elucidate...the...cause...of...hyperlipidemia... in...gerbils. [Materials and methods] In...this...study,...gerbils,...mice,... and...rats...(30...weeks...old,...5-6...each)...in...our...laboratory...were... used....Animals...could...freely...access...normal...rodent...food...and... water....They...were...anesthetized...with...isoflurane,...and...blood... was... collected... from... the... jugular... vein.... Serum... total... cholesterol...(TCHO)...and...triglyceride...(TG)...concentrations... were...measured...using...Fuji...drychem...NX500....Furthermore,... LPL... activity... was... measured... using... a... commercially... available...kit...(Immuno-Biological...Laboratories,...Ltd.). [Results and discussion] There...was...no...significant... difference... in... TCHO... among... the... animal... species.... The... concentration...of...TG...was...26.02.6... /dl...in...mice,...20.8... 2.0... /dl...in...rats,...and...1121.7435.4... /dl...in...gerbils;...TG... was...significantly...higher...in...gerbils...than...in...other...animals... (P<0.05)....Additionally,...LPL...activity...was...323.227.4...U/L... in...mice,...356.241.9...U/L...in...rats,...and...668.8115.9...U/L...in... gerbils....LPL...activity...in...gerbils...was...significantly...higher... than...that...in...other...animals...(P<0.05)....However,...the...relative... ratio...of...LPL...activity...to...TG...was...12.62.1...in...mice,...17.86.0... in...rats,...and...3.86.1...in...gerbils,...and...it...was...significantly... lower...in...gerbils...than...in...other...animals...(P<0.05)....LPL...is...an... important... metabolizing... enzyme... that... hydrolyzes... triglycerides... in... the... blood,... and... it... is... considered... that... hyperlipidemia...in...gerbils...is...induced...by...low...LPL...activity. The effect of gum arabic supplementation on gut microbiota in laboratory-bred common marmoset (Callithrix jacchus) Yuko Shigeno1,2 , Chie Sano1 , Kentaro Nagaoka2 , Tsubasa Moriyama3 , Kimie Niimi1 1 RIKEN,...CBS,...ARD,...2 Tokyo...university...of...agriculture...and...technology,...Laboratory...of...veterinary...physiology,... 3 Japan...Animal...Care...Inc. Measurement of blood lipoprotein lipase activity in hyperlipidemic gerbil Momoko Hirano, Kazuhisa Sugai, Masahiko Fuzisawa, Yoji Hakamata Nippon...Veterinary...and...Life...Science...University P-101 P-102 --S 128-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 128 69...... Common... marmosets... (Callithrix jacchus),... known... as... experimental...animals,...tend...to...be...heavier...in...captivity...than... in...nature....There...are...many...reports...on...obesity...in...them....In... humans,... fatty... liver... is... one... of... the... well-known... health... problems...caused...by...obesity...and...drinking...alcohol....It...is... accompanied...by...high...levels...of...GGT,...GPT,...GOT...and...TG... in...the...blood...and...may...progress...to...liver...dysfunction...or... cirrhosis...without...taking...alcohol....Here,...we...investigated... the...condition...of...the...large...size...marmosets...in...our...facility.... We... administrated... EPA to... them,... which... has... been... reported...to...lower...blood...TG...levels...in...humans,...and...verified... its effects...on...marmosets. The...subjects...were...healthy...marmosets...bred...and...managed... at... our... facility... with... a... weight... of... over... 400... g... and... no... infectious... diseases.... They... underwent... body... weight... measurement,... complete... blood... count... test,... and... blood... biochemical...test....As...a...result,...several...subjects...showed... higher...GGT,...GPT,...GLU,...and...TG...than...the...standard...value.... After... 12-weeks... EPA... administration,... there... was... no... significant...change...in...body...weight...but...TG...values...were... significantly...reduced...in...many...subjects....GGT...tended...to... decrease,...but...GPT...and...GLU...fluctuated...for...each...subject.... We... found...that...some...common...marmosets...with...large... physique...in...our...facility...had...high...blood...TG,...GGT,...and... GPT,...thus...they...may...have...fatty...liver...result...from...obesity.... EPA... administration... to... large... marmosets... had... little... influence...on...their...body...weight,...but...significantly...reduced... blood...TG...levels....We...expected...that...EPA...has...an...effect...on... the...treatment...of...hypertriglyceridemia....Since...fluctuation... of... GPT... values... was... observed... during... the... EPA... administration,...it...is...necessary...to...further...investigate...the... effects...on...the...liver. [Background] It...has...been...reported...that...3-hydroxybutyrate... (3HB),...produced...during...a...ketogenic...diet,...improves...lipid... metabolism.... However,... there... are... difficulties... with... its... clinical...application...due...to...the...need...for...strict...dietary... restrictions...and...side...effects...such...as...muscle...loss....Poly- hydroxybutyrate...(PHB),...as...a...bio-polymer...of...3-HB,...can...be... decomposed...into...monomers...by...gut...microbiome...acting... 3-HB... donor.... In... this... research,... we... investigated... the... potential...of...PHB...on...dyslipidemia. [Materials and Methods] As...the...wild...type...and...obese... model,... we... used... C57BL/6N... mice... and... ob/ob... mice,... respectively....Rodent...diets...(CE-2,...Nippon...Clare)...and...2%... PHB...mixture...were...fed...ad...libitum....Body...and...liver...weight... changes,...serum...triglycerides,...cholesterol,...free...fatty...acids,... and...GPT...activity...were...analyzed....Histological...analysis...of... the...liver...was...performed...by...HE...staining...and...Oil...Red...O... staining.... RT-qPCR... was... employed... to... analyze... gene... expressions...of...lipid...metabolism-related...genes...in...the...liver.... In... addition,... Colon... microflora... was... analyzed... by... 16s... ribosomal...RNA...sequencing.... [Results] PHB...administration...significantly...decreased... non-HDL...cholesterol...and...free...fatty...acid...concentrations...in... serum...C57BL/6N...and...ob/ob...mice....A...decreasing...trend...in... liver... weight... associated... with... fatty... degeneration... was... observed...in...the...liver....PHB...also...decreased...serum...GPT...in... both...wild-type...and...obese...mice....In...the...liver...of...obese...mice,... lipid...droplets...around...the...central...vein...were...reduced,...and... mRNA... expressions... of... genes... related... to... fatty... acid... synthesis...showed...a...decreasing...trend....In...addition,...PHB... significantly...changed...the...colon...microflora...and...increased... the...alpha...diversity...of...C57BL/6N...mice. [Discussion]...PHB...suppressed...hyperlipidemia...by...inhibiting... the...fatty...acid...synthesis...in...the...liver....However,...further... research...is...needed...to...clarify...the...detailed...mechanism...of... PHB...in...the...improvement...of...lipid...metabolism. The situation of obese marmosets in our facility and the effect of EPA administration on them Chie Sano, Yuko Shigeno, Kimie Niimi Research...Resources...Division,...RIKEN...Center...for...Brain...Science Poly-hydroxybutyrate improves lipid metabolism of obese mice Mayuko Mishima, Masaki Nagane, Yuka Sato, Kazuhiro Kato, Kanon Ishitobi, Naoyuki Aihara, Junichi Kamiya, Yuichiro Hirayama, Ayaka Shima, Yuko Okamatsu, Takumi Sato, Tadashi Yamashita Laboratory...of...Biochemistry,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Azabu...University,...Laboratory...of...Veterinary... Pathology,...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Azabu...University,...Anicom...Advanced...Medical...Research...Institute,... Laboratory...of...Biochemistry,...Graduate...School...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Hokkaido...University,... Laboratory...of...Anti-Aging...Food,...Faculty...of...Applied...Biology,...Tokyo...University...of...Technology P-103 P-104 --S 129-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 129 69...... Our...facility...has...kept...many...naturally-aged...animals...used...in... gerontology...and...geriatric...researches....If...a...scientist...makes... a...research...using...these...animals...which...have...been...kept...for... a...long...time,...it...is...very...important...to...consider...the...effects...of... various...genetic...and...environmental...factors...on...them....In... the... present... study,... we... will... report... various... related... characteristics...of...the...physiological...aging...observed...in...our... mice.... Male... and... female... C57BL/6... (C57BL/6NCrSlc(B6N),... C57BL/6J(B6J))...mice...(4-weeks-old)...were...purchased...from... breeder...every...three...months...and...kept...over...their...lifetime.... Physiological... (body... weight,... food... intake,... water... consumption,...survival...rate),...behavioral...(grip...strength,... rotarod,...behavioral...observation),...hematological...(blood... count,...morphological...observation),...and...biochemical...(liver... and... kidney... function,... stress... hormones)... tests... were... performed...periodically...(every...1-3...months,...n=10).... Body... weight... showed... a... rapid... decrease... at... around... 16... months-old...(MO)...in...B6N...male...mice,...and...21...MO...in...B6J... female...mice. Survival...rates...of...B6N...mice...started...to...decrease...from...6... MO,... while... in... B6J... mice,... decreased... from... 21... MO.... Hematological...analyses...showed...that...the...total...WBC...count... started...to...decline...in...both...strains...at...around...18...MO...and... the...composition...of...WBC...tended...to...change...with...aging.... CORT...levels...were...relatively...higher...in...female...mice...and... tended...to...increase...with...age...in...both...B6...mice. Various...age-related...changes...(such...as...BW,...the...total...WBC... count...and...its...composition)...found...in...our...aged...mice...can...be... candidate...senescence...indicators...(physiological...aging)...at... individual... level.... In... the... future... we... will... continue... to... investigate... methods... of... enrichment... for... the... kept... an... appropriate...environment...in...mice. The...number...of...parvalbumin...(PV)...-positive...neurons,...which... is...a...type...of...inhibitory...interneuron,...is...reduced...in...the...brain... of...old...mice...as...compared...with...young...mice....However,...the... details...of...the...histological...changes...in...the...extracellular... matrix...(ECM)...of...the...mouse...brain...due...to...aging...remain... unclear....The...particulars...of...the...age-related...histological... changes...of...the...perineuronal...net...(PNN),...a...special...ECM... structure...that...is...thought...to...be...selectively...expressed... around...PV-positive...neurons,...also...remain...unclear. The...aim...of...this...study...was...to...clarify...the...age-related... histological...changes...in...the...ECM...of...mice...brains,...especially... for...PNN...and...PV-positive...neurons. We...used...the...12-month-old...brains...of...the...SAMR1,...SAMP8,... and... SAMP10... strains... of... the... Senescence-Accelerated... Mouse(SAM)....We...visualized...the...inhibitory...interneurons... and...ECM...immunohistologically....In...this...study,...we...mainly... analyzed...the...hippocampus. In...the...SAM,...the...number...of...PV-positive...neurons...in...the... hippocampus...was...decreased...as...compared...to...the...control... mice....Furthermore,...in...the...SAM,...the...number...of...Wisteria... floribunda...agglutinin-positive...PNNs...was...increased...as... compared...to...the...control...mice. SAM...shows...learning...and...memory...deficits,...which...may...be... related...to...the...changes...in...inhibitory...interneurons...and... ECM...in...the...hippocampus...observed...in...this...study. Our...facility...has...kept...many...naturally-aged...animals...used...in... gerontology...and...geriatric...researches....If...a...scientist...makes... a...research...using...these...animals...which...have...been...kept...for... a...long...time,...it...is...very...important...to...consider...the...effects...of... various... genetic... and... environmental... factors... on... them.... However,...a...clear...criterion...for...defining...of...aged...(old)...rat... has...not...been...established....In...the...present...study,...we...will... report... various... strain... differences... and... age-related... characteristics...observed...in...our...rats.... Male...and...female...F344/NSlc...(F344),...and...male...Slc:SD...(SD),... RccHan:WIST...(WH)...(n:...10)...rats...were...purchased...from... breeder...every...three...months...and...kept...over...their...lifetime.... Hematological...(blood...count),...morphological...(autopsy...and... histological... examination),... biochemical... (urinary... corticosterone)...and...physiological...(body...weight...(BW)...etc.)... analyses...were...performed.... Blood...tests...showed...that...the...total...WBC...count...started...to... decline...at...around...12...months-old...(M)...in...F344...rats,...and...at... around...18M...rats...in...SD...and...WH...rats....The...incidence...of... Leukemia...was...higher...(10-20%)...in...F344...male...from...15...M... and...in...SD...rats...from...21M....Enlarged...liver...and...spleen...were... often...found...at...autopsy...of...F344...and...SD...rats...(50-60%)....BW... peaks...at...18-21M...and...differed...by...sex...in...F344...rats....Various... age-related...changes...(such...as...BW,...the...total...WBC...count... and... its... composition)... found... in... our... aged... rat... can... be... candidate...senescence...indicators...at...the...individual...level.... We... will... investigate... these... parameters... in... detail... and... continue...to...search...for...novel...biomarkers. We... reported... that... we... have... developed... a... behavioral... monitoring... system... that...is...combined... with...the...sealed... positive... pressure... cages.... This... system... enabled... us... to... compare...the...basic...behaviors...such...as...activity...and...intake... of... water... and... food... between... germ-free... (GF)... and... SPF... environments,...and...it...was...revealed...that...GF...environment... affects...the...background...data...of...mice...in...several...aspects.... Thus,... to... assess... how... GF... environment... affects... the... senescence...phenomena,...we...made...GF...SAM...(senescence... accelerated... mouse).... We... compared... the... data... such... as... intakes... of... food... and... water,... body... weight,... amount... of... adipose... tissue,... and... lifespan... among... SAMP8... (P8)... and... SAMR1...(R1),...SPF...and...GF,...normal...chew...and...formula...food,... and...3...age...(1MO,...6MO,...and...10MO)...groups. As...results,...the...body...weight...of...R1...fed...with...normal...chew... was...higher...than...that...of...P8...in...SPF...and...GF...environment,... especially...in...GF...environment,...the...difference...in...body... weight... was... bigger... than... in... SPF... environment.... This... seemed...to...be...caused...by...the...bigger...cecum...volume...of...GF... R1.... There... was... a... tendency... that... the... food... intakes... negatively... correlate... with... the... body... weights... and... the... amount...of...adipose...tissue....Lower...absorption...efficiency...of... GF...mice...might...be...one...of...the...causes....The...survival...rates... of...both...strains...were...lower...in...GF...environment...compared... to...SPF...environment....This...suggests...that...the...microbiota...is... needed...in...these...strains,...especially...in...R1,...to...keep...their... health...status...well. Tfh-like... phenotype...were...observed...with...age...in...normal...mice...and... might...be...an...important...feature...of...immunosenescence....We... have...previously...reported...that...D-galactose-induced...aging... mouse...model...mimic...such...numerical...alteration...of...Tfh-like... cells... and... currently... known... normal... aging... processes... associated...with...T-cell...homeostasis....In...this...study,...we... examined...the...association...of...gut...microbiota...with...cellular... frequency...of...Tfh-like...cells....As...reported...previously,...a... significant...increase...of...Tfh-like...cells...(CD4+...CD3+...PD-1+... Tfh-like... cells,... which... might... contribute... to... immunosenescence. (c.753A)...of...cadherin...23...(Cdh23)...gene...responsible...for...age- related...hearing...loss...(ARHL)...to...wild-type...allele...(c.753G)...by... genome...editing....We...measured...the...hearing...levels...and... confirmed...that...the...onsets...and...progression...of...ARHL...are... significantly...delayed...in...C57BL/6J-Cdh23+/+ ,-ahl10MSM/Ms ... congenic... mice... compared... with... those... of... C57BL/6J- Cdh23+/+ ... mice.... ARHL...and...HFHL.... In...clinical...examinations...of...older...adults,...physiological... changes...with...age...should...be...considered....So...far,...Japan... mouse... clinic... (JMC)... has... conducted... blood... tests... on... 56... weeks...old...mice...to...obtain...basic...data...of...aging....However,... the...lifespan...of...mice...is...about...2...to...2.5...years...and...the...56... weeks...old...mice...to...obtain...baseline...data...on...aging....... To...understand...age-related...physiological...changes...that...are... appropriate...for...their...lifespan,...we...examined...further...aged... mice....We...used...C57BL/6N...line,...and...examined...12,...40,...83... and...108...weeks...of...old...mice...in...hematological...test,...and...16,... 44,...86...and...112...weeks...of...aged...mice...in...clinical...biochemical... test....As...a...result...of...hematological...test,...we...found...that... hemoglobin...level...was...decreased...age...dependently...and... significant...difference...was...detected...in...female...at...83...and... 108...weeks...old...and...in...male...of...108...weeks...old...mice....White... blood...cell...count...was...decreased...at...83...and...108...weeks...aged... female...mice....For...biochemical...test,...we...found...that...amylase... level...was... increased...age... dependent...manner... whereas... decreased...at...112...weeks...age...of...males...compared...to...83... weeks...aged...mice....Changes...in...lipid-related...parameters... were...observed...in...males...at...86...and...108...weeks...old...mice.... In...this...study,...we...showed...basic...data...of...clinical...blood... chemistry...and...hematology...of...aged...mice....These...data...may... be... important... for... aging... study,... but... not... sufficient... to... understand... of... aging.... As... the... next... steps,... we... plan... to... perform...comprehensive...phenotypic...analyses...such...as... histology...and...metabolism...analyses,...and...finally...combined... all...data...to...understand...the...complex...changes...caused...by... aging. Parkinson's... disease... (PD),... the... second... most... common... neurodegenerative...disorder,...is...characterized...by...the...loss... of...nigrostriatal...dopamine...neurons....PARK2...mutations... cause...early-onset...Parkinson's...disease...(EO-PD)....PARK2... encodes...an...E3...ubiquitin...ligase,...Parkin....Extensive...in...vitro... studies...and...cell...line...characterization...have...shown...that... Parkin...is...required...for...mitophagy,...but...the...physiological pathology...and...context...of...the...pathway...remain...unknown.... In... general,... monogenic... Parkin... knockout... mice... do... not... accurately...reflect...human...PD...symptoms...and...exhibitno... signs...of...dopaminergic...(DA)...neurodegeneration....To...assess... the...critical...role...of...Parkin-mediated...mitophagy...in...DA... neurons,...we...characterized...Parkin...knockout...mice...over...a... long...period...of...time....At...the...age...of...110...weeks,...Parkin... knockout... mice... exhibited... locomotor... impairments,... including...hindlimb...defects...and...neuronal...loss....In...their...DA... neurons,...fragmented...mitochondria...with...abnormal...internal... structures... accumulated.... The... age-related... motor... dysfunction...and...damaged...mitoch...ondria...pathology...in... Parkin-deficient...mice...suggest...that...impairment...of...mitocho... ndrial...clearance...may...underlie...the...pathology...of...PD. Age-related physiological changes in hematological and blood biochemical test of C57BL/6N mice Mao Ozaki, Akiko Shinogi, Ryoko Yanagisawa and Masaru Tamura The...Japan...Mouse...Clinic,...RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center Parkin mutation analysis in Juntendo University and Parkinson's disease model mice Sachiko Noda1 , Shigeto Sato1,2 , Norihiro Tada2 , Nobutaka Hattori1 1 Department...of...Neurology,...Juntendo...University...Graduate...School...of...Medicine,... 2 Atopy...Research...Center,...Juntendo...University...School...of...Medicine P-111 P-112 --S 133-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 133 69...... Domestication...is...a...sustained...multi-generational...process...in... which...animals...are...tamed...and...kept...as...livestock...or...pets.... With...an...increasing...demand...for...new...food...sources,...rapid... domestication... of...wild... animals... is...considered... a...viable... option....Selective...breeding,...the...conventional...method...of... domestication,...is...time-consuming...with...limited...success... rate....One...possible...unexplored...strategy...is,...identifying...gut... microorganisms...that...may...affect...domestication...and...using... them...to...domesticate...wild...animals....Recent...studies...have... identified...links...between...the...gut...microbiome...and...several... behaviors....Therefore,...we...tried...to...reveal...the...association... between...the...gut...microbiome...and...tameness...in...mice...in...the... present...study....We...used...wild...heterogeneous...stock...(WHS)... mice,...which...were...developed...from...eight...wild...strains...of... mice...by...selectively...breeding...for...active...tameness...over... many...generations,...resulting...in...two...tame...and...two...control... groups....[Methods] Ten...males...and...ten...females...from...each... group...of...WHS...mice...were...tested...for...active...tameness...and... subjected...to...feces...collection....Metagenomic...DNAs...were... extracted...from...each...animal...feces,...followed...by...shotgun... metagenomic...sequencing....Bioinformatics...analysis...is...done... on...the...sequences...obtained...to...conduct...taxonomic...and... functional...analysis...of...gut...microbiome....Blood...plasma...was... collected...from...the...same...mice...for...metabolomic...analysis.... [Results] We...found...significantly...higher...levels...of...active... tameness...in... selected...groups... than...in... control...groups.... Taxonomic...analysis...of...mouse...gut...microbiome...reveals... that... all... four... groups... have... similar... gut... microbiota... composition,...with...few...microbiome...species...differentially... abundant...between...control...and...selected...mice....After...doing... functional...analysis...of...the...sequences...obtained,...we...found... six...metabolic...pathways...in...the...gut...microbiome,...which...are... differentially...abundant...between...control...and...selected...mice... at...the...significant...level....Metabolic...byproducts...of...these... pathways... might... have... a... role... in... changing... the... host's... behaviors....Currently,...we...are...conducting...metabolomic... analysis... of... the... mice... blood... plasma... to... identify... these... metabolic...by-products. The...4...allele...of...apolipoprotein...E...(apoE)...gene...is...a...major... risk...factor...for...the...development...of...sporadic...Alzheimer's... disease...(AD),...and...the...interaction...between...apoE...and... amyloid... -protein...precursor...(APP)...has...gained...attention... as...the...therapeutic...target...for...AD....Having...discovered...a... specific...apoE...antagonist...(6KApoEp)...that...blocks...apoE... interaction...with...APP,...we...tested...the...therapeutic...potential... of... 6KApoEp... on... AD-relevant... phenotypes... in... APP/ presenilin...1...(APP/PS1)...Alzheimer...mice...that...express...each... human... apoE... isoform... of... apoE2,... apoE3,... or... apoE4... (designated...APP/PS1/E2,...APP/PS1/E3,...or...APP/PS1/E4... mice).... At... 12... months... of... age,... we... intraperitoneally... administered...6KApoEp...(250...g/kg)...or...vehicle...once...daily... for...3...months....At...15...months...of...age,...blockage...of...apoE-APP... interaction...by...6KApoEp...improved...cognitive...impairment... in...most...testes...of...learning...and...memory,...including...novel... object...recognition...and...maze...tasks...in...APP/PS1/E2,...APP/ PS1/E3,...and...APP/PS1/E4...mice...as...compared...with...the... corresponding...vehicle-treated...mice,...and...did...not...alter... behavior... in... nontransgenic... littermates.... Moreover,... 6KApoEp...therapy...demonstrated...amelioration...of...brain... parenchymal...and...cerebral...vascular... -amyloid...deposits... and...decreased...abundance...of...amyloid...-protein...(A)...in... APP/PS1/E2,...APP/PS1/E3,...and...APP/PS1/E4...mice...as... compared...with...vehicle-treated...mice....Notably,...among... these...mice,...greater...effects...for...A-lowering...by...6KApoEp... exerted...in...APP/PS1/E4...mice...as...compared...with...the...other... two...APP/PS1...mice...expressing...apoE2...or...apoE3...isoform.... These...therapeutic...effects...occur...through...decreasing...APP... plasma...membrane...amount...and...p44/42...mitogen-activated... protein...kinase...phosphorylation. Our...findings...provide...the...preclinical...evidence...that...apoE... antagonist,...6KApoEp...therapy...aimed...at...targeting...the... interaction... between... apoE... and... APP... is... a... promising... strategy... for... AD,... and... may... be... most... suitable... for... AD... patients...carrying...apoE4...isoform.
