NOG...mice...transplanted...with...human...peripheral...blood... mononuclear... cells... developed... xenograft-versus-host- disease...(GVHD)...in...about...one...month,...making...long-term... observation...difficult....NOD.Cg-Prkdc<scid>...Il2rg<tm1Sug>... B2m<em1Tac>...H2-Ab1<tm1Doi>/Jic...(NOG-MHC),...a... double...knockout...of...MHC...I...and...II,...has...moderate...GVHD.... In...this...study,...to...obtain...background...date...on...NOG-MHC... and...performed...a...comparative...analysis...with...NOG. 20...NOG-MHC...females...and...males...each,...and...18...NOG... females...and...19...NOG...males...were...observed...once...every... day...and...body...weights...were...measured...once...a...week...from... 4...to...26...weeks...of...age(growth...curves)....each...strain,...7...and...26... weeks...of...age,...10...males...and...10...females...were...collected... blood...and...body...weight...were...measured....After...euthanasia,... autopsy...examination...was...performed...and...organs...were... measured...(background...data)....The...results...were...analyzed... by...Student's...t-test. No...difference...was...observed...in...appearance...until...26...weeks... of...age....The...average...body...weights...of...male...and...females... were...about...2...g...and...1...g...smaller...than...those...of...the...NOG- MHC...at...each...weeks...of...age....The...values...of...white...blood... cells,... red... blood... cells,... hemoglobin,... hematocrit,... and... erythrocyte...constant...in...both...males...and...females...at...26... weeks... of... age... were... higher... in... NOG-MHC,... but... no... abnormalities...were...confirmed...at...necropsy....Although... there...was...a...difference...in...body...weight,...there...was...no... difference...in...growth...curve...or...organ...weight...ratio,...NOG- MHC...is...considered...to...have...no...difference...other...than... smaller...body...size...than...NOG....No...abnormal...findings...were... observed...until...26...weeks...of...age....... We...will...collect...data...at...a...higher...age...to...confirm...whether... the...NOG-MHC...is...accompanied...by...age-related...changes... similar... to...those...of...the... background... strain,... NOG,...and... changes... in... blood... properties... and... causes... will... also... be... discussed. The... importance... of... genetically... engineered... rats... is... increasing.... Compared... to... mice,... rats... have... superior... cognitive...abilities...and...metabolic...functions...similar...to...those... of... humans,... making... them... useful... for... brain... science,... pharmacokinetics,... and...toxicity...studies....However,...the... establishment... of... reproductive... techniques... has... been... delayed,... which... is... a... barrier... to... utilizing... genetically... engineered...rats....Potentially,...the...cold...transport...of...rat... sperm... would... be... useful... for... efficiently... sharing... rat... resources.... However,... it... was... impossible... due... to... the... decrease...of...rat...sperm...motility...after...storage...for...6...hours... at...4....In...this...study,...we...evaluated...the...effect...of...dimethyl... sulfoxide...(DMSO)...and...quercetin...on...cold-stored...rat...sperm... to...develop...the...cold-transport...system...for...rats....DMSO...and... quercetin... maintained... the... motility... of... cold-stored... rat... sperm...for...3...days...(control:...1.5%...vs...DMSO/quercetin:... 45.3%)....Furthermore,...fertilized...oocytes...were...obtained... from...cold-stored...sperm...for...5...days....The...fertilized...oocytes... were...developed...into...pups...by...embryo...transfer....In...addition,... we...obtained...fertilized...oocytes...and...live...pups...from...cold- transported...rat...sperm...by...IVF...and...embryo...transfer....This... study...is...the...first...successful...report...of...cold...storage...and... transport...for...rat...sperm....CARD...Rat...Bank...already...uses... this...technique...to...transport...and...produce...rat...resources... efficiently....The...cold-transport...system...for...rat...sperm...will... accelerate... the... use... of... genetically... engineered... rats... in... medical...research. Background data on NOG-MHC Takahiro Yamaguchi1 , Megumi Nishiwaki1 , Suguru Mimura1 , Yuyo Ka2 , Tomoyuki Ogura2 , Masahiko Yasuda2 , Akira Takakura2 , Riichi Takahashi2 1 CLEA...Japan,...Inc,...2 Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals Successful transport technique of cold-stored rat sperm Katsuma Yamaga1 , Satohiro Nakao1 , Nobuyuki Mikoda2,3 , Naomi Nakagata2 , Toru Takeo1 1 Div....of...Reprod....Eng.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ.,...2 Div....of...Reprod....Biotech....Innov.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ., 3 Kyudo,...Co....Ltd P-141 P-142 --S 148-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 148 69...... In...recent...years,...domestic...piglets...have...been...used...in... preclinical...studies...to...develop...medical...devices....However,... most...piglets...are...crossbreds,...and...fundamental...data...are... lacking....In...this...study,...we...produced...a...purebred,...white- haired,... Large... White... breed... of... domestic... pig... called... "SHIZUOKA...EXPIG"EXPIGfor...experimental...use...and... investigated...its...characteristics. The...EXPIG...was...produced...using...the...Large...White...breed... of...pigs...developed...at...our...research...center....The...pigs...were... born...on...a...farm...that...complied...with...SPF...standards....The... animals...isolated...at...6...weeks...of...age...in...a...designated...rearing... house,...and...raised...under...a...specific...feeding...program....In... addition,... monitoring... was...conducted... for...a...total...of...13... zoonotic...and...porcine...infectious...diseases. The...following...characteristics...were...monitored....(1)Weight... was...measured...weekly...(up...to...11weeks)....(2)...Changes...in... body...length,...body...height,...and...chest...measurements...were... recorded....(3)...Organ...weights...(brain,...heart,...liver,...kidney,... etc.)...were...measured...at...40...kg...body...weight....(4)...Other biological... parameters,... such... as... blood... and... serum... biochemical...components,...were...investigated....In...addition,... CT/MRI...images...were...obtained...for...anatomical...findings,... and...virtual...slides...of...each...tissue...specimen...were...prepared... for...histological...findings. Regarding... disease... monitoring,... the... cleanliness... of...the... EXPIG...was...confirmed....At...11...weeks,...the...body...weight...and... body... length... were... 31.44.6kg... and... 76.12.7cm,... respectively.... Organ... weight... measurements... were completed.... The... collected... data... were... compiled... as... an... EXPIG-ATLAS....This...study...will...serve...as...fundamental... findings...for...experiments...using...the...EXPIG. At...69th ...JALAS...meeting,...we...reported...that...anti-inhibin... monoclonal...antibody...(AIMA)...treatment...increased...the... number...of...litters...in...C57BL/6J...(B6J)...mice....On...the...other... hand,...in...CFW...strain...that...belongs...to...Swiss...mice,...PMSG/ hCG...treatment...successfully...increased...the...number...of... fetuses...(Ito...et...al....1974)....In...this...study,...we...used...B6J...and... Swiss...ICR...mice...to...examine...the...strain...differences...in...the... effects...of...superovulation...treatment...on...their...pregnancy.... The...mating...rates...were...63-71%...in...both...PMSG/hCG...and... 2P4...(twice...injections...of...progesterone...for...estrous...cycle... synchronization)-AIMA...groups;...in...the...control...groups,... 32%...for...B6J...and...68%...for...ICR....By...contrast,...the...mating... rate...of...the...2P4-PMSG...group...was...lower...in...B6J...mice...but... higher... in... ICR... mice... (8%... vs... 64%,... respectively).... The... pregnancy...rate...in...B6J...mice...decreased...significantly...to... 40%...following...PMSG/hCG...(100%...in...control),...but...that...did... not...decrease...in...ICR...mice...(88%...vs...86%...in...control)....The... litter...size...significantly...increased...in...the...2P4-AIMA...group... in...both...strains...(B6J:...12.4...pups,...ICR:...21.4...pups,...both...1.4-fold... higher...than...control)....The...litter...size...of...B6J...mice...decreased... by...PMSG/hCG...and...2P4-PMSG...compared...to...the...control... group....(5.0...and...1.0...pups...vs...8.6...pups)....However,...in...ICR... mice,... the... litter... size... were... similar... to... that... of... control... following...the...same...treatments...(18.0,...15.0...pups...vs...15.3... pups),...reaching...the...maximum...of...25-30...pups...per...female.... Thus,...although...there...was...a...strain...difference...in...the...effect... of... superovulation... on... pregnancy,... AIMA-induced... superovulation...gave...the...best...result...in...the...litter...size...per... female...irrespective...of...the...strain....It...also...resulted...in...the... best...overall...efficiency...to...produce...pups...per...treated...female... in...both...strains...(Control...vs...AIMA,...B6J:...2.8...vs...6.8...pups,... ICR:...9.0...vs...14.1...pups). Characterization of a purebred (Large White) experimental livestock pig, SHIZUOKA EXPIG Yusuke Ikami1 , Junichi Maehata2 , Masayoshi Otake1 , Hisashi Uchiyama3 , Fumio Furukawa3 , Yuji Yamamoto2 , Akihisa Kangawa1 , Satoko Enya1 , Hisayoshi Takagi3 , Masatoshi Shibata1 1 Shizuoka...Prefectural...Research...Institute...of...Animal...Industry,...Swine...&...Poultry...Research...Center, 2 JAPAN...SLC...Inc...Nakaizu...Production...Facility,...3 JAPAN...SLC...Inc...Biotechnical...Center Effects of superovulation treatment on pregnancy and strain differences Ayumi Hasegawa1 , Keiji Mochida1 , Masahiko Hatakeyama2 , Atsuo Ogura1 1 RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center,...2 CLEA...Japan...Inc. P-143 P-144 --S 149-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 149 69...... Mice...have...been...widely...used...as...experimental...animal... models...in...biomedical...research...since...generation...of...gene- modified... (GM)... mice... were... succeed.... Currently,... the... advancement...in...time-...and...cost-efficient...in...generating...GM... mice...is...preferred....However,...the...preparation...method...of... pseudopregnant...females,...which...are...essential...for...the... generation...of...GM...mice,...has...been...remain...unchanged...since... it...was...established....For...the...preparation...of...pseudopregnant... mice,...females...at...the...proestrus...and...estrus...stages...are... selected...before...paired...with...the...vasectomized...males.... Since...the...precision...of...female...mice...selection...depends...on... the... experience... and... methods... of... the... operator,... the... preparation...of...pseudopregnant...mice...is...inefficient...and... difficult...to...ensure. Here,...we...proposed...a...new...and...simple...method...to...produce... pseudopregnant...female...mice....We...focused...on...inducing... synchronization...of...the...estrous...cycle...by...administrating...a... hormone...agonist...(HA)...via...intraperitoneal...injection.... First,...we...conducted...the...dose...optimization...of...this...HA... since...there...is...no...information...about...this...HA...treatment...in... mice....We...found...that...0.02...mg...injection...for...each...mouse...is... the...best...dose...in...inducing...estrus...cycle...synchronization.... Next,...HA-treated...females...were...paired...with...wild-type... males,...and...we...investigated...the...copulation...rate...based...on... the... presence... of... the... vaginal... plug... on... the... next... day.... Unexpectedly,...even...though...80%...of...HA-treated...females... were...on...proestrus...or...estrus...stages...by...vaginal...cytology,... the... rate... of... copulation... was... 40%.... By... improving... the... condition,...70%...of...HA-treated...females...copulated...with...wild- type...males.... Moreover,...we...confirmed...that...HA-treatment...had...no...effect... on...fetal...development. We...concluded...that...this...HA...treatment...has...the...potential... as...a...simple...method...to...produce...pseudopregnant...female... mice. Although...the...Cre-loxP...recombination...system...has...been... extensively... used... to... analyze... gene... function... in... vivo,... spatiotemporal... control... of... Cre... activity... is... a... critical... limitation...for...easy...and...precise...recombination....Here,...we... established...photoactivatable-Cre...(PA-Cre)...knock-in...(KI)... mice...at...a...safe...harbor...locus...for...the...spatial...and...temporal... regulation...of...Cre...recombinase...activity....The...mice...showed... whole-body...Cre...recombination...activity...following...light... exposure... for... only... 1...h.... Almost... no... leaks... of... Cre... recombination...activity...were...detected...in...the...KI...mice... under...natural...light...conditions....Spot...irradiation...could... induce... locus-specific... recombination... noninvasively,... enabling...us...to...compare...phenotypes...on...the...left...and...right... sides... in... the... same... mouse.... Furthermore,... long-term... irradiation...using...an...implanted...wireless...LED...substantially... improved...Cre...recombination...activity,...especially...in...the... brain....These...results...demonstrate...that...PA-Cre...KI...mice... can... facilitate... the... spatiotemporal... control... of... genetic... engineering...and...provide...a...useful...resource...to...elucidate... gene...function...in...vivo...with...Cre-loxP. Study of the simple method to produce pseudopregnant female mice Ayako Isotani, Gema Puspa Sari NAIST Photoactivatable Cre knock-in mice for spatiotemporal control of genetic engineering in vivo Yuko Yamauchi1 , Kazuto Yoshimi1,2 , Takao Tanaka3 , Toshio Shimada3 , Moritoshi Sato4 , Tomoji Mashimo1,2 1 Laboratory...Animal...Research...Center,...Division...of...Animal...Genetics,...The...Institute...of...Medical...Science,...The... University...of...Tokyo,...2 Center...for...Experimental...Medicine...and...Systems...Biology,...Division...of...Genome...Engineering,... The...University...of...Tokyo P-145 P-146 --S 150-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 150 69...... Among...non-human...primates,...Macaca...species...are...the... nearest...experimental...animals...to...human,...and...they...have... been...utilized...for...researches...to...study...pathogenesis...and... therapeutics...for...emerging...infectious...diseases...in...human... and...intractable...human...diseases...that...are...not...recaptured... by... rodent... models.... Especially,... cynomolgus... monkeys... (Macaca fascicularis)...are...suitable...for...analyzing...early... development...of...primates...and...establishment...of...disease... model...animals...with...genetic...modifications,...because...their... breeding...is...able...to...be...performed...all...year...round....For... breeding,...we...perform...intracytoplasmic...sperm...injection... into...oocytes,...and...fertilized...eggs...are...developed...into...the... blastocyst...stage...in vitro...followed...by...transplantation...into... oviducts...of...the...surrogated...mother...monkeys....To...obtain... oocytes,... female... monkeys... treated... with... gonadotropin- releasing...hormone...agonist...(GnRH)...before...14...days...are... subjected...to...continuous...stimulation...with...human...follicle... stimulating...hormone...(hFSH)...for...10...days,...subsequently...to... human...chorionic...gonadotropin...(hCG)...treatment....After...40... hours,...oocytes...are...directly...collected...from...the...ovary...by... injecting...catheter....After...secondary...oocyte...collection,...we... successfully...obtained...similar...numbers...of...oocytes...from... 60%...females,...although...any...mature...oocytes...were...not... collected...from...the...other...animals....In...the...plasma...of...female... monkeys...with...poor...efficiency,...we...detected...high...level...of... antibodies...against...hFSH...and...hCG,...suggesting...that...the... poor...ovarian...response...to...hFSH/hCG...may...result...from... antibody...production...against...the...human...hormones...(Seita... et al.,...2019)....To...achieve...oocytes...collection...from...same... animals...repeatedly,...we...intravenously...injected...an...anti- CD20...antibody...(Rituxan),...which...is...clinically...utilized...to... deplete...B...cells,...into...secondary...applied...female...monkeys,... when...they...were...treated...with...GnRH....We...successfully... inhibited...anti-hFSH...antibody...production...and...obtained... oocytes...from...a...female...treated...with...20...mg/kg...of...Rituxan.... Mature...oocytes...were...not...obtained...from...ovary...of...a...female... injected...with...4...mg/kg...of...Rituxan...on...oocyte...collection... day....Collectively,...these...results...suggest...that...treatment... with...20...mg/kg...of...Rituxan...is...necessary...for...secondary... oocyte...collection...from...cynomolgus...monkeys. Capacitation... is... an... important... event... to... complete... fertilization...in...mammalian...sperm....Cholesterol...efflux...is... known...as...a...trigger...to...induce...capacitation....Bovine...serum... albumin...(BSA)...is...generally...used...for...in...vitro...fertilization... as...a...cholesterol...acceptor...to...induce...sperm...capacitation.... Previously,... we... reported... that... methyl--cyclodextrin... (MBCD)...improved...the...fertilization...rate...of...frozen-thawed... and...cold-stored...mouse...sperm....A...comparison...of...albumin... and...cyclodextrin...is...helpful...to...understand...the...mechanism... of...capacitation....In...this...study,...we...examined...the...effects...of... BSA,...MBCD,...and...dimethyl--cyclodextrin...(DMACD)...on... several...events...of...capacitation...in...mouse...sperm....Treatment... of...BSA,...MBCD,...and...DMACD...enhanced...the...fertilization... rate...in...vitro....BSA...and...MBCD...promoted...cholesterol...efflux... from...the...sperm...membrane....All...compounds...promoted...the... phospholipids...efflux....DMACD...did...not...promote...cholesterol... efflux...but...enhanced...the...phospholipids...efflux...significantly.... BSA,...MBCD,...and...DMACD...induced...several...events...of... capacitation...such...as...increasing...membrane...fluidity,...re- localization...of...lipid...raft,...and...acrosome...reaction....These... results...suggested...BSA...and...cyclodextrins...induced...sperm... capacitation...by...changing...the...membrane...environment....In... addition,...we...revealed...DMACD...is...a...novel...compound...to... induce...capacitation...without...promoting...cholesterol...efflux. The...Niemann-Pick...disease...type...C...(NPC)...model...mice...are... useful...for...the...research...and...development...of...new...drugs.... However,...the...NPC...model...mice...(Npc1-/- )...are...infertile...in... both... sexes,... making... it... impossible... to... breed... them... by... natural...mating....To...solve...the...breeding...problem,...in...this... study,...we...attempted...to...apply...reproductive...technology...to... establish...an...efficient...breeding...system...for...Npc1-/- ...mice.... Ultrasuperovulation...using...equine...chorionic...gonadotropin... and...inhibin...antiserum...(IASe)...recovered...ovulation...and... increased...the...number...of...ovulated...oocytes...in...female...mice... of...Npc1-/- ....Sperm...collected...from...male...mice...of...Npc1-/- ...at... 8-weeks-old...had...motility...and...fertility....Fertilized...oocytes... produced...via...IVF...developed...into...live...pups...by...embryo... transfer.... These... results... indicate... that... reproductive... engineering...techniques...can...be...used...to...efficiently...breed... Npc1-/- ... mice.... This... finding... will... contribute... to... the... development...of...novel...therapy...using...NPC...model...mice. To...obtain...as...many...genetically...modified...(GM)...marmosets... as... possible,... improving... embryo... implantation... and... continuation... of... pregnancy... are... very... important.... The... implantation...and...pregnancy...rates...of...GM...embryos...that... use...in...vitro...matured...and...(IVM-IVF)...oocytes...are...lower... than...naturally...mated...(NM)...embryos....In...this...study,...we... analyzed... the... effectiveness... of... luteal... support... used... in... humans...and...cattle...on...marmosets...from...the...year...2017...to... 2021. The...response...of...embryos...to...luteal...support...were...analyzed... by... rates... of... implantation,... pregnancy,... birth,... and... miscarriage...of...four...types...of...embryos;...NM...wild-type...(A)... fresh...embryos,...(B)...frozen-thawed...embryos,...and...IVM-IVF... GM... embryo... mutated... with... (C)... base... editor,... (D)... transcription...activator-like...effector...nucleases...(TALEN).... For...luteal...support,...0.2...mg/head...of...luteum...depot...(ASKA... Animal...Health)...was...administered...once...a...week...for...9... weeks...after...embryo...transfer...or...until...the...fetal...heartbeat... was...confirmed,... and...serum... progesterone... levels... were... measured.... The... implantation... was... defined... when... progesterone...levels...continuously...exceeded...10...ng/ml...for...3... weeks...and...an...ultrasound...confirmed...fetal...sac...formation.... Pregnancy... was... confirmed... when... fetal... heartbeat... was... detected,...and...miscarriages...were...accounted...for...only...after... confirmation...of...implantation...in...the...animals.... Comparison...of...rates...of...implantation,...pregnancy,...delivery,... and...miscarriage...showed...that...groups...A,...B,...and...C...did...not... show... significant... differences... with... luteal... treatments,... whereas... group... D... exhibited... higher... rates... with... luteal... support...(P<0.01,...P<0.05,...P<0.01,...Fisher's...exact...test).... These...results...suggested...that...luteal...support...improved...the... implantation...and...pregnancy...rates...of...the...manipulated... embryos....In...contrast,...miscarriage...rate...increased...when... luteal...support...was...withdrawn....We...would...like...to...evaluate... whether... luteal... support... is... useful... for... maintaining... pregnancy. Establishment of an efficient breeding system for Niemann-Pick disease C model mice Serina Kuroshima1 , Kotono Ito1 , Reiri Koga1 , Yoshino Wakasugi1 , Katsuma Yamaga1 , Satohiro Nakao1 , Akira Ishii2 , Aina Shirakawa2 , Yuki Kondo2 , Tetsumi Irie3 , Yoichi Ishitsuka2 , Naomi Nakagata4 , Toru Takeo1 1 Division...of...Reproductive...Engineering,...Center...for...Animal...Resources...and...Development,...Kumamoto...University,... 2 Department...of...Clinical...Pharmacology,...Graduate...School...of...Pharmaceutical...Sciences,...Kumamoto...University,... 3 Department...of...Pharmaceutical...Packaging...Technology,...Graduate...School...of...Pharmaceutical...Sciences,...Kumamoto... University,...4 Division...of...Reproductive...Technology...and...Innovation,...Center...for...Animal...Resources...and...Development,... Kumamoto...University Examination of luteal support method for embryo transfer of marmoset Yuko Yamada1 , Tomoko Ishibuchi 1 , Mitsuyoshi Togashi1 , Yoshihisa Sawada1,2 , Mai Aoyama1 , Wakako Kumita1 , Kenya Sato1 , Yoko Kurotaki1 , Erika Sasaki1 1 Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals,...2 JAC...CORPORATION P-149 P-150 --S 152-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 152 69...... In...vitro...fertilization...(IVF)...of...mice...is...the...advantage...of... producing...a...large...number...of...fertilized...embryos...in...a... single... IVF,... widely... used... for... research... that... requires... identical...litters. After... IVF,... fertilized... embryos... are... washed... from... the... fertilization...medium...using...a...glass...pipette...to...remove... cumulus...cells...and...sperm...as...much...as...possible,...and...then... transferred... to... the... culture... medium.... This... washing... is... currently...done...in...each...petri...dish...of...fertilization...medium,... which...is...a...time-consuming...and...labor-intensive...process... when...creating...large...numbers...of...stock...cryopreserved... embryos. In...this...study,...we...investigated...whether...the...washing...of... fertilized... embryos... can... be... simplified... by... using... cell... strainers...that...can...separate...cells...by...size,...using...strainer... mesh...sizes...of...45m,...60m,...70m,...and...85m....With...a...mesh... size...of...60m,...oocytes...were...trapped...in...the...mesh,...while... cumulus...cells...and...sperm...were...able...to...pass...through....We... also...found...that...oocytes...could...be...collected...in...Petri...dishes... easily...and...quickly...by...inverting...the...mesh...and...washing...the... culture...medium...from...the...top...of...the...inverted...strainer... mesh...(strainer...washing)....Normally,...the...washing...time...per... petri...dish...is...about...5...minutes,...but...strainer...washing...is... simple...and...shortens...the...time...to...about...2.5...minutes...for... multiple...petri...dishes. Fertilization...rate...of...fertilized...embryos...collected...from... multiple... Petri... dishes... by... strainer... washing... using... the... C57BL/6...strain...is...73.4%,...lower...than...the...control...rate...of... 85.6%,...but...the...embryo...transfer...rate...after...cryopreserved... 2-cell...stage...embryos...is...60.013.2%,...similar...to...the...control... rate...of...48.32.9%....Comparable...results...were...obtained... with...genetically...modified...mice...on...a...B6...background. In...conclusion,...the...strainer...washing...method...is...a...very... simple...and...efficient...way...to...recover...fertilized...eggs,...and...is... very...useful...in...the...field...of...developmental...engineering. Cryopreservation...of...rat...sperm...is...a...useful...method...of... efficiently... managing... rat... resources.... Recently,... we... demonstrated...that...the...use...of...a...medium...adapted...to...rat... IVF...(R-mHTF)...during...in vitro...fertilization...improved...the... fertilization...ability...of...frozen-thawed...sperm....In...this...study,... we...evaluated...the...efficacy...of...R-mHTF...on...frozen-thawed... sperm...from...transgenic...rats...and...examined...the...embryos... derived... from... IVF... using... said... sperm.... Sperm... were... collected...from...the...cauda...epididymides...of...SD-Tg...CAG- EGFP...males...(11-12...weeks...of...age)....Sperm...were...placed...in... sperm...cryopreservation...solution,...transferred...into...straws... and...cryopreserved...in...liquid...nitrogen....The...sperm...straws... were...subsequently...removed...from...the...liquid...nitrogen...and... thawed,...then...the...sperm...suspension...was...introduced...into...a... tube...containing...1...mL...mHTF....The...tube...was...incubated...at... 37...for...30...min,...centrifuged...at...300...g...for...1...min,...and...then... 50...uL...of...the...precipitated...mass...was...introduced...into...a...200... uL...drop...of...mHTF...or...R-mHTF....After...the...dead...sperm... were... removed,... oocytes... from... the... oviducts... of... superovulated...Slc:SD...females...(5-6...weeks...of...age)...were... transferred...into...the...sperm...suspension...medium...and...IVF... was...carried...out....Results...show...that...the...IVF...rate...using... mHTF...was...66.4......19.0%...(n=10),...while...the...IVF...rate...using... R-mHTF...was...87.6......10.0%...(n=10,...P<0.01,...t-test)....After... embryo...transfer,...the...birth...rates...of...mHTF...and...R-mHTF... were... 57.5... ... 5.0%... (n=4)... and... 43.3... ... 18.1%... (n=12)... respectively.... These... results... suggest... that... R-mHTF... is... effective...in...improving...the...fertilization...rate...in...IVF...using... cryopreserved...sperm...obtained...from...transgenic...rats. Development of effective strainer washing method of mice in vitro fertilized embryo Motohito Goto, Takahiro Kagawa, Riichi Takahashi Central...Institute...for...Experimental...Animals In vitro fertilization using frozen-thawed sperm obtained from transgenic rats Nobuyuki Mikoda1,2 , Katsuma Yamaga3 , Satohiro Nakao3 , Naomi Nakagata1 , Toru Takeo3 1 Center...for...Animal...Resources...and...Development...(CARD),...Kumamoto...University,...Kumamoto,...Japan.,...2 Kyudo...Co.,... Ltd.,...Tosu,...Japan.,...3 Division...of...Reproductive...Engineering,...Center...for...Animal...Resources...and...Development...(CARD),... Kumamoto...University,...Kumamoto,...Japan. P-151 P-152 --S 153-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 153 69...... Recent... advances... in... next-generation... sequencing... technologies... have... led... to... the... detection... of... complex... chromosome...rearrangements...(CCRs)...consisting...of...three... or...more...chromosome...breaks...in...clinical...samples...from... patients...with...cancer...and...congenital...diseases....However,... the...pathogenic...mechanisms...of...these...diseases...are...largely... unknown,...and...the...establishment...of...appropriate...animal... models...is...essential...for...their...elucidation....In...this...study,...we... aimed...to...establish...an...optimal...experimental...system...to... induce...the...intended...CCRs...in...mice...with...high...accuracy.... Using...the...i-GONAD...method...of...generating...chromosome... inversion...mice...(Iwata...et...al.,...Sci...Rep...2019),...we...performed... genome...editing...on...genetically... engineered...mice...with... increased...susceptibility...to...DNA...mutations...due...to...genome... stability...abnormalities....We...designed...three...guide...RNAs...to... induce...CCRs...where...genomic...mutations...causing...cancer... and...developmental...abnormalities...are...concentrated....In... addition,... we... designed... three... single-stranded... oligodeoxynucleotides... (ssODNs)... that... joined... the... chromosomal...breakpoints...together;...each...ssODN...had...a... sequence...homologous...to...each...junction...point...so...that...two... inversions...were...induced...by...the...homology-directed...repair... (HDR)...process...between...the...targeted...regions...and...the... homologous...ssODNs....The...5 ...and...3 ...ends...of...the...ssODNs... were...protected...with...two...consecutive...phosphorothioate- modified...bases...to...improve...the...HDR...efficiency....While... induction...of...CCRs...was...difficult...in...experiments...using...wild- type...mice,...we...succeeded...in...inducing...CCRs...with...high... efficiency...in...genetically...modified...mice...with...abnormal... genomic...stability.... This... method... provides... an... efficient... approach...for...engineering...chromosomal...rearrangements... and...contributes...to...the...study...of...diseases...caused...by...such... rearrangements. [Objective] Lung...transplantation...has...been...considered...as... a... fundamental... treatment... for... chronic... lung... diseases.... However,...there...is...an...absolute...shortage...of...donors...for...lung... transplantation...compared...to... the... number...of... patients... awaiting...transplantation....As...a...solution...to...this...shortage...of... donor...organs,...the..."blastocyst...complementation...method,"... in...which...wild-type...pluripotent...stem...cells...are...injected...into... blastocysts...of...organ-deficient...animal...models...to...produce... organs...derived...from...pluripotent...stem...cells,...has...been... attracting... attention.... In... this... study,... we... investigated... whether...lungs...derived...from...rat...embryonic...stem...cells...(ES... cells)...can...be...generated...in...lung...agenesis...mouse...model...by... the...blastocyst...complementation...method. [Methods] We...examined... the...requirements... for...lung... formation...in...the...Fibroblast...growth...factor...receptor...2... isoform...IIIb...(Fgfr2b)...knockout...(KO)...mouse...model....In... addition,...we...injected...rat...ES...cells...into...the...Fgfr2b-KO... model...to...investigate...whether...rat...cells...can...rescue...the... lung... defect... caused... by... Fgfr2b-KO... and... produce... a... functional...lung. [Results] Analysis...of...allogeneic...chimeras...containing... Fgfr2b-KO...and...wild...type...cells...showed...that...lungs...were... present...only...when...the...chimeras...contained...more...than... 10%...wild-type...mouse...cells....In...addition,...the...formed...lung... epithelium...was...almost...completely...composed...of...wild-type... cells,... indicating... that... the... Fgfr2b-KO... model... is... an... epithelium-deficient... model...of...the...lung....Furthermore,... chimeric...embryos...obtained...by...injecting...rat...ES...cells...into... the...Fgfr2b-KO...mouse...model...formed...lungs...with...nearly... rat-derived...lung...epithelium....However,...postnatal...analysis... of...the...chimeric...individuals...showed...that...the...lungs...were... not...functional...after...birth...because...the...rat...lung...epithelial... tissue...was...still...in...the...prenatal...stage. [Conclusion] Rat... lung... formed... in...Fgfr2b-KO... mouse... model... is... immature... even... in... mouse... body... and... has... no... postnatal... function.... This... is... because... the... rat... lung... epithelium,... which... develops... later... than... the... mouse,... maintains... its... own... developmental... speed... even... in... the... mouse. Generation of rat derived lungs using Fgfr2b-KO mouse model by blastocyst complementation method Shunsuke Yuri, Yuki Murase, Ayako Isotani Nara...institute...of...science...and...technology... P-153 P-154 --S 154-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 154 69...... MII...stage...oocytes...obtained...by...in...vitro...maturation...(IVM)... of...mice...have...low...fertilization...and...development...rates....One... of...the...reasons...for...this...is...thought...to...be...the...decrease...in... mitochondrial...function...associated...with...the...overproduction... of...reactive...oxygen...species...(ROS)....We...have...shown...that... the...addition...of...-Nicotinamide...mononucleotide...(-NMN),... a...precursor...of...nicotinamide...adenine...dinucleotide...(NAD+ ),... to...the...IVM...medium...can...reduce...ROS...overproduction... (Anzai...et al.,...2016)....However,...there...are...many...unclear... points...about...the...interaction...between...the...activation...of... DNA...repair...ability...and...the...ooplasm....In...this...study,...using... 3-Aminobenzamide...(3-ABA),...which...inhibits...the...NAD+... consuming...enzyme...PARP1,...the...effect...of...co-addition...of... -NMN...and...3-ABA...in...the...in vitro...maturation...results... shown...generated...from...mouse...GV...stage...oocytes....There... was...no...significant...difference...in...the...in...vitro...maturation... results...of...mTaM...medium...supplemented...with...various... concentrations... of... -NMN... compared... to... the... medium... without...-NMN....In...vitro...maturation...results...of...mTaM... medium... supplemented... with... 30... mM... of... 3-ABA... (66%;... 33/50)... were... significantly... lower... than... those... of... non- containing...medium...(85%;...41/48)....Next,...we...compared...the... in vitro...maturation...rates...of...mTaM...medium...co-addition... 2...mM...-NMN...and...30...mM...3-ABA,...and...found...that...the... maturation...rate...was...significantly...improved...(81%;...50/62.,... P<0.05)...compared...with...that...without...-NMN...(65%;...40/62).... These...results...suggest...that...-NMN...may...be...able...to...avoid... DNA...damage...caused...by...PARP1...inhibition. Culturing...of...rat...preimplantation...embryos...is...difficult....We... previously...had...established...a...novel...culture...method...and...a... medium...for...culturing...rat...preimplantation...embryos...based... on...the...well-known...potassium...simplex...optimized...medium... (KSOM),... which... is... commonly... used... to... culture... mouse... embryos....We...named...this...new...medium..."KSOM...for...rat"... (KSOM-R).... Although... our... newly... established... culture... method...using...KSOM-R...medium...facilitated...the...efficient... development...of...rat...one-cell...embryos...into...blastocysts...in vitro,...its...development...post...implantation...was...inhibited.... Thus,...in...order...to...further...improve...the...culture...method,...it... is...important...to...analyse...the...embryos...cultured...in...vitro.... Therefore,...we...compared...and...analysed...the...comprehensive... gene...expression...profiles...of...rat...preimplantation...embryos... developed...in vitro...and...in vivo...using...RNA-sequencing.... The... results... of... the... hierarchical... clustering... analysis... indicated... that... there... were... differences... in... the... gene... expression...patterns...between...the...embryos...developed...in vivo...and...in vitro....Furthermore,...the...enrichment...analysis... showed...a...significant...enrichment...of...apoptosis...related...gene... ontology...terms....Therefore,...this...study...provides...useful... insights...for...optimizing...a...novel...method...of...culturing...rat... preimplantation...embryos. Comprehensive gene expression analysis of rat preimplantation embryos developed in vitro and in vivo Kazuomi Nakamura1 , Misako Seno2 , Yuki Yoshimura3 , Osamu Suzuki4 1 Tottori...University...Hospital,...2 Tottori...University...ORIP,...3 Tottori...University...Faculty...of...Medicine,... 4 National...Institute...of...Biomedical...Innovation P-155 P-156 --S 155-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 155 69...... Production...of...genetically...modified...marmosets...by...gene... editing...requires...a...large...number...of...eggs....We...aimed...to...get... oocytes...at...low...cost...by...transplanting...marmoset...ovaries... taken...from...disused...individuals,...into...immunodeficient... mice....Ovaries...for...transplantation...are...sent...from...various... institutions,...but...their...condition...is...different...depending...on... the... method... of... collection,... transport... time,... and... other... factors,...which...leads...to...significantly...unstable...number...of... usable...oocytes....We...assumed...that...ovarian...deterioration...is... also...caused...by...ischemic...apoptosis...in...the...storage...solution,... and...investigated...the...effects...of...apoptosis...on...the...tissue... attachment...rate...and...the...number...of...retrieved...oocytes...in... rat...ovaries....We...found...that...the...viability...of...ovarian...tissue... fragments... in... tissue... preservation...solution... Lifor... with... 50... M... of... apoptosis... inhibitor... Z-VAD... was... improved... compared...to...Lifor...without...apoptosis...inhibitor....In...addition,... the...incidence...rate...of...degenerated...eggs...and...intrafollicular... oocytes... in... the... acquired... oocytes... was... lower,... when... preserved...in...Lifor...with...apoptosis...inhibitor...Z-VAD....This... may...be...due...to...the...effect...of...anti-apoptotic...agents...which... protected...the...tissues,...facilitated...the...grafts'...implantation,... and...kept...the...oocytes...safe...in...the...ovaries....These...findings... are...important...for...stable...acquisition...of...marmoset...oocytes. Rat...is...an...experimental...animal...that...has...a...stable...estrus... cycle... and... high... reproductive... ability.... However,... some... strains... are... difficult... to... obtain... the... oocytes... by... superovulation....In...these...strains,...it...is...possible...to...obtain... oocytes... by... in... vitro... maturation... of... immature... oocytes... collected...from...ovary....In...previous...our...study,...germinal... vesicle... (GV)... stage... oocytes... could... be... matured... using... MEM... (The... 62th... Annual... Meeting... of... Japanese... Association...for...Laboratory...Animal...Science)....This...study... investigated...the...effect...of...granulosa...cells...on...in...vitro... maturation...of...GV...stage...oocytes....More...than...8...weeks... Wistar,...Lister...Hooded...and...transgenic...female...rats...were... injected...150...IU/kg...or...300...IU/kg...PMSG....At...48h...after...the... PMSG...injection,...GV...stage...oocytes...were...collected...from... ovaries....The...oocytes...were...classified...into...3...groups...(Multi- layer:...oocyte...surrounded...in...multi-layered...granulosa...cells,... Monolayer:...oocyte...surrounded...in...one...or...a...few...granulosa... cells,...Naked:...naked...oocyte),...and...they...cultured...in...MEM.... These... oocytes... were... then... activated... using... 10... mM... strontium...chloride...in...HTF...medium....Many...oocytes...could... be... collected... from... all... rat... ovaries.... After... in... vitro... maturation,...in...all...groups,...more...than...70%...metaphase...II... (MII)-like...formation...was...observed.... Furthermore,... the... pronuclear...formation...was...observed...in...more...than...40%...of... MII-like... formation.... These... results... indicated... that... the... oocytes...collected...from...rat...ovary...could...be...matured...with... or...without...granulosa...cells. Comparative...&...Experimental...Medicine,...Brain...Research...Institute,...Niigata...University,...3 Graduate...School...of...Science... and...Engineering,...Iwate...University,...4 Faculty...of...Science...and...Engineering,...Iwate...University P-157 P-158 --S 156-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 156 69...... In...vitro...culture...of...embryos...has...been...developed...since...the... late... 1960s,... and... is... now... an... indispensable... technique... However,...compared...to...blastocysts...generated...in...utero,... some...of...the...genes...expressed...in...blastocysts...in...vitro...differ... even... depending... on... the... type... of... culture... medium.... In... addition,...these...gene...set...with...altering...expression...has...been... altered...differ...among...reports...and...no...unified...conclusion... has...been...reached....In...this...study,...we...analyzed...the...effects... on...embryonic... development... by...elucidating... the... genes... whose... expression... alters... depending... on... the... culture... medium. B6D2F1... mice... were... used... in... this... study.... After... superovulation,...2-cell...embryos...were...cultured...in...M16,... KSOM,...and...mWM....At...4.5...d.p.c.,...the...rate...of...development... to...blastocyst...was...calculated...and...used...for...RNA...extraction.... The...RNA...was...used...for...transcriptome...analysis...by...SAGE- seq. The...rate...of...development...into...blastocysts...using...these... media...ranged...from...94-100%....The...correlation...analysis... indicated... that... the... expressed... genes... differed... slightly... depending...on...the...medium....Detailed...analysis...of...the...gene... groups...with...altered...expression...showed...that...term...related... to..."bisphenol"...were...detected...in...each...cluster....The...increase... in...Ca-binding...protein...and...decrease...in...various...vitamin- related...substances...in...KSOM...and...the...decrease...in...essential... fatty...acid...in...M16...suggested...differences...in...the...composition... of...the...medium....Our...results...were...not...fully...consistent...with... the...previous...reports...using...microarray...and...qPCR....In... summary,...our...analysis...of...the...differences...in...the...genes... expressed...in...blastocysts...reflected...the...composition...of...the... medium....On...the...other...hand,...the...effect...of...bisphenol,...which... might...be...from...plastic...components,...was...detected...at...a... higher... frequency.... These... results... indicated... that... any... culture... medium... can... be... used... for... embryo... culture... in... general...applications,...but...careful...consideration...should...be... needed...to...the...selection...and...storage...for...precise...gene... expression...analysis...or...purposes...related...to...endocrinology. The...purpose...of...the...present...study...is...to...examine...the... estrous...cycle...and...the...response...to...superovulation...of...adult... Piebald-Virol-Glaxo...(PVG)...rats...that...are...often...used...in... chemically-induced...arthritis...and...is...a...parental...strain...of... KFRS4...strain,...an...animal...model...of...atopic...dermatitis.... The...estrous...cycle...phase...in...PVG...rats...(10-20...weeks...of...age)... was... determined... by... vaginal... wall... impedance.... When... females...were...in...the...proestrous...phase...3...or...4...times...during... the...twelfth...succussive...day,...these...females...were...judged...to... exhibit...constant...estrous...cycle.... Among...25...Jcl:Wistar...rats,...eight...rats...(32%)...exhibited... constant...estrous...cycle....In...contrast,...only...two...(15%)...PVG... rats...exhibited...the...estrous...cycle...among...13...PVG...rats... examined....Thus,...we...considered...that...the...estrous...cycle... was...hardly...established...in...adult...PVG...females....Next,...we... tried... to... induce... superovulation... to... PVG... rats... by... administration...of...PMSG...and...hCG....The...number...of...oocytes... were...significantly...lower...(P<0.01)...in...PVG...rats...(2.5......1.5;... average......SD)...than...in...Jcl:Wistar...rats...(27......14)....This... finding...indicated...that...PVG...rats...were...low...responder...to... the...superovulation....BN...rats...are...also...known...to...be...low... responder...to...the...superovulation...(Taketsuru...and...Kaneko,... 2016)....Recently,...Honda...et...al...showed...that...the...anti-inhibin... antibody...improved...ovulation...in...the...BN...rats...(Honda...et...al.,... 2019),...which...suggested...that...the...anti-inhibin...antibody... could...be...also...effective...in...PVG...rats....Together,...the...estrus... cycle...of...adult...PVG...rats...was...hardly...established...and...PVG... rats...were...low...responder...to...the...PMSG-hCG...superovulation.... Our...study...also...suggested...defects...in...the...endocrine...system... in...PVG...rats. Analysis of the effect of culture media on gene expression in mouse embryos Hiroyuki Imai, Ken Takeshi Kusakabe Laboratory...of...Veterinary...Anatomy,...Joint...Faculty...of...Veterinary...Medicine,...Yamaguchi...University PVG rat strain is a low responder to superovulation Kenta Hayashi1 , Ayumi Watanabe1 , Yuki Inoue2 , Hisataka Iwata2 , Takashi Kuramoto1 1 Laboratory...of...Animal...Nutrition,...2 Laboratory...of...Animal...Reproduction,...Department...of...Animal...Science,...Tokyo... University...of...Agriculture P-159 P-160 --S 157-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 157 69...... Preimplantation...embryos...acquire...totipotency...to...develop... into... individuals.... For... totipotency,... the... epigenetic... modifications,... which... regulate... transcription,... are... dynamically...altered...after...fertilization...and...the...global... transcriptional...levels...are...increased....It...is...called...zygotic... genome...activation...(ZGA)....ZGA...is...occurred...at...the...2-cell... stage...in...mice,...but...at...the...4-8...cell...stages...in...humans...(Jukam... et...al.,...2017,...Schulz...and...Harrison,...2018)....Here,...to...clarify...the... mechanism...of...ZGA...at...the...4-8...cell...stage,...we...investigated... the...timing...of...ZGA...and...some...epigenetic...marks...in...rat... embryos. First,...we...collected...preimplantation...embryos...from...mated... female... rats,... and... examined... the... timing... of... global... transcription....The...5-EU...signals,...which...is...an...indicator...of... de...novo...mRNA,...were...slightly...observed...at...the...2-cell...stage... and...increased...at...the...4-8...cell...stage...in...rats,...unlike...mice.... Next,... we... examined... whether... the... dynamics... of... representative... epigenetic... modifications... involved... in... transcriptional...regulation...correlate...the...timing...of...global... transcription....The...signals...of...H3K4me3,...which...is...involved... in...transcriptional...activation,...were...increased,...and...the... signals...of...H3K27me3,...which...is...involved...in...transcriptional... repression,... were... decreased... between... the... 2-... to... 4-cell... stages....In...contrast,...the...signals...of...H3K27ac,...known...as...an... active...mark,...were...dramatically...decreased...from...4-cell... stage....A...recent...study...indicates...that...the...BET...family... protein,...which...is...one...of...histone...chaperones,...is...associated... with...the...initiation...of...transcription...in...zebrafish...embryos... (Sato...et...al.,...2019)....Therefore,...we...cultured...rat...zygotes...with... JQ-1,...an...inhibitor...of...BET...family...proteins,...and...the...JQ-1- treated... embryos... arrested... at... the... 2-cell... stage.... Furthermore,...the... embryonic... development... up... to... the... blastocyst...stage...was...impaired...by...co-injection...of...siRNA...to... BET... family... mRNA.... These... results... indicate... that... the... decrease...of...H3K27ac...via...BET...family...is...important...for...the... development...of...rat...2-cell...stage...embryo,...and...H3K27ac... may...be...involved...in...the...initiation...of...ZGA. Blastocyst... complementation... is... a... method... to... create... chimeric...animals...by...injecting...pluripotent...cells...into...the... blastocyst...of...an...animal...that...is...genetically...deficient...in...a... specific... organ.... Recently,... our... group... succeeded... in... generating...lung...organs...derived...from...mouse...ES...cells...in... vivo...in...Fgf10...knockout...mice...lacking...lung...organs...using... the... blastocyst... completion... (Kitahara... et... al.,... 2020... Cell... Reports)....In...this...study,...we...investigated...the...conditions...for... more...efficient...chimera...generation...using...the...blastocyst... completion. Chimeric...mice...using...the...blastocyst...complementation,...it... was...found...that...the...number...of...ES...cells...injected...into...8cell- molura...stage...embryos...should...be...5...to...8,...and...the...ES...cells... should...be...cultured...for...several...days...immediately...after... thawing....However,...as...the...number...of...ES...cell...injections... increased,...the...number...of...individuals...with...malformations... such...as...abdominal...wall...hernia...and...open...eyes...increased...at... birth....It...was...suggesting...that...too...many...ES...cell...injections... may...not...be...good...for...creating...chimeric...mice...using...the... blastocyst...completion. The exploration of transcription mechanism in rat early embryos Kohtaro Morita1 , Arata Honda2 , Kento Morita1 , Yoshio Sasaoka1 , Masahide Asano1 1 Inst....of...Lab....Anim....Grad....Sch....of...Med.,...Kyoto...Univ.,...2 Sch....of...Med.,...Jichi...Med....Univ. Efficient Chimeric Mouse Production Using Blastocyst Complementation Kanako Oda1 , Manabu Abe2 , Rie Natume2 , Kenji Sakimura2 , Sumika Uchiyama1 , Nae Saito1 , Takenori Sakuma1 , Yasuo Saijo3 , Qiliang Zhou3 , Toshikuni Sasaoka1 1 Department...of...Comparative...&...Experimental...Medicine,...BRI,...Niigata...University.,...2 Department...of...Animal...Model... Development,...BRI,...Niigata...University.,...3 Department...of...Medical...Oncology,...Niigata...University...Graduate...School...of... Medical...and...Dental...Sciences. P-161 P-162 --S 158-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 158 69...... Micromanipulation...of...zygotes...is...often...used...to...generate... genetically...modified...mice....Micromanipulation...requires...a... certain...level...of...expertise,...however,...and...is...considered...a... specialized...technique...that...should...be...performed...by...a... microinjectionist.... To... simplify... the... procedure,... we... developed... a... fully... automatic... system... for... injecting... a... solution...into...the...zygote...pronucleus. First,... the... sequence... of... the... entire... fully... automated... operation...was...determined....The...method...for...injecting...a... solution...into...1...zygote...comprises...11...to...13...steps....Next,...the... software...was...developed...for...the...following:...1)...automatic... recognition...of...the...zygote,...2)...automatic...movement...of...the... pipette...and...zygote,...3)...automatic...rotation...of...the...zygote,... and... 4)... automatic... correction... of... the... pipette... insertion... position...into...the...pronucleus....Finally,...the...hardware...and... software...were...integrated...to...construct...the..."Integrated... Automatic...Embryonic...Manipulation...System...(IAEMS)". The...completed...IAEMS...was...used...to...genetically...modify... the...mouse...C57BL/6...strain....Fully...automated...injection...of... the...solution...into...the...pronucleus...using...the...IAEMS...had...a... 94%...success...rate....Transgenic...mice...were...generated...by... traditional...DNA...Injection...or...the...piggyBac...transposon... system....In...the...piggyBac...transposon...system,...the...efficiency... of...transgenic...production...was...improved...at...5...times...the... DNA...concentration....Knock-in...mice...could...be...produced... using...the...CRISPR...Cas9...system....The...production...efficiency... of...the...3...types...of...genetic...modifications...was...similar...to...that... of...an...expert...microinjectionist...performing...the...modification... manually.... This... new... method... is... a... valuable... genetic... modification...technology...for...application...in...experimental... animals. Marsupials...represent...one...of...three...extant...mammalian... subclasses...with...a...number...of...very...unique...characteristics... not...shared...by...other...mammals....Most...notably,...much...of...the... development...of...immaturely...born...neonates...takes...place...in... the...external...environment.... However,... lack... of... technologies... to... manipulate... their... genomes...have...hampered...development...of...in...vivo...genetic... approaches...in...this...group...of...mammals.... In... this... study,... we... have... focused... on... developing... methodologies...to...manipulate...the...genome...of...the...grey... short-tailed...opossum...(Monodelphis domestica;...hereinafter... "the...opossum")...as...a...potential...genetic...model...system....The... opossum...is...thought...to...be...the...ancestor...of...all...marsupials... and...is...the...most...commonly...used...experimental...marsupial... model....We...took...advantage...of...the...opossum's...resemblance... to...popular...rodent...models,...such...as...the...mouse...and...rat,...in... body... size... and... breeding... characteristics.... First,... we... established...reproductive...technologies...such...as...ovulation... induction,...timed...copulation,...zygote...collection...and...embryo... transfer... to... pseudopregnant... females.... Further,... we... demonstrated...the...generation...of...gene...knock-out...opossums... at...the...Tyr...locus...by...microinjection...of...pronuclear...stage... zygotes... using... CRISPR/Cas9... genome... editing,... and... germline...transmission...of...identified...mutant...alleles...to...the... F1...generation.... This... is... the... first... demonstration... of... the... production... of... genetically...engineered...animals...in...the...marsupials....This... study...provides...a...critical...foundation...for...venues...to...expand... mammalian...genetics...into...the...metatherian...subclass. Generation of first genetically engineered marsupials, Monodelphis domestica Riko Yoshimi1 , Mari Kaneko1 , Takaya Abe1 , Aki Shiraishi1 , Ken-ichi Inoue1 , Yasuhide Furuta1,2 , Hiroshi Kiyonari1 1 Laboratory...for...Animal...Resources...and...Genetic...Engineering,...RIKEN...Center...for...Biosystems...Dynamics...Research,... 2 Mouse...Genetics...Core...Facility,...Sloan...Kettering...Institute,...Memorial...Sloan...Kettering...Cancer...Center P-163 P-164 --S 159-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 159 69...... Genome...editing...technologies...are...highly...effective...tools...for... genetic... engineering... in... various... organisms.... We... have... previously...demonstrated...that...the...Type...I...CRISPR-Cas3... from...Escherichia...coli...can...be...used...for...genome...editing...in... human...cells...(Nat...Commun,...2019)....Type...I...CRISPR-Cas3... uses...an...RNA-guided...multi...Cas-protein...complex,...Cascade,... which...detects...and...degrades...foreign...nucleic...acids...via...the... helicase-nuclease...Cas3...protein....The...precise...mechanism...of... Cas3-mediated...cleavage...and...degradation...of...target...DNA... remains...elusive....In...this...study,...we...purified...CRISPR-Cas3... protein...complex...and...analyzed...its...function...in vitro...to... elucidate...the...DNA...cleavage...mechanism....We...found...that... CRISPR-Cas3...has...collateral...cleavage...activity,...in...which...it... recognizes...the...target...locus...and...cleaves...single-stranded... DNAs...nonspecifically....We...also...found...that...this...single- stranded... DNA... cleavage... were... activated... in... a... PAM... sequence-dependent... manner... and... essential... for... the... introduction...of...double-stranded...DNA...breaks...at...the...target... locus....We...are...also...trying...to...generate...genetically...modified... animals...by...CRISPR-Cas3...system....These...results...provides... a...molecular...mechanism...for...collateral...ssDNA...cleavage... and...target...dsDNA...degradation...by...CRISPR-Cas3,...and... informing...future...genome...editing...tools. BALB/c... mice... are... useful... for... research... on... immunity,... inflammation... and... tumors.... The... CARD... Mouse... Bank... carries... out... sperm... cryopreservation... and... in vitro fertilization...(IVF)...of...genetically...modified...mice...to...preserve... and...supply...mouse...resources....We...have...hereto...mainly... reported...on...the...performance...of...reproductive...technology... in... genetically... modified... mice... of... the... C57BL/6... strain.... However,... it... is... known... that... the... performance... of... reproductive...technology...depends...on...the...strain...of...mice....In... this... study,... we... summarized... the... performance... of... reproductive...technology...in...BALB/c...background...mice... with... genetic... modification.... Results... showed... that... in... superovulation,...4-week-old...female...mice...yielded...a...higher... number... of... oocytes... through... treatment... with... inhibin... antiserum...and...equine...chorionic...gonadotropin....Moreover,... using...fresh,...frozen,...or...cold-stored...sperm,...the...fertilization... rates...in...IVF...using...fresh,...frozen...or...cold-stored...sperm... were...over...70%....In...summary,...IVF...using...fresh,...frozen...or... cold-stored...sperm...is...an...effective...method...of...efficiently... producing...BALB/c...mice...with...genetic...modifications. In Vitro fertilization of BALB/c background mice with genetic modification Maki Sakaguchi1,2 , Kiyoko Yamashita1,2 , Eri Ishida1,2 , Yuka Deshimaru1,2 , Kiharu Uchigoshi1,2 , Nobuyuki Mikoda2,3 , Mari Iwamoto1 , Fumi Takahashi1 , Kaori Sakaguchi1 , Wataru Sakamoto1 , Shuji Tsuchiyama1 , Satohiro Nakao1 , Yoshiko Nakagawa1 , Naomi Nakagata3 , Toru Takeo1 1 Div....of...Reprod....Eng.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ.,...2 Kyudo...Co.,...Ltd.,... 3 Div....of...Reprod....Biotech....Innov.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ. P-165 P-166 --S 160-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 160 69...... In...vitro...fertilization...and...natural...mating...have...long...been... used... to... produce... fertilized... oocytes... after... inducing... superovulation....We...have...successfully...induced...more...than... 100...oocytes...in...a...single...juvenile...female...mouse...of...the... C57BL/6J...strain...using...inhibin... antiserum... and...equine... chorionic...gonadotropin...(IASe)....However,...we...have...also... found...that...the...number...of...oocytes...induced...using...this... method...depends...on...the...strain...and...age...of...the...female... mouse...used....It...is...therefore...important...to...identify...the... optimal...conditions...for...the...mouse...strain...to...be...used...for... routine...IVF....In...this...study,...we...compared...the...number...of... ovulations... in...juvenile... and... mature... mice...of...the...major... strains...and...determined...the...optimal...age...for...superovulation... in...each...strain....Results...showed...differences...in...the...number... of...ovulated...oocytes...among...substrains...of...BALB/c,...with... some...substrains...having...more...oocytes...at...4...weeks...of...age... and...others...having...similar...numbers...at...4...and...10...weeks... respectively....Meanwhile,...the...number...of...ovulated...oocytes... was...higher...in...DBA/2,...B6D2F1,...and...ICR...at...10...weeks...of... age....The...results...indicate...that...consideration...of...the...mouse... strain,...the...sub-strain...and...the...age...of...the...female...mice...used... in... the... induction... of... the... superovulation... method... may... increase...the...number...of...ovulated...oocytes,...reduce...the... number... of... female... mice... used... as... oocyte... donors,... and... produce...fertilized...eggs...in...a...planned...manner. Many...laboratories...use...in...vitro...fertilization...to...produce... genetically...engineered...mice....Although...a...large...number...of... fertilized... eggs... can... be... produced... by... using... in... vitro... fertilization,...it...is...desirable...to...utilize...frozen...oocytes...and... sperm... in... order... to... produce... mice... more... efficiently.... However,...it...was...known...that...fertilization...rate...of...these... frozen...oocytes...and...sperm...is...lower...than...that...of...fresh... oocytes...and...sperm.... Previously,...we...have...reported...that...TCEP...remarkably... improve...fertility...of...oocytes....TCEP...cleave...disulfide...bound... in...zona...pellucida...with...reduction...by...mechanism...differed... from...reduced...glutathione...(GSH)....The...purpose...of...current... study...is...improving...a...fertility...of...cryopreserved...oocytes...by... treating...TCEP....Also,...it...was...examined...whether...TCEP... affects...the...developmental...ability....As...a...result,...TCEP... improved...the...fertility...of...cryopreserved...oocytes...compared... with...non-treated....Also,...TCEP...doesn't...affect...developmental... ability...of...blastocyst...and...fetus....Therefore,...TCEP...was... available...for...IVF...with...cryopreserved...oocytes...presented... low...fertility. Promotion of fertility on cryopreserved mouse oocytes with treating Tris Carboxyethyl Phosphine (TCEP) Yuta Ishizuka, Tsutomu Kamisako, Minoru Kumai, Hiroyoshi Ishizaki KAN...Research...Institute,...Inc. P-167 P-168 --S 161-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 161 69...... When...transporting...cryopreserved...mouse... sperm...and... embryos,...a...dry...shipper...is...used...to...maintain...ultra-low... temperatures...below...-150....In...recent...years,...there...have... been...cases...in...which...carriers...have...refused...to...transport... dry...shippers...due...to...their...incorrect...use....In...consideration... of...this,...dry...ice...(-79)...could...be...used...as...an...alternative... means...of...transporting...frozen...embryos....However,...the... survival...and...development...rates...of...cryopreserved...two-cell... mouse... embryos... produced... via... a... simple... vitrification... method... after... storage... in... dry... ice... was... not... clear.... We... therefore...obtained...two-cell...mouse...embryos...produced...via... a...simple...vitrification...method...and...stored...them...for...a...short... time...in...a...deep...freezer...(-80)...before...using...them...for...in vitro...fertilization....In...this...presentation,...we...will...present...the... survival...rate,...the...development...rate...into...blastocysts...after... in vitro culture,...and...the...development...rate...of...pups...after... embryo... transfer... using... these... frozen-warmed... mouse... embryos...after...storing...them...for...1...to...4...days...at...-80. Since... 2000,... the... Center... for... Animal... Resources... and... Development... (CARD)... at... Kumamoto... University... has... conducted... hands-on... mouse... reproductive... technology... workshops...in...Japan...and...overseas....Our...workshops...have... been...held...at...68...face-to-face...and...online...venues....Recently,... we...have...published...papers...on...the...cryopreservation...of...rat... sperm...(Nakagata,...Sci...Rep,...2020)...and...the...cold...storage...of... rat...sperm...at...4...(Yamaga,...Sci....Rep.,...2021)....Using...this... technology,...the...CARD...Rat...Bank...was...newly...established.... In... addition,... the... first... workshop... on... rat... reproductive... technology... was... held... at... Kumamoto... University.... The... workshop... provided... lectures... on... rat... reproductive... technology... and... provided... practical... training... in... the... cryopreservation...of...sperm,...the...cold-storage...of...sperm,...the... cryopreservation... of... fertilized... oocytes... and... in vitro... fertilization....Participants...in...this...workshop...learned...about... the...key...points...for...obtaining...stable...results...using...rat... reproductive...technology...and...the...differences...between... mouse...reproductive...technology...and...rat...reproductive... technology.... We... will... present... a... summary... of... the... rat... reproductive...technology...workshop...herein.
