University,...2 Kyudo...Co.,...Ltd.,...3 Division...of...Reproductive...Biotechnology...and...Innovation,...Center...for...Animal...Resources... and...Development...(CARD),...Kumamoto...University P-169 P-170 --S 162-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 162 69...... To...cryopreserve...cells,...it...is...essential...to...avoid...intracellular... ice...formation...during...cooling...and...warming....One...way...to... achieve...this...is...to...convert...the...water...inside...the...cells...into...a... non-crystalline glass....It...is...currently...believed...that...to...accomplish...this... vitrification,...the...cells...must...be...suspended...in...a...very...high... concentration...(20-40%)...of...a...glass-inducing...solute,...and... subsequently...cooled...very...rapidly....Herein,...we...report...that... this...belief...is...erroneous...with...respect...to...the...vitrification...of... one-cell...rat...embryos....In...the...present...study,...one-cell...rat... embryos...were...vitrified...with...5...l...of...EFS10...(a...mixture...of... 10%...ethylene...glycol...(EG),...27%...Ficoll,...and...0.45...M...sucrose)... in...cryotubes...at...a...moderate...cooling...rate,...and...warmed...at... various...rates....Survival...was...assessed...according...to...the... ability...of...the...cells...to...develop...into...blastocysts...and...to... develop... to... term.... When... embryos... were... vitrified... at... a... 2,613.../min...cooling...rate...and...thawed...by...adding...1...ml...of... sucrose... solution... (0.3...M,...50... )...at... a...warming... rate...of... 18,467... /min,... 58.1%... of... the... EFS10-vitrified... embryos... developed...into...blastocysts,...and...50.0%...developed...to...term.... These...rates...were...similar...to...those...of...non-treated...intact... embryos....Using...a...conventional...cryotube,...we...achieved... developmental...capabilities...in...one-cell...rat...embryos...by... rapid...warming...that...were...comparable...to...those...of...intact... embryos,...even...using...low...concentrations...(10%)...of...cell- permeating...cryoprotectant...and...at...low...cooling...rates. There...has...long...been...concern...that...transferred...embryos... may...leak...from...any...incisions...made...in...the...fallopian...tube...of... recipients...during...surgical...embryo...transfer....This...paper... investigates...the...effect...of...medical...glue...used...to...close...any... incisions...on...the...fallopian...tube...on...embryo...leakage...and... birth...rate....ICR...mice...were...used...for...both...recipients...and... vas...deferens...ligated...male...mice....Female...mice...that...had... mated...with...a...vasectomized...male...mouse...the...day...before... transfer...and...had...vaginal...plugs...on...the...day...of...transfer...(day... 1...of...pseudopregnancy)...were...selected...as...recipients....Two- cell...embryos...were...produced...by...in vitro...fertilization...and... cryopreserved...for...use...in...embryo...transfer...using...two... groups...of...C57BL/6J...female...and...male...mice....In...the...control... group,...the...conventional...method...of...embryo...transfer...was... used....In...the...experimental...group,...medical...glue...was...used... to...seal...any...incisions...on...the...fallopian...tube...after...embryo... transfer....At...19.5...days...after...embryo...transfer,...the...number... of...live...pups...was...checked,...and...birth...rates...were...compared... (birth... rate... (%)... =... number... of... live... pups... /... number... of... embryos...transferred...x...100)....The...birth...rates...were...38.9 66.7%...(n=6)...in...the...control...group...and...33.366.7%...(n=6)...in... the...experimental...group....Results...show...that...there...was...no... significant... difference... in... the... birth... rate.... This... study... suggests...that...the...adhesion...of...oviduct...incisions...using... medical...glue...does...not...affect...embryo...leakage...or...the...birth... rate. Vitrification of one-cell rat embryos in cryotubes by small-volume vitrification and rapid warming Yasuyoshi Fukuda1 , Takanori Oikawa1 , Misako Higashiya1 , Takahiro Obata1 , Megumi Yano1 , Toshiaki Kawabe2 , Shinsuke Seki1 1 Akita...University,...Bioscience...Education...and...Research...Support...Center,...Experimental...Animal...Division,... 2 ARK...Resource...Co.,...Ltd. Effect of medical glue used to close fallopian tube incisions on the birth rate after embryo transfer Kiharu Uchigoshi1,2 , Kiyoko Yamashita1,2 , Eri Ishida1,2 , Maki Sakaguchi1,2 , Yuka Deshimaru1,2 , Nobuyuki Mikoda1,3 , Mari Iwamoto1 , Fumi Takahashi1 , Wataru Sakamoto1 , Shuuji Tsuchiyama1 , Satohiro Nakao1 , Yoshiko Nakagawa1 , Naomi Nakagata3 , Toru Takeo1 1 Div....of...Reprod....Eng.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ.,...2 Kyudo...Co.,...Ltd.,... 3 Div....of...Reprod....Biotech....Innov.,...CARD,...Kumamoto...Univ. P-171 P-172 --S 163-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 163 69...... Improved-Genome...editing...via...Oviductal...Nucleic...Acids... Delivery...(i-GONAD)...is...a...new...method...that...facilitates...in... situ...genome-editing...of...preimplantation...embryos...present... within...the...oviductal...lumen....This...method...has...no...need...of... ex...vivo...handling...of...embryos....Therefore,...i-GONAD...differs... from...the...previous...methods...(i.e.,...zygote...microinjection...and... in...vitro...EP)...in...producing...genome-edited...mice,...which... relied...on...ex...vivo...handling...of...preimplantation...embryos... and... egg... transfer... to... the... recipient... females.... We... have... previously... demonstrated... that... i-GONAD... can... be... successfully... applied... to... produce... genome-edited... rats,... including...albino...Sprague-Dawley...and...albino...Lewis...rats.... However,...not...pigmented...Brown...Norway...[BN]...rats....In... subsequent... study,... we... observed... that... the... successful... i-GONAD...was...dependent...on...the...mouse...strain...used;...for... example,...in...random-bred...mice,...such...as...ICR...and...C3H/He... x...C57BL/6,...it...was...successful...under...relatively...stringent... electrical...conditions...but...not...in...the...C57BL/6...strain....Under... less...stringent...conditions,...i-GONAD...was...successful...in...the... C57BL/6...strain....We...assumed...that...this...would...also...be...true... for...i-GONAD...using...BN...rats....Therefore,...in...this...study,...we... determined...appropriate...electroporation... conditions...of... i-GONAD...in...BN...rats....On...applying...a...current...of...>500...mA,... we...failed...to...obtain...rat...offspring...(fetuses/newborns);... however,...i-GONAD...under...a...current...of...100-300...mA...using... NEPA21...(NEPA...GENE)...led...to...the...production...of...genome- edited...BN...rats...with...efficiencies...of...75%-100%....Similarly,... i-GONAD,... under... a... current... of... 150-200... mA... using... CUY21EDIT... II... (BEX... Co.)... led... to... the... production... of... genome-edited...BN...rats...with...efficiencies...of...24%-55%.... These...experiments...suggest...the...importance...of...selecting... the...appropriate...current...value,...depending...on...the...rat... strain...used,...when...performing...i-GONAD.... Prime...editing...is...a...new...type...of...genome...editing...that...does... not...require...DNA...double-strand...breaks...and...donor...DNA,... as... it... allows... base... substitutions... and... insertions... and... deletions...of...short...sequences...at...target...sites....Because...off- target...effects...are...reduced...in...prime...editing...compared...to... conventional...methods...that...involve...double-strand...breaks,... this... method... is... expected... to... be... applied... to... various... technologies...such...as...gene-modified...animal...production...and... gene... therapy,... but... the... low... efficiency... of... mutation... introduction...has...been...a...problem...in...some...cases...depending... on...experimental...conditions....The...purpose...of...this...study...is... to... develop... a... method... to... improve... the... efficiency... of... mutagenesis...by...using...mouse...embryonic...stem...cells...(mES... cells)...without...off-target...effects....For...this...purpose,...we... created... a... novel... tool,... CMP-hPE2*,... which... is... a... codon- optimized...version...of...PE2...(prime...editor...2),...a...genome... editing...tool...that...fuses...Cas9...H840A...nickase...with...artificial... reverse...transcriptase,...nuclear...localization...sequences...and... chromatin...regulatory...peptides....Additionally,...we...inserted... different...drug-resistant...genes...into...the...expression...vectors... of...the...genome...editing...tool...and...pegRNA...(prime...editing... guide...RNA)...and...examined...the...ratio...of...the...amount...of... expression...vectors...introduced...into...the...cells...and...the... conditions... for... drug... selection.... By... using... tdTomato- expressing... cells,... we... examined... the... efficiency... of... introducing...the...stop...codon...(two...nucleotide...substitutions)... into...the...tdTomato...gene...in...the...genome...sequence...and... found...the...conditions...for...more...efficient...mutagenesis...by... CMP-hPE2*...compared...to...PE2....By...using...these...conditions,... we...were...able...to...stably...introduce...point...mutations...to...the... target... gene... and... succeeded... in... generating... germ-line... chimeras... from... mES... cells... after... mutagenesis.... It... is... expected...that...the...system...validated...in...this...study...will... facilitate...the...production...of...gene-modified...animals...and... contribute...to...the...development...of...practical...technology...for... prime...editing. Study of in vivo electroporation conditions of i-GONAD in Brown Norway rats Takuya Aoshima, Shuji Takabayashi Laboratory...Animal...Facilities...&...Services,...Hamamatsu...University...of...Medicine Production of gene-modified mice by prime-editing Rie Natsume, Luna Hirayama, Kenji Sakimura, Manabu Abe Department...of...Animal...Model...Development,...Brain...Research...Institute,...Niigata...University P-173 P-174 --S 164-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 164 69...... Embryo... transfer... has... been... used... for... production... and... maintenance...of...animal...strains....Pseudopregnant...female... rats...for...embryo...transfer...has...been...generally...produced...by... mating... with... vasectomised... males.... However,... this... procedure...was...required...large...breeding...space...and...costs.... We...successfully...induced...pseudopregnancy...in...females...by... artificial...stimulation...instead...of...vasectomised...males....This... study...examined...effect...of...short...period...artificial...stimulation.... The...embryos...that...transferred...to...females...with...short... period...artificial...stimulation...developed...to...offspring....No... significant...differences...were...obtained...compared...with... original...protocol....This...improved...method...can...be...used...for... efficient...rat...production. Sperm... have... a... characteristic... structure... called... the... "mitochondrial...sheath,"...in...which...mitochondria...are...tightly... coiled...around...the...flagellum....However,...the...molecular... mechanisms...involved...in...the...formation...of...this...structure... have...not...been...well...studied....In...this...study,...we...investigated... the...function...of...ARMC12...that...is...specifically...expressed...in... the...testis...to...clarify...the...molecular...mechanisms...involved...in... the...formation...of...the...mitochondrial...sheath.... We...generated...several...testis-enriched...gene... KO... mice... using... the... CRISPR/Cas9... system... and... examined... their... fertility...and...sperm...morphology....Armc12...KO...male...mice... are...infertile,... and...KO...spermatozoa... showed... abnormal... morphology... and... reduced... motility.... Scanning... electron... microscopy...revealed...that...sperm...mitochondria...in...KO... mice...failed...to...elongate...properly...around...the...flagellum.... ARMC12...is...localized...on...the...outer...membrane...of...sperm... mitochondria... as... a... peripheral... membrane... protein.... Immunoprecipitation...revealed...that...ARMC12...interacts... with...several...proteins,...including...VDAC2...and...VDAC3,... which... are... channel... proteins... localized... on... the... outer... mitochondrial... membrane,... and... TBC1D21,... which... is... expressed...specifically...in...the...testis. Tbc1d21...KO...mice...showed...the...same...abnormalities...in... mitochondrial...sheath...formation...as...Armc12...KO...mice,...and... the...protein...interaction...between...ARMC12...and...VDAC...was... not... observed... in... Tbc1d21... KO... testis.... In... addition,... experiments...using...cultured...cells...showed...that...mitochondria... in...ARMC12-expressing...cells...aggregate,...indicating...that... ARMC12... acts... as... an... adherence... factor... between... mitochondria. These...results...suggest...that...ARMC12...acts...as...an...adherence... factor... between... mitochondria... by... cooperating... with... TBC1D21,...and...uses...VDAC...proteins...as...a...scaffold....This... suggests...that...ARMC12...enables...sperm...mitochondria...to... correctly... elongate... around... the... flagellum... during... spermatogenesis,...resulting...in...the...formation...of...a...finely... organized...mitochondrial...sheath. Matzuk2 , Masahito Ikawa1 1 Research...Institute...for...Microbial...Diseases,...Osaka...university,...2 Baylor...College...of...Medicine P-175 P-176 --S 165-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 165 69...... The...mammalian...epididymis...is...an...organ...consisting...of...a... single,...highly...coiled...epithelial...lumen....The...epididymis...is... not...only...the...pathway...for...sperm...produced...in...the...testis,... but...also...the...site...of...sperm...maturation....If...spermatozoa... cannot...mature...in...the...epididymis,...they...cannot...acquire... fertilizing...ability...and...males...become...infertile....We...have... recently...identified...NELL2,...a...secretory...protein...expressed... in...the...testis...essential...for...male...fertility...(Kiyozumi...et...al.,... Science.... 2020).... NELL2... is... expressed... by... germ... cells... (spermatocytes)...in...the...testis,...but...NELL2...ablation...did...not... cause...any...abnormalities... in...the...testis... morphology... or... spermatogenesis.... Instead,... impaired... differentiation... of... epididymal...epithelium...and...insufficient...sperm...maturation... was...observed...in...Nell2...KO...mice...and...these...phenotypes... were...rescued...by...germ...cell-specific...expression...of...the... Nell2... transgene.... These... results... indicate... that... NELL2... expressed...in...the...testis...is...a..."lumicrine...factor"...that...acts...on... the...epididymis...through...the...lumen...of...the...reproductive... tract...to...trigger...the...differentiation...of...luminal...epithelial... tissue...and...sperm...maturing...function. Lumicrine...is...a...novel...secreted...signal...transduction...system... like...autocrine,...merocrine,...and...paracrine....In...this...study,...we... investigated...the...signaling...properties...of...lumicrine...using... experimental... animal,... pharmacological,... and... genetic... approaches,... taking... advantage... of... the... mouse... as... an... experimental... model... animal.... First,... we... examined... the... expression... of... the... lumicrine... response... factor... in... the... epididymis,...and...found...that...the...expression...level...was...not... uniform,...but...decreased...in...a...proximal-distal...direction...to... the...epididymis....Next,...the...expression...and...effects...of...the... lumicrine...factor...NELL2...in...the...testis...were...altered...by...the... strategies...of...experimental...animal...science...(ligation...of... testicular... export... ducts),... pharmacology... (busulfan... treatment),...and...genetics...(mutant...mice),...and...the...tissue... size...of...differentiated...epididymal...epithelium...was...found...to... be...positively...correlated...with...the...expression...level...of...Nell2... in...the...testis...(correlation...coefficient...r...=...0.93)....When...Nell2... expression...decreased,...epididymal...epithelial...differentiation... was... observed... only... proximally,... while... when... Nell2... expression... increased,... epithelial... differentiation... was... observed... more... distally.... These... results... indicate... that... NELL2-induced...lumicrine...signaling...can...form...a...proximal- distal...gradient...in...the...male...reproductive...tract. M100835...mice...generated...by...RIKEN...ENU...mutagenesis... show... autosomal-dominant... microcytic... hypochromic... anemia...with...elevated...blood...ferritin....Linkage...analysis... indicated... that... the... causative... gene... for... microcytic... hypochromic...anemia...in...M100835...mice...is...located...within... an...interval...of...the...approximately...1.95...Mb...region...between... D16Nut1...(58.35...Mb)...and...D16Mit185...(60.30...Mb)...on...mouse... chromosome...16....Mutation...analysis...revealed...that...M100835... mice...has...a...point...mutation...(A...to...G)...at...the...acceptor...site...of... the...intron...4...in...coproporphyrinogen...oxidase...(Cpox)...gene,... known...as...a...heme...synthesis...enzyme,...in...this...region....RT- PCR...showed...that...the...Cpox...mRNA...in...M100835...mice... causes...alternative...splicing...errors....These...results...suggest... that...microcytic...hypochromic...anemia...in...M100835...mice...is... due... to... impaired... heme... synthesis... caused... by... splice... mutation...in...Cpox...gene....M100835...mice...may...be...a...model...for... elucidating... the... molecular... mechanism... of... microcytic... hypochromic...anemia...caused...by...mutations...in...the...Cpox... gene.... On... the... other... hand,... it... has... been... reported... that... hereditary...red...blood...cell...abnormalities...have...been...found... to...confer...protective...effects...against...malaria....However,... there...was...no...marked...change...in...rodent...malarial...parasites... (Plasmodium yoelii...17XL)...susceptibility...of...M100835...mice. Gradient formation by secreted signaling lumicrine in mammalian male reproductive tract Daiji Kiyozumi, Masahito Ikawa RIMD,...Osaka...Univ A novel ENU-induced Cpox mutation causes dominant microcytic hypochromic anemia in mice Yuki Miyasaka1 , Kento Okuda1 , Ikuo Miura2 , Hiromi Motegi2 , Shigeharu Wakana2,3 , Tamio Ohno1 1 Division...of...Experimental...Animals,...Graduate...School...of...Medicine,...Nagoya...University,... 2 Technology...and...Developmental...Team...for...Mouse...Phenotype...Analysis,...RIKEN...BioResource...Research...Center,... 3 Department...of...Animal...Experimentation,...Foundation...for...Biomedical...Research...and...Innovation...at...Kob P-177 P-178 --S 166-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 166 69...... We...previously...reported...that...the...Male-dominant...Long- hair...Coat...(MALC)...hamster...exhibiting...long...hair...coat...with... male-dominant...was... caused...by... 1-bp... deletion...in... Fgf5.... Meanwhile,...it...is...remained...to...unknown...why...Fgf5...mutation... leads... to... excess... hair... growth... especially... in... males.... We... generated...Fgf5...genome-editing...mice...(Fgf5cr )...by...i-GONAD... and...revealed...that...they...showed...heterogeneous...longer...hair... length...than...C57BL/6J...(WT)...especially...in...males....The... mutant...FGF5...proteins...with...partial...loss...of...FGF...domain... resulting...from...2-bp...deletion...in...Fgf5...was...expressed...on... outer... root... sheath... in... hair... follicles.... In... this... study,... we... investigated...the...influence...of...mutant...allele...on...regulation... of... hair... cycle... and... participation... in... hair... follicle... morphogenesis....At...postnatal...day...13...(P13),...the...hair...cycle... of...WT...and...Fgf5cr ...were...in...anagen...phase....Although...hair... cycle...of...WT...was...progressed...to...the...catagen...phase...at...P21,... its...Fgf5cr ...was...kept...in...anagen...phase....This...result...suggested... that...the...excess...hair...growth...of...Fgf5cr ...was...caused...by... prolongation...of...anagen...phase...in...hair...cycle....Next,...we... counted...number...of...hair...follicle...in...cross...section...prepared... from...skins...at...P13....The...number...of...hair...follicles...of...male... and...female...in...WT...and...Fgf5cr ...were...36.95.6,...30.66.7,... 32.64.9...and...45.612.9,...respectively....Therefore,...Fgf5cr ... retained...a...larger...number...of...hair...follicles...than...WT...and... Fgf5cr ...females...(P<0.01)....In...addition,...the...significant...size... reduction...of...hair...follicles...was...shown...in...male...individuals... of...Fgf5cr ...(P<0.01)....These...results...suggested...that...FGF5...act... on...not...only...regulation...of...hair...cycle...but...also...development... of...hair...follicle.... Using...a...forward...genetics...approach...to...map...loci...in...a... mouse...skin...cancer...model,...we...previously...identified...a... genetic...locus,...Skin...tumor...modifier...of...MSM...1...(Stmm1)...on... chromosome... 7,... conferring... strong... tumor... resistance.... Herein,...we...report...that...a...functional...single...nucleotide... polymorphism...(SNP)...in...the...3'...untranslated...region...(UTR)... of...p21-activated...kinase...1...(Pak1)...is...responsible...for...the... Stmm1a...locus....Candidate...SNPs...in...the...3'UTR...of...Pak1... from... the... resistance... strain... MSM/Ms... have... been... introduced... into... the... susceptible... strain... FVB/N... by... CRISPR/Cas9.... DMBA/TPA... skin... carcinogenesis... experiments...with...these...mice...have...demonstrated...an...SNP... (Pak1-3'UTR-6C>T :...rs31627325)...that...strongly...suppresses... skin...tumors....In...addition,...we...revealed...that...Muscleblind... Like...Splicing...Regulator...1...(MBNL1)...binds...more...strongly... to...FVB-allele...(6C/C )...upon...TPA...stimulation...and...regulates... the...length...of...the...transcript...in...the...3'UTR...of...Pak1...and... subsequent...tumorigenesis...via...polyadenylation....Thus,... alternative...polyadenylation...of...Pak1...is...cis-regulated...by... rs31627325...and...contributes...to...the...differences...in...skin... cancer...susceptibility...between...the...two...mouse...strains. University Functional polymorphism in Pak1-3'UTR alters skin tumor susceptibility by polyadenylation Kazuhiro Okumura1 , Megumi Saito1 , Yurika Tokunaga1 , Eriko Isogai1 , Kimi Araki2 , Yuichi Wakabayashi1 1 Division...of...Experimental...Animal...Research,...Cancer...Genome...Center,...Chiba...Cancer...Center,... 2 Division...of...Developmental...Genetics,...Institute...of...Resource...Development...and...Analysis,...Kumamoto...University P-179 P-180 --S 167-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 167 69...... [Background] The...3'...untranslated...regions...(3'UTRs)...of... messenger... RNAs... are... non-protein... coding... sequence... involved...in...many...aspects...of...mRNA...regulation,...such...as... stabilization,...intracellular...transport,...and... translation.... Approximately... 70%... of... human... gene... express... 3'UTR... variants...by...alternative...polyadenylation,...and...dynamic... changes...of...the...3'UTR...length...have...been...associated...with... many... human... diseases,... including... cancer... and... neurodevelopmental...disease....The...role...of...each...3'UTR... variants,...however,...is...poorly...examined....In...order...to...analyze... the...role...of...the...3'UTR...variant...on...gene...expression...and... cellular...function...in...vivo,...we...generated...polyadenylation... signal...[Poly(A)...signal]...inserted...mice...by...using...CRISPR/ Cas9. [Methods] Frozen...fertilized...eggs...from...C57BL/6J...mice... were...thawed...and...electroporated...using...a...5...mm...wide... electrode...chamber...(CUY505p5,...NEPA...gene)...and...Opti- MEM...solution...containing...Cas9...protein-gRNA...complex.... The...gRNA...was...designed...using...CRISPOR...(http://crispor. tefor.net)...for...two...sites...corresponding...to...the...long...3'UTR... region....ssDNA...contains...a...49...nt...synthetic...Poly(A)...signal... sequence... (Gene... Dev.... 3:1019,... 1989)... and... 55... nt... of... homologous... sequences... at... both... ends.... The... synthetic... Poly(A)... signal... sequence... contains... Bgl... II... recognition... sequences...so...that...the...sequence...insertion...can...be...detected... by...restriction...enzyme...treatment....The...two-cell...stage... embryos...obtained...after...electroporation...were...transferred... into... the... oviducts... of... pseudopregnant... mice,... and... the... genotype...of...the...resulting...litters...were...analyzed. [Results] Electroporation...was...performed...on...114...fertilized... eggs,...and...101...of...2-cell...stage...embryos...and...9...litters...were... obtained....Gene...analysis...by...PCR...in...combination...with...BglII... treatment...showed...that...the...all...nine...mice...have...any...of...the... three...patterns...of...mutations:...(1)...deletion...of...a...sequence...due... to...DNA...breaks...at...two...sites,...(2)...in/del...mutation...by...a... single...DNA...break,...and...(3)...insertion...of...the...Poly(A)...signal... sequence...by...homologous...recombination...with...ssDNA....The... targeted...insertion...of...the...Poly(A)...signal...sequence...(3)...was... confirmed...in...three...of...the...nine...mice....The...mice...are...crossed... with...C57BL/6J...wild-type...mice,...to...confirm...the...genotype... of...the...F1...generation...mice...and...expression...of...the...3'UTR... variants. Calcineurin...is...a...calcium-dependent...phosphatase...involved... in...a...variety...of...biological...processes,...including...immune... responses....Testis-specific...calcineurin...(sperm...calcineurin),... which...is...composed...of...PPP3CC...and...PPP3R2,...is...considered... to...be...a...good...target...for...male...contraceptives....However,... because...sperm...calcineurin...and...calcineurin...in...immune... cells...have...similar...amino...acid...sequences,...the...inhibition...of... sperm...calcineurin...could...also...suppress...immune...function.... In...this...study,...we...searched...for...genes...that...contain...the... PxIxIT... sequence... involved... in... the... interaction... with... calcineurin...and...that...are...specifically...expressed...in...the... testis...in silico....Knockout...(KO)...mice...of...three...identified... genes...(Cklf, Spata33,...and...Tex43)...were...generated...and...it... was... found... that... SPATA33... interacts... with... sperm... calcineurin.... Similar... to... sperm... calcineurin... KO... mice,... Spata33...KO...mice...showed...reduced...sperm...motility...and... male...fertility....In...addition,...calcineurin...was...absent...from...the... mitochondria...in...Spata33...KO...testis....These...results...indicate... that...SPATA33...regulates...sperm...motility...by...localizing... calcineurin...to...the...mitochondria....Inhibition...of...SPATA33... may...lead...to...the...development...of...male...contraceptives...that... specifically...inhibit...the...function...of...sperm...calcineurin. Glb1...gene...as...mouse...models...for...GM1...gangliosidosis....In... the...intron...of...the...Glb1...gene,...the...Tmppe...gene...exists;... however,...little...is...known...about...Tmppe's...properties...so...far.... In... this... study,... we... generated... Tmppe-KO... mice... to... investigate...the...relationship...between...these...two...genes. [Methods] We...used...the...TAKE...method...(Kaneko...and... Mashimo,...2015)...for...genome...editing...to...create...Tmppe-KO... mice...with...two...guide...RNAs...to...sandwich...the...coding...region... of... the... Tmppe... gene... and... the... entire... coding... region... of... Tmppe...was...deleted...using...the...CRISPR/Cas9...system....The... complex...of...Cas9...protein...and...guide...RNAs...was...introduced... into... C57BL/6N... pronuclear... stage... embryos... by... electroporation,...and...litters...were...obtained...by...embryo... transfer,...and...genetically...modified...pups...were...selected...by... genotyping...PCR....Cerebrum,...liver,...and...kidney...samples... were...collected...from...Tmppe-KO,...wild-type,...and...Glb1-KO... mice...and...subjected...to...Western...Blot...(WB)...analysis.... [Results and Discussion]...Genotyping...PCR...showed...that... three...of...five...pups...obtained...after...embryo...transfer...had... genetic...defects....The...WB...analysis...of...TMPPE...and...GLB1...in... the...three...organs...of...Tmppe-KO,...Glb1-KO...and...wild-type... mice...indicated...that...the...loss...of...TMPPE...had...no...effect...on... GLB1...expression,...while...the...loss...of...GLB1...had...no...effect...on... TMPPE... expression.... The... organ... specificity... of... the... expression...of...the...two...genes...was...slightly...different...even... though... they... may... share... a... promoter,... suggesting... the... possibility...of...an...expression...control...mechanism...other...than... the...promoter. Tensin...2...(TNS2),...a...focal...adhesion...protein,...is...considered...to... anchor... focal... adhesion... proteins... to... ... integrin... as... an... integrin...adaptor...protein,...and/or...work...as...a...scaffold...for... the... interactions... of... these... proteins.... In... kidney,... TNS2... localizes...to...the...basolateral...surface...of...glomerular...epithelial... cells,...podocytes....Loss...of...TNS2...leads...to...the...glomerular... basement... membrane... (GBM)... lesions... accompanying... abnormal...accumulation...of...extracellular...matrix...(ECM)... during...maturing...stage...of...developmental...glomeruli...early... postnatally,... leading... to... eventual... glomerulosclerosis.... However,...the...onset...and...progression...of...TNS2-deficient... nephropathy... critically... depends... on... murine... strain,... indicating...presence...of...the...modifier...genes...that...influence... the...pathologic...progression....Previously,...we...identified...the... disease...modifier...locus...on...chromosome...10...by...genome- wide...linkage...analysis...of...crosses...between...the...C57BL/6J... and... FVB/NJ... (FVB)... mice,... which... are... insensitive... and... sensitive...to...TNS2...deficiency,...respectively.... In...this...study,...we...examined...the...effect...of...loss...of...stabilin...2... (STAB2),...a...positional...candidate...gene,...on...TNS2-deficient... nephropathy.... STAB2... is... a... clearance... receptor... for... circulating...hyaluronan,...and...predominantly...expressed...in... spleen...and...liver....Stab2...knockout...(KO)...mice...with...FVB... genetic... background... (FVB-Stab2-/- )... showed... mild... glomerular...injury...with...expansion...of...the...mesangial...matrix... at...8...weeks...old....Previous...study...has...suggested...that...this... glomerular...injury...is...induced...by...the...nephrotoxic...effects...of... unknown...humoral...factors...increased...by...impaired...STAB2... function....Tns2-null...mutation,...Tns2 nph ,...normally...exhibits... recessive...inheritance....Whereas...Tns2...heterozygous...mice... (FVB-Tns2+/nph )...showed...no...significant...glomerular...injury,... Tns2...heterozygous... and...Stab2...KO...homozygous... mice... (FVB-Tns2nph/+ ;...Stab2 -/- )...developed...massive...proteinuria... and...severe...glomerulosclerosis....In...other...words,...TNS2- deficient... nephropathy... showed... dominant... inheritance... pattern...in...condition...of...STAB2...deficiency....Such...a...modifier... gene-mediated...shifts...in...inheritance...pattern...have...been... reported...in...Alport...nephropathy....Although...the...molecular... mechanisms...remain...unknown,...the...dysfunctions...of...TNS2... and... STAB2... in... double... mutant... mice... may... contribute... additively...to...the...pathogenesis...of...glomerulosclerosis. In...conclusion,...our...results...suggest...that...STAB2...dysfunction... is... involved... in... the... pathogenic... mechanism... of... TNS2- deficient...nephropathy. Complex...vertebral...malformation...(CVM)...is...an...autosomal... recessive...disorder...in...Holstein...cattle,...characterized...by... defects...and...fusion...of...vertebrae...and...ribs....The...causative... gene...for...CVM...has...been...reported...to...be...Slc35a3,...which... encodes...a...nucleotide...sugar...transporter...(NTS)....NTSs... transport...nucleotide...sugars...pooled...in...the...cytosol...into...the... lumen...of...the...Golgi...apparatus...and/or...the...endoplasmic... reticulum,...where...most...glycoconjugate...synthesis...occurs.... To...elucidate...the...pathological...mechanisms...of...CVM,...we... generated...Slc35a3...KO...mice...by...using...CRISPER-Cas9... genome...editing...system...to...target...exon...3...of...the...Slc35a3... gene.... Because... all... F0... mice... carrying... the... frameshift... deletions...at...both...Slc35a3...alleles...died...shortly...after...birth,... Slc35a3...KO...mice...used...in...the...future...experiments...were... generated...by...crossing...of...the...heterozygous...breeding...pairs... lacking...17-bp...of...Slc35a3...coding...sequence....The...generated... KO... mice... exhibited... a... perinatal... lethal... and... dwarf... phenotypes.... In... the... skeletal... specimens... of... mutants,... misshaped...vertebrae,...fusion...of...vertebral...bodies,...fusion... and...bifurcation...of...rib...and...shortening...of...long...bones...were... observed.... In... the... HE-stained... sections... of... humerus,... decrease... in... the... cartilage... extracellular... matrix... and... deformation... of... flat... proliferating... chondrocytes... were... observed....Slc35a3...KO...mice...exhibited...similar...skeletal... abnormalities...to...CVM,...indicating...their...usefulness...as...a... CVM...animal...model....In...the...future,...detailed...histological... and...sugar...chain...analyses...would...be...performed...to...elucidate... the...in vivo...function...of...SLC35A3...and...the...pathological... mechanism...of...CVM. [Background] Somatic...cell...nuclear...transfer...(SCNT)...is... the...sole...reproductive...technique...to...produce...live...animals... from...differentiated...somatic...cells....However,...their...birth... rate...is...very...low...and...many...abnormalities...are...observed.... We...have...recently...reported...that...one...of...the...placenta- specific...imprinted...genes,...Sfmbt2...clustered...microRNAs,... were...overexpressed...in...SCNT...placentas...due...to...loss...of... imprinting,...resulting...in...placental...hyperplasia...in...mice....We... found... that... normalization... of... their... expression... level... ameliorated...their...placental...morphologies;...however,...their... placental...weights...could...not...be...corrected...entirely...to...the... level...comparable...to...those...of...IVF...placentas....In...this...study,... we...investigated...relationships...between...other...placenta- specific...imprinted...genes...and...SCNT...placental...hyperplasia. [Methods] We... focused... on... three... placenta-specific... imprinted... genes... (Smoc1,... Jade1/Phf17,... Platr20)... overexpressed...in...SCNT...placentas....Their...knockout...(KO)... mice...lines...were...produced...by...the...CRISPR/Cas9...system.... Cumulus...cells...were...collected...from...(C57BL...x...DBA/2)F1... female...mice...with...a...maternal...KO...allele...and...transferred... into...enucleated...oocytes....Reconstructed...embryos...were... cultured... until... the... 2-cell... stage... on... the... next... day... and... transferred...into...oviducts...of...pseudopregnant...ICR...female... mice....SCNT...fetuses...were...retrieved...on...day...19.5.... [Results] Two...imprint...genes,...Smoc1...and...Jade1/Phf17,... revealed...sub-lethality...in...homozygous...KO...fetuses....On...the... other...hand,...the...homozygous...KO...of...Platr20...did...not...show... any...lethality....When...SCNT...fetuses...were...produced...with... maternal...KO...cumulus...cells...from...three...KO...lines,...their... birth...rates...were...comparable...to...that...of...wild-type...SCNT.... In...Smoc1...and...Platr20...maternal... KO,...SCNT...placental... weights...were...not...changed...(wild-type:...0.320.02...g,...Smoc1:... 0.290.02...g,...Platr20:...0.300.03...g),...while...those...of...Jade1/ Phf17...maternal...KO...showed...decreased...placental...weights... (0.230.03...g).... Tensin...2...(TNS2),...a...focal...adhesion...protein,...is...considered...to... anchor... focal... adhesion... proteins... to... ... integrin... as... an... integrin...adaptor...protein,...and/or...work...as...a...scaffold...for... the... interactions... of... these... proteins.... In... kidney,... TNS2... localizes...to...the...basolateral...surface...of...glomerular...epithelial... cells,...podocytes....Loss...of...TNS2...leads...to...the...glomerular... basement... membrane... (GBM)... lesions... accompanying... abnormal...accumulation...of...extracellular...matrix...(ECM)... during...maturing...stage...of...developmental...glomeruli...early... postnatally,...leading...to...eventual...glomerulosclerosis....The... GBM...consists...of...the...ECM...secreted...from...podocytes...and... glomerular...endothelial...cells....In...TNS2-deficient...immature... glomeruli,...the...podocytes...show...morphological...alteration... whereas...the...endothelial...cells...show...no...significant...change.... Therefore,... TNS2... deficiency... may... disrupt... podocyte... homeostasis... including... ECM... production,... but... the... underlying...molecular...mechanisms...are...unknown.... In...this...study,...we...examined...the...morphological...change...and... gene...expression...in...the...undifferentiated...mouse...podocyte... cell...line...with...stable...knockdown...of...Tns2...(Tns2...KD...cells)... in...response...to...stimulation...with...ECM...as...follows:...collagen... IV...112...(Col_IV-112)...or...laminin...111...(Lam-111),... which...are...main...components...of...immature...GBM,...collagen... IV...345...(Col_IV-345)...or...laminin...521...(Lam-521),... which...are...main...components...of...mature...GBM,...collagen...I,... and... laminin... 211.... Tns2... KD... cells... and... the... scrambled... knockdown...cells...(Control...cells)...were...seeded...onto...ECM- coated...plates,...and...subjected...to...analyses...after...24-h...culture.... Lam-521-stimulated...Control...cells...showed...the...expansion... and...thinning...of...the...cytoplasm,...and...the...elongation...of... filamentous...pseudopodia...whereas...Tns2...KD...cells...showed... no...significant...morphological...change....On...the...other...ECM- coated... plates,... different... morphological... changes... were... observed....In...particular,...Lam-211...stimulation...induced...cell... death....Among...the...tested...ECM,...Lam-521...showed...the... highest...ability...to...upregulate...the...expressions...of...podocyte- specific...markers,...ECM,...and...matrix...metalloproteinases... (MMPs)...in...Control...cells....Interestingly,...Col_I-...or...Lam-521- stimulated...Control...cells...were...grouped...together...by...gene... expression...clustering...analysis....The...expression...levels...of... podocyte-specific...markers,... such... as... Wt1, Synpo,... and... Nphs1,...were...lower...in...Tns2...KD...cells...than...Control...cells... under...all...conditions...including...non-coating....On...the...other... hand,...the...expression...level...of...Mmp2...was...consistently... higher...in...Tns2...KD...cells...than...Control...cells....The...gene... upregulation...in...Tns2...KD...in...response...to...Lam-521,...except... for...Mmp2...and...Lamb1,...which...encodes...laminin...subunit...1,... was...weaker...than...Control...cells. These...results...suggest...that...Lam-521...plays...a...key...role...in... the...development...and...differentiation...of...podocytes,...and... that...loss...of...TNS2...disrupts...the...cellular...responses...to...Lam- 521...in...podocytes. Ischemia-reperfusion...injury...(IRI)...is...the...tissue...damage... caused...by...restoring...blood...flow...to...ischemic...tissue....It...often... occurs...during...reperfusion...therapy...for...ischemic...diseases... such... as... myocardial... infarction,... or... after... organ... transplantation....In...heart,...one...of...organs...where...IRI...is... especially...a...clinical...problem,...the...cellular...mechanism...by... which...this...occurs...is...generally...understood...as...follows:...(1)... Lack... of... blood... flow... and... oxygen... activates... anaerobic... metabolism,...and...leads...to...low...level...of...intracellular...and... extracellular...pH....(2)...Recovery...of...blood...flow...gives...rise...to... an...extreme...increase...in...extracellular...pH,...resulting...in... intracellular...Ca2+ ...overload....(3)...Recovery...of...oxygen...causes... a...switch...from...anaerobic...to...aerobic...metabolisms,...resulting... in...a...massive...burst...of...reactive...oxygen...species...(ROS)....(4)... Both...Ca2+...overload...and...excessive...ROS...induce...cell...death.... ... ... KCNH7,...a...member...of...the...Kv11...family...of...voltage-gated... K+...channels,...is...mainly...expressed...in...brain....Although...the... function...of...KCNH7...in...the...myocardium...is...unknown,...we... found...that...KCNH7...is...upregulated...in...the...myocardia...after... cardiac... ischemia-reperfusion... (IR).... In... this... study,... to... investigate... the... function... of... KCNH7... in... the... heart,... we... evaluated...myocardial...IRI...in...mice...carrying...a...deletion... mutation...in...the...Kcnh7...gene...(Kcnh7...del)....Over...40-week- old...mice...were...subjected...to...an...in vivo...model...of...cardiac...IR.... The...left...coronary...artery...(LCA)...occlusion...was...performed... using...a...hanging-weight...system,...and...then...terminated...after... 30-min...ischemia....After...reperfusion,...the...infarct...area...was... measured...using...TTC-stained...heart...slices.... In...the...2-h...reperfusion...model,...in...some...cases,...mice...showed... pulmonary...congestion,...followed...by...respiratory...arrest...and... death,...during...reperfusion,...often...in...30...min...before...the... endpoint....The...mortality...rate...was...significantly...higher...in... Kcnh7...del...mice...than...in...the...wild-type...mice...(75%...vs...15%,... p<0.01)....The...fact...that...dysfunction...of...KCNH7,...which...is... upregulated...in...the...myocardia...after...cardiac...IR,...increases... mortality...after...cardiac...IR,...suggest...that...KCNH7...plays...a... protective...role...in...myocardial...IRI....On...the...other...hand,... there...was...no...significant...difference...in...the...infarcted...area... of...the...hearts...from...the...surviving...mice....We...attribute...this... result...to...a...bias...that...excludes...the...data...from...the...mice...that... deceased... during... reperfusion.... So,... we... are... currently... performing...the...1.5-h...reperfusion...model. Medicine,...Kitasato...University P-187 P-188 --S 171-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 171 69...... Colorectal...cancer...is...the...leading...cause...of...morbidity...and... the...second...leading...cause...of...mortality...in...Japan....The...risk... of...colorectal...cancer...is...thought...to...be...increased...by...chronic... inflammation... in... the... intestinal... mucosa.... Fibrosis... of... intestinal...tissue...caused...by...chronic...inflammation,...such...as... inflammatory...bowel...disease,...has...also...been...suggested...to... be...involved...in...carcinogenesis....We...have...identified...the... nephropathy...malignancy...factor...NSAS1...in...a...nephropathy... model...and...found...that...it...is...involved...in...inflammation...or... fibrosis.... In... the... mouse... model... of... colitis-associated... carcinogenesis,...NSAS1-/- ...mice...significantly...reduced...the... number...and...size...of...polyps...in...FVB/NJ...mice....In...colorectal... cancer...cell...lines,...knockdown...of...the...NSAS1...gene...resulted... in... a... significant... decrease... in... cell... proliferation.... These... results...suggest...that...NSAS1...functions...as...a...malignant... factor...in...colorectal...cancer....In...this...study,...we...examined... whether... the... involvement... of... NSAS1... in... colorectal... carcinogenesis...was...reproduced...in...another...strain...of...mice... or... whether... it... was... involved... in... inflammation.... Colitis- associated...carcinogenesis...(AOM/DSS)...mice:...NSAS1-/- ... mice...were...generated...in...the...C57BL/6J...mice...by...CRISPR/ Cas9,...and...Azoxymethane...(AOM)...and...Dextran...sulfate... sodium...(DSS)...were...administered...to...the...wildtype...and... NSAS1-/- ...mice...to...induce...colon...cancer.... In...AOM/DSS...mice...(C57BL/6J...mice),...the...number...and...size... of...polyps...in...the...colon...were...significantly...decreased...in... NSAS1-/- ...mice....In...addition,...no...significant...difference...was... observed...between...wildtype...and...NSAS1-/- ...mice...in...the... evaluation...of...inflammation...by...measuring...spleen...weight... and...colon...size....In...summary,...the...involvement...of...NSAS1...in... the...development...of...colorectal...cancer...observed...in...FVB/ NJ...mice...was...similarly...observed...in...C57BL/6J...mice....In... addition,...there...was...no...difference...in...inflammation...between... wildtype...and...NSAS1-/- ...mice,...suggesting...that...NSAS1...has... a...direct...effect...on...cell...proliferation....In...the...future,...the... involvement...of...NSAS1...and...signals...involved...in...colorectal... carcinogenesis... will... be... examined... to... elucidate... novel... molecular...mechanisms...of...colorectal...carcinogenesis. Tensin...2...(TNS2),...a...focal...adhesion...protein,...is...considered...to... anchor... focal... adhesion... proteins... to... ... integrin... as... an... integrin...adaptor...protein,...and/or...work...as...a...scaffold...for... the... interactions... of... these... proteins.... In... kidney,... TNS2... localizes...to...the...basolateral...surface...of...glomerular...epithelial... cells,...podocytes....Loss...of...TNS2...leads...to...the...glomerular... basement... membrane... (GBM)... lesions... accompanying... abnormal...accumulation...of...extracellular...matrix...(ECM)... during...maturing...stage...of...developmental...glomeruli...early... postnatally,... leading... to... eventual... glomerulosclerosis.... Previous...studies...have...suggested...that...TNS2...deficiency... disturbs... ECM - integrin-mediated... signaling... and... the... subsequent...development...of...podocytes...during...glomerular... maturing...stage. Interestingly,... in... TNS2-deficient... mice,... the... glomeruli... located...in...the...inner...renal...cortex...only...exhibit...mild...GBM... thickening,...while...those...in...the...outer...renal...cortex...exhibit... rapidly...progressive...lesions...after...birth....This...difference...has... been...attributed...to...difference...in...developmental...maturity... of...the...glomeruli...at...birth....The...glomeruli...located...in...the... outer...renal...cortex...are...maturing,...while...those...in...the...inner... renal... cortex... have... already... matured... without... obvious... lesions...at...birth....These...findings...indicate...that...postnatal... increase...in...renal...blood...flow,...in...other...words,...the...increased... biomechanical...strain...may...contribute...to...the...developmental... disorder...of...TNS2-deficient...podocytes....The...involvement...of... biomechanical...strain...in...glomerular...pathology...has...been... confirmed...in...the...other...nephropathic...mice,...such...as...Alport... mice,...which...are...defective...for...assembly...of...collagen...IV,...a... core...component...of...GBM,...and...the...mice...lacking...CD151,... which...interacts...with...integrin...31.... In... this... study,... to... investigate... whether... increased... biomechanical...strain...similarly...aggravates...TNS2-deficient... nephropathy,...we...evaluated...the...severity...of...glomerular... lesions... in... the... TNS2-deficient... mice... with... a... C57BL/6J... background...that...were...affected...by...hypertension....They...are... insensitive... to... TNS2... deficiency,... and... develop... mild... glomerular...injury...with...GBM...thickening...under...normal... condition....Hypertension...was...induced...by...administration...of... a...nitric...oxide...synthase...inhibitor,...N-Nitro-L-arginine... methyl...ester...hydrochloride...(L-NAME)....Systemic...arterial... pressure...and...urine...protein...were...monitored...during...the... administration...for...7...weeks....Finally,...the...kidneys...from... 12-week-old...mice...were...subjected...to...histopathological... analysis...and...transmission...electron...microscopy. C57BL/6J... and... C57BL/6N...substrains....Moreover,...genetic...differences...were... identified...in...the... 114... SNP...markers... among...the... seven... C57BL/6...substrains...from...five...production...breeders....In... addition,...106...SNPs...were...detected...on...all...chromosomes...of... BALB/cAJcl...and...BALB/cByJJcl...substrains....These...SNPs... could...be...used...for...genotyping...in...BALB/cJ,...BALB/cAJcl,... BALB/cAnNCrlCrlj,...and...BALB/cCrSlc...mice,...and...they... are...particularly...useful...for...genetic...mapping...using...crosses... between...BALB/cByJJcl...and...other...BALB/c...substrains.... The...SNPs...characterized...in...this...study...can...be...utilized...for... genetic...mapping...to...identify...the...causative...mutations...of... the... phenotypes... induced... by... N-ethyl-N-nitrosourea... mutagenesis...and...the...SNPs...responsible...for...phenotypic... differences... between... the... substrains... of... C57BL/6... and... BALB/c...mice. F1...hybrid...progenies...between...related...subspecies...often... show...hybrid...sterility...(HS)...or...inviability....Murine...forward... genetic...approaches...using...Mus musculus domesticus...(Mmd)... and...Mus musculus musculus...(Mmm)...identified...two...HS... critical...genomic...regions...named...Hst1...on...Chr17...and...Hstx2... on...Chr...X...causing...HS....HS...gene...on...Hst1...was...reported...to... be...Prdm9....Prdm9...is...expressed...in...testes,...intersubspecific... missense... SNPs...of...Prdm9...induce... HS...in... hybrids,... and... Prdm9...null...mutation...leads...to...sterility...in...C57BL/6...(B6)... mice....However,...HS...gene...on...Hstx2...remains...unknown....I... speculated...that...HS...gene...was...disrupted...its...function...in... hybrid...F1...male,...inducing...HS....Here,...I...hypothesized...that... HS...gene...on...Hstx2...also...has...same...three...features...of...Prdm9... as... mentioned... above.... Therefore,... I... investigated... these... genes...by...knock...out...(KO)...in...B6....There...are...32...genes...on... Hstx2.... Nine... HS... candidates... have... two... features,... intersubspecific...SNPs...and...expression...in...testes,...so...that...I... generated...each...nine...HS...candidate...KO...mice....Contrary...to... my...expectations,...nine...mutants...were...fertile.... Mir465...cluster...is...one...of...HS...candidates....Mir465...cluster... consist...of...Mir465a,...b-1,...c-1,...c-2,...and...d....Recent...study... reported...next...generation...sequencing...(NGS)...revealed... Mir465... cluster... have... intersubspecific... copy... number... variation...between...Mmd...and...Mmm...in...addition...to...SNP.... Therefore,... Mir465... cluster... attracts... attentions... as... HS... candidate....Here,...to...reconfirm...that...Mir465...cluster...is...not... essential...for...spermatogenesis...in...B6,...we...regenerated... Mir465...cluster...KO...mice....As...well...as...previous...results,...the... KO... mice... are... fertile.... Mir465... cluster... might... impede... spermatogenesis...rather...than...lose...its...function...in...hybrids. Characterization of SNPs for a forward genetics approach using genetic crosses in substrains of mice Ikuo Miura1,2,3 , Yoshiaki Kikkawa1,3 , Shumpei P. Yasuda3 , Akiko Shinogi2 , Daiki Usuda2 , Vivek Kumar4 , Joseph S. Takahashi5 , Masaru Tamura2 , Hiroshi Masuya2 , Shigeharu Wakana2,6 1 Niigata...University,...2 RIKEN...BRC,...3 Tokyo...Metropolitan...Institute...of...Medical...Science,...4 The...Jackson...Laboratory,...5 The... University...of...Texas...Southwestern...Medical...Center,...6 Foundation...for...Biomedical...Research...and...Innovation...at...Kobe Reconfirmation of fertility of Mir465 cluster on Hstx2 KO mice Kento Morimoto1 , Numata Koki2 , Daitoku Yuko2 , Hamada Yuko2 , Kato Kanako2 , Takahashi Satoru2 , Murata Kazuya2 , Mizuno Seiya2 , Sugiyama Fumihiro2 1 Doctoral...Programs...in...Medical...Sciences,...University...of...Tsukuba,... 2 Trans-border...Medical...Research...Center,...Faculty...of...Medicine,...University...of...Tsukuba P-191 P-192 --S 173-- The 69th Annual Meeting Japanese Association for Laboratory Animal Science 173 69...... This...study...examines...the...effects...of...a...gene...of...unknown... function,...X,...on...sperm...motility...and...morphology....Knockout... of...this...gene...causes...sperm...to...bend...and...lose...motility....This... trait...could...be...a...model...for...sperm...aplasia,...but...X...is...thought... to...encode...a...nuclear...transcription...factor,...and...if...so,...the... gene... responsible... for... sperm... aplasia... may... be... lurking... downstream...of...the...X....In...order...to...determine...whether...the... X...gene...was...the...cause...of...the...reduced...sperm...motility,...we... used...CRISPR/Cas9...to...generate...multiple...patterns...of...X... mutant...mice...and...found...that...all...of...them...were...infertile...as... males,...and...their...sperm...morphology...was...bent...into...a...C... shape... with... very... poor... motility.... The... X... gene... is... well... conserved... in... many... species... and... is... located... on... the... X... chromosome...in...both...mice...and...humans....The...only...previous... study...has...suggested...a...function...as...a...transcription...factor... with...a...nuclear...transfer...signal...sequence....However,...there... has...been...no...report...on...testis...expression...and,...of...course,...no... report... on... its... function.... This... study... will... elucidate... the... mechanism...by...which...gene...X,...whose...function...is...unknown,... alters...sperm...morphology...and...motility....For...this...purpose,... we...are...currently...conducting...experiments...to...confirm...the... following...points. 1.... Are... there... any... specific... tissues... where... sperm... are... expressed,...especially...in...the...testis? 2....Is...the...function...in...the...expressed...tissues...a...transcription... factor...as...in...previous...studies,...and...if...so,...what...are...the... downstream...genes? 3....How...does...gene...X...itself...or...a...group...of...downstream... genes...alter...sperm...morphology...and...motility? This...presentation...will...focus...on...what...we...have...learned...so... far. Effect of unknown function gene X on sperm motility Yoshiki Miyasaka, Arisa Tanigawa, Tomoko Tokunaga, Manami Nishimura, Yuko Kotani, Yoshihiro Uno, Kazuki Nakao Institute...of...experimental...animal...science...(IEXAS)...Osaka...University...medical...school P-193
